name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Howard Schultz is a disgrace for dodging Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders called Howard Schultz to
testify before the HELP committee to answer for his illegal union busting.
Instead of taking any accountability, Schultz is refusing to testify and
counting on his power as a billionaire to avoid any consequences.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1009&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ]The Starbucks CEO is now attacking Bernie with the full weight of his
financial resources and we need to have his back. Pitch in here to stand
with Our Revolution and help Bernie fight union-busting!

-Begin Forwarded Message-

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1010&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Starbucks founder and CEO Howard Schultz
was personally named in complaints filed by the general counsel of the
National Labor Relations Board for union busting.

After years of posturing as an employee-friendly company, Schultz led
Starbucks’ union busting efforts — closing stores, firing staff supportive
of unionization, withholding pay raises, and even going as far as to hire
notorious former CIA and Pinkerton operatives to disrupt organizing!

Bernie Sanders called on Schultz to testify before the Health, Education
Labor and Pensions Committee in the US Senate. And, now, despite the
likelihood of a legally binding subpoena to answer questions about
Starbucks’ questionable labor practices, Howard Schultz is refusing to
testify.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1011&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ]Empathy-free billionaires like Howard Schultz think they’re above the
law, and they’ll use vast resources to try to smear Bernie and avoid
accountability. Can we count on you to have Bernie’s back by pitching in
to help us fight back?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz.uAS4Cg&t=1001&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz.Gwlqs7&t=1002&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz.UEU7Gi&t=1003&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz.pjURWm&t=1004&akid=4038%2E5885482%2EouzVf8 ]GIVE ONCE

subject: The Final Stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
Election day is here! | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=cde8d7c998&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")
---
|
####
# Tomorrow is Election Day!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
### Last Day to Vote!
I'll keep things brief since we are busy doing good work in the district.

I just wanted to send out a final reminder that tomorrow, February 21, is election day! If you haven't voted yet, make sure you head to the polls tomorrow.

The polls will be open from 6 AM to 7 PM tomorrow. Get there early, so you don't have to wait in line.

No matter what the election results are tomorrow, I want you to know I couldn't have gotten this far without patriots like you on my side.

My team has worked tirelessly to get us this far, and I couldn't appreciate them more.

If you have any election day questions or questions about how to get to the polls, please email us at info@benjamin4congress.com.
---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=9f3b1ed8f0&e=3cd8121505)
---
| **Check your voting location by clicking the "Vote Now" button.**

All we need is for each of our supporters to bring five friends to the polls with them to vote, and we will win.

It is crunch time, and we can't do it without you!
---

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Sign my petition against a national sales tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58999261/392945804/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmMWMyMS04M2IxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kW6JV-CMCv-YdvPJmTY0n3QpRKLAdwn7QbbSpzNWHI=&emci=ba2a8daa-81b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fcff1c21-83b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Sometimes, you just have to shake your head (or roll your eyes) at the unbelievable stuff we hear from the other side of the aisle. Have you heard the latest? **The Republicans in the U.S. House think we should abolish the income tax and replace it with a 30% sales tax.** No kidding. I've joined with progressive organizations across America to denounce this thing. **[Will you join us and add your name to tell Congress to hold firm and reject a 30% national sales tax?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58999262/392945805/-1421563140?source=2023NoSalesTax_JM&referrer=group-merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-02-salestax-email%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmMWMyMS04M2IxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kW6JV-CMCv-YdvPJmTY0n3QpRKLAdwn7QbbSpzNWHI=&emci=ba2a8daa-81b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fcff1c21-83b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58999263/392945806/-1421563140?source=2023NoSalesTax_JM&referrer=group-merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-02-salestax-email%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmMWMyMS04M2IxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kW6JV-CMCv-YdvPJmTY0n3QpRKLAdwn7QbbSpzNWHI=&emci=ba2a8daa-81b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fcff1c21-83b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215) The arguments are plain and simple:
* A national sales tax would raise taxes on low-income and middle-income families who spend most of their income on buying groceries, gas, clothes, and medicine.

* Meanwhile, a national sales tax would be a huge tax cut for the wealthiest Americans who spend a much smaller chunk of their income on basic goods and services.

* In places like Oregon, where we don't have a sales tax, the cost of implementing this policy would be a crushing cost to small retailers and restaurants. (And in sales tax states, the mix of goods and services taxed would be different, creating chaos at the cash register.)

This is a terrible, horrible, no good, very bad idea. **[Sign my petition to tell Congress to toss thi in the trash can where it belongs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58999264/392945807/-1421563140?source=2023NoSalesTax_JM&referrer=group-merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-02-salestax-email%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmMWMyMS04M2IxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kW6JV-CMCv-YdvPJmTY0n3QpRKLAdwn7QbbSpzNWHI=&emci=ba2a8daa-81b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=fcff1c21-83b1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)** The Republicans in the U.S. House think we should abolish the income tax and replace it with a 30% sales tax. No kidding. I've joined with progressive organizations across America to denounce this thing. The arguments are plain and simple: A national sales tax would raise taxes on low-income and middle-income families who spend most of their income on buying groceries, gas, clothes, and medicine. Meanwhile, a national sales tax would be a huge tax cut for the wealthiest Americans who spend a much smaller chunk of their income on basic goods and services. In places like Oregon, where we don't have a sales tax, the cost of implementing this policy would be a crushing cost to small retailers and restaurants. (And in sales tax states, the mix of goods and services taxed would be different, creating chaos at the cash register.) This is a terrible, horrible, no good, very bad idea. Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: National Rifle Association
subject: The NRA’s Executive Vice President wants to know what YOU think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
We really want to hear your thoughts | As America's longest-standing civil rights organization, there's nothing the NRA cares about more than getting to know its supporters.
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)

Peter,

As America's longest-standing civil rights organization, there's nothing the NRA cares about more than getting to know its supporters.

That's why Wayne LaPierre recently sent you our exclusive **Official Survey** on Gun Registration. In order to best fight for the wants and needs of America's gun owners, we need to know them on a personal level. **And that includes you, Peter.**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)**
Our hard-working team at the NRA is deeply committed to protecting the American people from radical gun-grabbers in the federal, state, and local governments. In order to best serve your needs, we need to hear your input.

**Completing this important survey will only take a few minutes, but those few minutes will make a huge difference in the fight to save the Second Amendment.** We made the personalized link below just for you, but it's expiring soon. **Give us your input while you still can.**

**[Click HERE to take the OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN REGISTRATION, so we're best informed on how to defend your rights and freedoms. >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)

Thank you,

National Rifle Association Headquarters

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Wayne LaPierre**
Subject: The NRA will always stand up for your rights

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)

Peter,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)

Peter, filling out the **Official Gun Registration Survey** only takes a few minutes. **It 's the best way to help the NRA protect your gun rights and stop government overreach.**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)
Wayne LaPierre
CEO, National Rifle Association

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62343833:J5VTXWGN5:m:1:3331421248:30C2E3E34FD3CF0DFBE6224CB3DCB20D:r)**

name: Lila Rose
subject: Tell Biden NO on Abortion
body:
Did you hear President Biden's State of the Union address?

| [ ](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9dt7c5b35hpsros50fcribn3hikl3mpe13dnff0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj4c3h2bs)
---
#
Friend of Life,

Did you hear President Biden's State of the Union address?

Despite our economy still struggling from ongoing inflation and increasing violence around the world, President Biden turned his focus on innocent preborn lives and declared his intention to pass a federal bill codifying the right to abortion on demand. He called this a "constitutional right."

Once again, pro-abortion activists are stopping at nothing to profit from the slaughter of children in the womb. **[Our time's running out to prevent this pending abortion apocalypse.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn04n6atvkjm1il13kqlqk3jb1id6jmkbrbrq9u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj4c3h2bs)**

Codifying abortion into federal law, or worse yet, passing a constitutional amendment protecting it will _erase_ every single pro-life victory of the last 60 years. It will lead to the death of tens of millions of preborn children and burden generations of parents with the guilt of their decisions.

That's why I'm hoping I can count on you right now to act. We can't wait until it's too late. That's what happened back in 1973 with _Roe v. Wade_. No one assumed the Supreme Court would create a "right" to kill your own baby out of thin air, but they did and it took nearly 50 years for us to get it overturned.

**We need to activate courageous pro-life people before midnight tonight so we can stay in the fight and reach these states before it 's too late. **

Specifically, your gift right now of as little as $50 WILL reach 1,700 people with the truth about abortion and Biden's agenda. Live Action reaches more people online every day cutting edge research and viral content than any other pro-life organization. This means that every dollar you give will represent 34 lives forever changed and countless babies saved.

But only if you give before Biden's abortion dream comes true. Here's your secure link to make your gift right now: **[https://give.liveaction.org/courageous-pro-life/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsfjtd55bcjoeetd1m0t8eqt1qkrgeklkh23hj40_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj4c3h2bs)**

President Biden has made his goal clear, now it's up to us to show him and every pro-abortion activist in Congress our resolve. We won't stop until abortion is ended in every community and every single life is respected.

Tell Biden we WON'T GO BACK to _Roe_.

Thank you for speaking up for the voiceless.

For Life,

**Lila Rose**
President and Founder

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z608t39p2tjt6vf7vrea3pmusn4bpks4dtquf930_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj4c3h2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2of4mdm7bcsffi7gck229o2sad2nrhnjeaat7og_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj5clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9c09jdv2g6acn7gotvk7ac80l3ud624jlj4odh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj5clh2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbpf52ktb2fc5jrkj21tnn9gdu09orf1p03ia5i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj5clh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic?_

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdke2pi7dqtn38hr8npiubvh3lua7rfdkjgju4o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj5clh2bs)**

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,
---
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7eqfaklj4umui17vea8lc8n3pb8hlbelgitrnhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj2cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lvmdgf8pqsdj19rmh1avr430svkve46ip0g8eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj2cth2bs)**

It’s critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media’s deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation’s history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump’s term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden’s immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden’s “policies” have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrme2jnhmsg4sqdsc3vn7tdfcg9jufdd07indlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj2cth2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden’s open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znnk6cse83gv6nvoksm2cnh9i22pkgbgfd8qp7o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj2cth2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlm3a4d52efg4vn24ku044csig628oun3nvssuig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjjmeoj2cth2bs)

subject: The Leftwing Is Closing Down Conservative Media: Newsmax, OAN, More
body:
The left-wing is trying to shutdown Newsmax! | | **Dear Reader:** The left-wing is trying to shutdown Newsmax! Just weeks ago AT&T's DirecTV removed Newsmax from its systems.

Newsmax was censored in more than 13 million DirecTV homes. **Scary this is happening in America today . . .** Now RNC Chairwoman **Ronna McDaniel** is speaking out.**** She sent an urgent email to Republican members this week telling them **to oppose AT &T DirecTV's censorship of Newsmax.** Ronna warns if we do not fight against this the left will not stop. Ronna writes: "DirecTV . . . is yet another example of **powerful corporations silencing conservative viewpoints . . .** It's anti-free-speech and anti-American." **President Trump agrees.** He says AT&T DirecTV's censorship and deplatforming of both OAN and Newsmax is simply "disgusting." And Dr. Ben Carson warns that if we don't fight back against AT&T and DirecTV **we may lose our freedoms.** _We must fight back._ **We need you to do two things today:**

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Service Matters
body:
From Erik Aadland
| | | |
---
---
|
# My Service Matters
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
------My service matters in this election because my character has been tested on the battlefield. There are very few who have gone to the lengths I have to protect and defend this country. What we have done in our past is a testament to who we are; credentials and our personal history matters because it speaks to what we are capable of, how we conducted ourselves, and what we are likely to do in the future. No other candidate in this race even comes close to my level of service to country, or personal accomplishments, yet they would try to reduce it for personal and political gain
| |
---|---
|
------As a young man, my deepest desire was to serve my country, so after much effort to get accepted, I attended the United States Military Academy at West Point where I first took my oath to support and defend the U.S. Constitution. 9-11 happened when I was a senior, so I knew then that war was in my future. I was a tank platoon leader in Iraq, where I earned a Bronze Star for Valor (with V-device) over the course of hundreds of combat patrols. It was my brigade that captured Saddam Hussein. In Afghanistan, I commanded a Stryker Reconnaissance Troop, in charge of securing the border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan, in the Kandahar District city of Spin Boldak; the second most strategically important location in the country. I earned another Bronze Star there. I was always assigned the toughest missions because my commanders knew I would get it done right. I have risked my life for this country on numerous occasions, demonstrating the fullest dedication and willingness to make the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom.
------With politicians falsely claiming valor where there is none, mistaking loudly spoken words for courage, it is time to return to the dignity, respect, and virtue of our foundational Republican values. My past history speaks to how I will conduct myself in the future. As Chairman, I will strive for excellence and act with the highest integrity, courage, honor, and respect in my quest to restore our party to greatness.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016g0SEU6zxpI7UcgRFAcnlSUFE2q5vzgOD7lgldB-NRT27mwSV2XO2wtKuU038ZEtt2OqSy_3nsvcl4JLO8H9v7WOgMoE3kwnG4Y8RFP3dTrsPRGmZJIk6BOA2LlSCZ2hDs0Zvmy5OSu220vTgVl564n4ay67ZfIlDSJWJmEy8bVR2wGI5N5exBZ6WDXUkWBIYtk71e5oHHs=&c=2MJbDCPXxP54Jvq0b1PynPVfYZ8u0-WMLk7PK9sljirx2N10Bupb8Q==&ch=Zleten_uaJIKgpu4T7C7IVzi-Khn3B3QtkUzWIvzO0sf6rqeP9fgGg==)
---
|
---
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a former Congressional Candidate (CO-7), West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
---
|
---
---

clean_body: From Erik Aadland | | | | | My Service Matters | | | | ---|--- | ------My service matters in this election because my character has been tested on the battlefield. There are very few who have gone to the lengths I have to protect and defend this country. What we have done in our past is a testament to who we are; credentials and our personal history matters because it speaks to what we are capable of, how we conducted ourselves, and what we are likely to do in the future. No other candidate in this race even comes close to my level of service to country, or personal accomplishments, yet they would try to reduce it for personal and political gain | | ---|--- | ------As a young man, my deepest desire was to serve my country, so after much effort to get accepted, I attended the United States Military Academy at West Point where I first took my oath to support and defend the U.S. Constitution. 9-11 happened when I was a senior, so I knew then that war was in my future. I was a tank platoon leader in Iraq, where I earned a Bronze Star for Valor (with V-device) over the course of hundreds of combat patrols. It was my brigade that captured Saddam Hussein. In Afghanistan, I commanded a Stryker Reconnaissance Troop, in charge of securing the border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan, in the Kandahar District city of Spin Boldak; the second most strategically important location in the country. I earned another Bronze Star there. I was always assigned the toughest missions because my commanders knew I would get it done right. I have risked my life for this country on numerous occasions, demonstrating the fullest dedication and willingness to make the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. ------With politicians falsely claiming valor where there is none, mistaking loudly spoken words for courage, it is time to return to the dignity, respect, and virtue of our foundational Republican values. My past history speaks to how I will conduct myself in the future. As Chairman, I will strive for excellence and act with the highest integrity, courage, honor, and respect in my quest to restore our party to greatness. | | | | | | == | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a former Congressional Candidate (CO-7), West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | | == == == | PO Box 630552 | Littleton, CO 80163 tel:720-464-4488 == | | | | | | | Aadland for Colorado | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | (720) 464-4488 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with

body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbkdkrblqs4fgn7s7vi577rp60t9sd3gc7b4fm68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8u6d0j3vnhfhnstfhc3a821r605o9n0fi54h47g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znmv2lnoc4hedh86msdfvlf24bmamsn7q43lt90g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu2e8o61468tce9cbqo54tq1b7vb34159pevqsm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf9h62i7sn5tlmeu520u1o7unnptshnv00213bkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z20o8ts405qnduq108rlpejs2lg8gd3t8nh8diq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfclcvo8ns3ogepafmod040qkm4pbch9dods3lf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfshdld3terd1fvo4iq224u4rtr8b8mkels2d71o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6cth2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
%%previewtext%%

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zslaca47mhrbkj4f0f5ao534aubr00gir1jf4d80_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1rs5c7jhhdd293eauq4f8rhmi058a6691avngi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6c1h2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znmdfv6c1h67plkfkiv42k6mvhepcs6seoqmo7o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6c1h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkaitqjoeqit2ldtunfo3m2ho13epcssp0ld3qgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6c1h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcke7811om54km3k2cvlcgh7qvrpjm1ftdomjt1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6c1h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z5u7qf9eb3h2vq37qjenf8ps0jk7ct9ppntet9oo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7pi1ivbiofq57vi8b0a1cp7k68bq5hd4e926uko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge2ob6c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution." Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Senator Amanda Chase
---
Senator Chase has represented Chesterfield, Colonial Heights and Amelia Counties in the Senate since first elected in 2015, almost 8 years. She grew up in Bon Air and has lived most of her life in Chesterfield, since 1979.
She has been rated as one of the most conservative Senators in Virginia by the American Conservative Union and has a lifetime score of 100% with the Family Foundation, VCDL and A with the NRA.
She is also a champion in the General Assembly for pushing back against vaccine and mask mandates, calling for a full investigation into the 2020 Presidential Election, parental rights in education, medical freedom, protecting gun rights and help for our veterans.

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpao122okh92erimdievh9etes668i7nm7pf34bg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tbi6gp38tdje1pn0srjc8r3ddb7cjjj6tdkedgm2d1nmhrj1oj0ssqnac3ks3jjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p7cphimsqj8ptmc9j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeor4s3ge0oj4c8iv0)
*Sponsored Message*
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgf3c8eljcj8iv5m0r381rve42nltpoci0nlvf8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge1o32chh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh124c9rriajnt5ubqml463l2bf13hd3j5od9o88_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge1o32chh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0uj0jiuf0h3vtlqottg7k96itaq5ot3vgdke5i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge1o32chh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlqkh8uuvmlj67nishsi13k6ts2lempft2amlhp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cjge1o32chh2bs)**

clean_body: We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even Sponsored Message Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: No Socialized Medicine In Mississippi
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| Senate Bill 2323, allows the government-owned University of Mississippi Medical Center to buy out rural and community hospitals. The bill would exclude the state from any anti-competition laws providing a pathway for the state to have a complete monopoly on medical services provided by hospitals in the state. The original version of the bill includes language on line 335 that states the legislature understands that the bill is anti-free-market and impacts competition, but they believe that it is necessary for the “benefits of collaboration.”[No Socialized Medicine In Mississippi](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/jyJuQAgI90Ct22c_qllgTQ)Even with a private hospital amendment, it may not provide protection for private hospitals, with the state being shielded from anti-competition laws.There is nothing good about this bill, which was introduced by a Republican in a Republican supermajority Senate, being led by a Republican Lt. Gov. Delbert Hosemann. According to the Mississippi Republican (GOP) website, Republicans should hold a view of free markets in healthcare, stating “We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families, promoting free-market competition.” This bill is anything but free-market and the Republicans pushing it seem to be anything but Republicans.
---
| | [No Socialized Medicine In Mississippi ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/jyJuQAgI90Ct22c_qllgTQ)
---
| Government involvement in healthcare has created the rural healthcare crisis. Tell your representative you do not want socialized medicine in Mississippi.[No Socialized Medicine In Mississippi](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/jyJuQAgI90Ct22c_qllgTQ)We need your help. Tell your representative that you want to end government-controlled socialized medicine in Mississippi. Ask them to vote against Senate Bill 2323.You may also call **601-345-1211** and leave a message for Chairman Sam Mims asking him to kill Senate Bill 2323.
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/_9kCvmVqi6J8SyThWXOkYw) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650727%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gGCoiTTVEljnCiq43HLK0w&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650728%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sDvnkgQTbTgZxhpqcfdTsQ&sysid=1)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650729%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3qd%2fB69L37BJJH9Il11%2bvQ&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650727%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gGCoiTTVEljnCiq43HLK0w&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650720%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6ZNpyJqyigYB4kwhVejeaQ&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650721%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NoXo93%2bDHjG4C2j5boodvg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650722%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8rHpKn%2bsmTuUtgciOmCwLw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sherrod Brown isn't just on the scene when there's a disaster like East Palestine. He's argued against corporate power and monopolies, and fought for raising wages, improving worker benefits and strengthening unions for years. We need to send him back to the Senate in 2024.
body:
He’ll hold them to account for us
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7ee9c7f-1c4d-4aa0-8473-fd4fc27ed9cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The disaster suffered in East Palestine, Ohio, caused by the toxic train derailment is a parable about modern America. **Look no further than this: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3aa49170-8ee7-4200-bcec-aadb6e16b103/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Republican Donald Trump gutted the regulation that could've prevented the tragedy from happening_** , **_because Republicans worry more about large corporations making an extra billion than the basic needs of regular people._** **_GOP Governor of Ohio, Mike DeWine, refuses to call a state emergency to receive extra federal resources_** _ because, well...I have no idea. He's a multi-millionaire. He's been in government nearly every year since the 1980s. Maybe he's just given up caring._ **_Meanwhile, Senator Sherrod Brown, who we remind you has a difficult reelection ahead in 2024, Is A Leader_ :** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta74db3cc-1c95-4062-8d67-7598f51f138c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Senator Brown isn't just on the scene when there's a disaster. He's argued against corporate power and monopolies, and fought for raising wages, improving worker benefits and strengthening unions for years._** [**_Can you join us in this moment, as we're reminded of Senator Brown's importance, in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to reelect him?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13112b46-d261-4a92-8ccb-d21f8895e58d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| _Senator Brown isn't just the best Ohio has to offer, he's one of the most dedicated, empathetic and effective Senators in the entire Senate._ **_We need Sen. Brown in Washington to fight these fights--to regulate corporate power in the aftermath of East Palestine.__ You can be sure Trump, DeSantis, McConnell, McCarthy and DeWine won't do a damn thing._** [**_Can you join us in this moment, as we're reminded of Senator Brown's importance, in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to reelect him?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcadf4c60-8dab-41b5-8756-117d97dc24ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for standing up for all Americans,_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T163e2316-e8ea-4eb4-bc63-2c9cb06640d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=abb7dba555be4521a363662b4f994568&_e=Ja8g_EZ1Z-qgF67QwyHBMQDDmGa0pSvbUTnx_sDlrZ8gF-rHp1MyU-IwAeUufBiF0trMdkhxanU7AGR5S_5PV0vv3sSNUmWJDcICxm8b5fYSAcT29-1rGDU55UxMqwQbqjF1wgLoBKFziA6lKul0XXt3EtWr-hoARvovruVRBA-SpMMWe_fiJbLtXTbyWIou6xyiCKnAeMYVayzMRRvoym9kMUvV1TSfahwtF7p-shRpUrKjIven4uoVBG8qAxoXcuS4jkJ-rrIqdy53RwlXC3FG1MkSh4a9DY13_n1cNBKZk0_7erV7O2OhtOmi1C6j)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=abb7dba555be4521a363662b4f994568&_e=Ja8g_EZ1Z-qgF67QwyHBMQDDmGa0pSvbUTnx_sDlrZ8gF-rHp1MyU-IwAeUufBiF0trMdkhxanU7AGR5S_5PV0vv3sSNUmWJDcICxm8b5fYSAcT29-1rGDU55UxMqwQbqjF1wgLoBKFziA6lKul0XSO67OSiWTbYUfMhnxZx_ALhN4pu5bCq55qbfA4XD9ygUPB2ARY-vQv1lL6QhBAMN55vmu3v1f3SI8SbNPZgkE53a2KZmbXVOi9_Hvx8n1lrkjHFTKZLGU2VC9IAGKw9oDvu5YtaJ7dTz6ZAeS1_4y7H1GZMk0Evs7cOhRmO0zVD)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=abb7dba555be4521a363662b4f994568&_e=Ja8g_EZ1Z-qgF67QwyHBMQDDmGa0pSvbUTnx_sDlrZ8gF-rHp1MyU-IwAeUufBiF0trMdkhxanU7AGR5S_5PV0vv3sSNUmWJDcICxm8b5fYSAcT29-1rGDU55UxMqwQbqjF1wgLoBKFziA6lKul0XdzcJyZHF7xr-Ud_L9-LM3EWWT1mw_MhMy0-FjWA5JGsY14ZWbnGGfwZc7CRgHzDQF8mZ3ouTK_4ljDnDkbLdBR4IXSMlHh0G1Hvayk1nEgroCm2Ia10c1aX-c-h5X5mB7e7jXPExVP8ikrOWvidQ80PmKrFUN_JhMCyWnXDo7Dp)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=abb7dba555be4521a363662b4f994568&_e=Ja8g_EZ1Z-qgF67QwyHBMQDDmGa0pSvbUTnx_sDlrZ8gF-rHp1MyU-IwAeUufBiF0trMdkhxanU7AGR5S_5PV0vv3sSNUmWJDcICxm8b5fYSAcT29-1rGDU55UxMqwQbqjF1wgLoBKFziA6lKul0XRTQxAdGvJ1MIwv1XMbPWOLabW3XPaVVmkdeGMPFBxZjb6F3z3IqPpoOvUC1cKjxl63PE0N45DkTF0BshgyeusTL8_4zsIgXRj_5j-86IVY_Q6n5qMUC3ZbAvopV3ohOLV6OFF3nlE_k3aWz9hpEl1g8vSLh9gKc4k6luGzCbsnm)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. clean_body: I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, The College Scam. | | | Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump. I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend, sorry for the early email, but I wanted to make sure this message was at the top of your inbox. Don't worry, I'll keep this brief:
**_> > First: In 2022, grassroots Democrats like you defied the odds. _**We not only defended every Democratic Senate seat up for reelection but we also expanded our majority, overcoming historic headwinds.
**_> > But then: Election experts started sounding the alarms again. _**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, the Cook Political Report and Inside Elections ALL say that Republicans have a clear path to retaking the Senate in 2024.
**_> > Now: All of us have a choice to make, friend:_** Do we sit on the sidelines, give up and let extremists destroy all the values and rights we care about? Or do we dig in our heels, strengthen our resolve and fight with everything we've got to defend our Senate majority?

clean_body: | | | = Friend, sorry for the early email, but I wanted to make sure this message was at the top of your inbox. Don't worry, I'll keep this brief: > First: In 2022, grassroots Democrats like you defied the odds. We not only defended every Democratic Senate seat up for reelection but we also expanded our majority, overcoming historic headwinds. > But then: Election experts started sounding the alarms again. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, the Cook Political Report and Inside Elections ALL say that Republicans have a clear path to retaking the Senate in 2024. > Now: All of us have a choice to make, friend: Do we sit on the sidelines, give up and let extremists destroy all the values and rights we care about? Or do we dig in our heels, strengthen our resolve and fight with everything we've got to defend our Senate majority? This is an easy one for me— I've never backed down from a tough fight, and that's not about to change now. But to win this battle, I need you with me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I am so grateful for your support today and every day. Thank you, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07115%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4yIcYabb9DhDK6DK3D1glw&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07116%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6plAd38qQi5E%2fkrRasaqDw&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07117%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cVDTMZ4yeZN77EBl14SUJg&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FdZnIqkVd5BH4OSpRAB30g&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07119%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v1o2ov4C6GlkD1MGQIxIfQ&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7036%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=z0rFSqPXEGbDqFlVza6ehA&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7036%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=z0rFSqPXEGbDqFlVza6ehA&sysid=1)
