That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.” Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62346377:6O0UeWGNO:m:1:3391001263:7517F7A645D597C00164148F29A02C35:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62346377:6O0UeWGNO:m:1:3391001263:7517F7A645D597C00164148F29A02C35:r)Dear Patriot,

[ **Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62346377:6O0UeWGNO:m:1:3391001263:7517F7A645D597C00164148F29A02C35:r)

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**What 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[ **Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62346377:6O0UeWGNO:m:1:3391001263:7517F7A645D597C00164148F29A02C35:r)

I can't do it without you.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

[ **Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. Whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62346377:6O0UeWGNO:m:1:3391001263:7517F7A645D597C00164148F29A02C35:r)

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9858942651ce409b931854d0e98e377a&_e=GHFVNcM6wFcrt3JRylRu_YnPxwd5RFnLVvOc0306TZwLTmPyuPBFxJAZmhW8on2AgLEua49Iw6MJGpfvgsKZMmY4a9vLPT8QvnWboNoTkv8TAyqfI01T7-1EQcQ1h-ogWe0_2ro5OtE-vUidH-r1CEw525dpXSrBV9hQ3MQH6oy2oczMlS6UsAFBg0fQAaCZztM3-Ybi3nhVj1DOP9iyvXtzgwERhpEjYXhQOv6DUTMwIUlKyn4hHmMjZyrQrLV2bvNs6Vt42jpyXVIk8hNx4t4Mi9bav6ej1TDmbwRXJoDQQxz-g5OBuDHT-Llk1Qvc)

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... name: Great America Update
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78948%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7eL%2bIgnGAiiC0n2zI%2f1Ysw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78949%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QRddsV6IgGI7JJQMipFysA&sysid=1)****[”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78940%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lOsu%2f3mrbQpv5VN99sx0GQ&sysid=1)[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78948%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7eL%2bIgnGAiiC0n2zI%2f1Ysw&sysid=1)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78941%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W1kl66Ly%2bnfjNzQt7APaOQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OAqaHgpTga3BVIbvBg4OHQ&sysid=1)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7699%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=qtC2GcK300bcMawaDa57eQ&sysid=1)_

---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f4f8b0c75e5b3b9c7e917f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63f43748171b50095139e681%26ss_email_id%3D63f4f8b0c75e5b3b9c7e917f%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2BToday%252C%2BPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot%2B8am-8pm%2521%2521%2521%2BRepeal%2BRank%2BChoice%2BVoting%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-21T17%253A01%253A05Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f43748171b50095139e681&l=en-US&s=Lk7_9LUjWnkV7esjSrntLFDpGl8%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f4f8b0c75e5b3b9c7e917f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f43748171b50095139e681&l=en-US&s=3PCm96FUvmcyoNCebt-lsz3CQ7s%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

[_ _ Please Sign Today on Our Website _ _](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f4f8b0c75e5b3b9c7e917f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63f43748171b50095139e681%26ss_email_id%3D63f4f8b0c75e5b3b9c7e917f%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2BToday%252C%2BPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot%2B8am-8pm%2521%2521%2521%2BRepeal%2BRank%2BChoice%2BVoting%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-21T17%253A01%253A05Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f43748171b50095139e681&l=en-US&s=cevFR07GOlmG1jdIQfOIoZrOMoM%3D)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Attaching your briefing materials here:
| SPECIAL ELECTION TODAY
---
| | | ** SPECIAL ELECTION TODAY

Briefing Materials for _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2dbdlp4adnlmb6eed0t7f29lijm128b3tgo83jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_**

---
|
Hello -

Today, voters will fill the last remaining vacancy in the U.S. House of Representatives.

That means Democrats will either chip away at our narrow House Majority, or Republicans will win a race no DC pundit thinks we can. The odds are stacked against us and the pressure is on!

_BUT...we 're not throwing in the towel. Are you? _

_**[Everyone is watching the results of this FIRST Special Election so we need a strong showing right here and right now. BEFORE POLLS CLOSE TONIGHT: we urgently need 10,000 Patriots to dig deep and help elect Republicans up and down the ballot in key races like this one.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgi1ldckn4dge1fudg6fg9tgruihjalen6vppgeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "Everyone is watching the results of this FIRST Special Election so we need a strong showing right here and right now. BEFORE POLLS CLOSE TOMORROW: we urgently need 10,000 Patriots to dig deep and help elect Republicans up and down the ballot in key races like this one.")**_

This is officially your last chance to help before the final votes are cast!

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6jf18ebted7hpv05nq2ggs3a4shjl178bcisng_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "EXPIRES 2/21 AT 7:00PM")
| | [Contribute $5 Before Polls Close](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zupkah01oeb3sr891e6a062v4phq7839ao8cg53g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "button")
---
| [Contribute $25 Before Polls Close](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z73l854g0hpsq4epl27v53s3g7gkmjfvesm6e8fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "button")
---
| [Contribute $50 Before Polls Close](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ahnsfg6vpcve2knlkt2l3rs5f10j50agm532h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "button")
---
| [Contribute $100 Before Polls Close](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zih2jrqkmhqbp7al80jlcvpmjsul8vtphjdr80qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g60ob2clh2bs "button")
---

I wrote this bill to protect patients by making hospitals clarify how much a [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ New Nonprofit Helps Boost DeSantis' National Profile A brand new nonprofit group is helping Ron DeSantis’ boost his national profile in yet another addition to the governors growing political apparatus. ##
Happy Tuesday! I hope you enjoyed celebrating Presidents' Day yesterday and are ready for our short work week!

I enjoyed celebrating my favorite
president,
President Donald J. Trump!

Did you have a chance to see my VERY interesting interview with General Michael Flynn? He said some things during our conversation that will surprise you! Watch it now:

---
Click on image of General Michael Flynn & Rachel to watch their conversation.
|
## Yesterday I interviewed Mike Cargile. Mike shared his views on how our country got into the mess it's in and how we can get out of it. Mike Cargile is currently running to replace Jessica Patterson as the chairman of the California Republican Party. I wholeheartedly endorse him for that position and will be voting for _him_ at convention March 12th. I hope to see you there! Watch my conversation with Mike here:

| [ ](https://RachelHamm.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2a4361c438b0f1b15ed7ec95&id=66b4048edf&e=5fa0631807)

Click on image of Mike & Rachel to watch their conversation.
|

He's a County Commissioner in New Mexico, and has really been put through the ringer at the hands of our Federal government. He also met president Trump in a very interesting and fun way! name: Mike Pompeo
subject: The name of my tank
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
i learned a lot inside my m1 tank...

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi94ouiqsoblsr90770vpfcj5u7a398s8cb24lng_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs)
---

I learned a lot inside my M1 tank.

As a young tanker in Germany during the Cold War, I learned to see that the only color that mattered was green.

And, above all, the only thing that mattered was if a soldier could do their job under the greatest of pressures in defending their country.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zev94evvrtos0t2ba2eonl4cn836dbue9ogjmg7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs)
---

These life lessons and self-evident truths are rejected by the Democratic Party. They see _EVERYTHING_ through the lenses of race and gender. Their goal is to divide the American people every chance they can get.

**This is wrong, regressive, and _downright un-American._**

---
| | [MAKE AMERICA PATRIOTIC AGAIN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcf8lakpnic5le90lm2ouk0l7ldgl58d13g4u2f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs)
---

Right now, the Democrats are turning our country into a socialist nightmare.

I don't want to see the America I fought for and love vanish, so I'm doing everything in my power to restore patriotism to America.

---
| | [MAKE AMERICA PATRIOTIC AGAIN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4t91vvn9hnvc690kdfrmstt3rauo0aijmgojfmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs)
---

If you feel like I do and want to see the patriotic America I grew up in restored, _**[please consider making a donation today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za9fkachfnuvkqdvmmf56r458jrmhuu852gtteq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs "please consider making a donation today.")**_

We are all Americans, created equal in the eyes of God, endowed with unalienable rights guaranteed to us by our creator. Let's make sure these principles remain in place.

Never Give An Inch,

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zci8gf13jmuhmomjhqp6hm1619sg0dmdsitd10c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs)
---

Mike Pompeo
---
| |
* * *

---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcu244kjn6fq3intn0ho9irk3m3rja68vsavrtt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs "Mike Pompeo Is Calling on All Conservatives to Join Him in Championing Our American Values")
---
| **A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**

Our God-given freedoms are under assault. That's why I created the Freedom Fund. To defend the freedoms and values that make America great against government overreach and the radical Left.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9i90keof9imqmc48slfi67m9c0h0dpp3gs1g6r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g68pb4c9h2bs "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.")**

body:

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
| | | You do NOT want to miss this, Fellow Conservative!

Nikki Haley kicked off her presidential campaign with a launch video that outlines her experience and her vision for America’s future.

_**[Make sure to watch and chip in to help make sure Nikki’s message reaches as many grassroots conservatives as possible!](http://trk.readactnews. "Make sure to watch and chip in to help make sure Nikki's message reaches as many grassroots conservatives as possible! >> PLAY HERE")**_

---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._h5A)
---
It’s time for a new generation of leadership and Nikki Haley needs your support now more than ever.

Your support is how we can save America and secure our country's future.

Thank you,

Team Haley
---
| | [WATCH THE VIDEO →](http://trk.readactnews.)
---

**GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH**
A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! **JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM**
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews. "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: With a 20-point advantage for Republicans on the presidential ticket, the GOP thinks they can take Jon Tester’s Senate seat in 2024. We think that Democrats appreciate his loyal support for working families and will help him build an unstoppable reelection campaign.
body:
Can they beat Tester?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95929462-5339-4053-a326-2b4346531059/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Losing Jon Tester’s seat in Montana, in 2024, means Democrats lose the Senate._ _2024 isn’t as far off as it seems. The campaign season is already underway._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1c0af38-692d-4bcb-ad0b-61759df93d4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta919a99f-ebe9-4df7-98e6-d538eeb886e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T959f715f-595a-4942-b2a8-40cda463a72e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te31a3c66-59a0-422a-bf92-33472fe79fb5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40a807d2-74bf-448f-b733-c3e854ce1ade/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jontester8-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Losing Jon Tester’s seat in Montana, in 2024, means Democrats lose the Senate. 2024 isn’t as far off as it seems. The campaign season is already underway. Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat. He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%. | | | | | | | | No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin. Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party. If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate. It's that simple. And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins. A disaster. Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory. subject: BREAKING: Biden releases top 9-11 terrorist, while innocent Americans are tortured
body:
Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.

Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0t989d4i9j0ubrbnl3ijvvi9eu093t82ravlgug_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g6cpr4sph2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbstm04ojpvunr8g2kb8cs1vschka3a4p7p9o5rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g6cpr4sph2bs)Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjq5l1mf35hfmtrsjsu3r5cq5lju99u7drbmcufo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g6cpr4sph2bs)

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[**Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1kgvsjvn5mktdmavuvqcjs588qlssipfp5v9aa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g6cpr4sph2bs)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

[**Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, even more ...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zarjs0akn4cr7l863pf71f9n3pvjjs9fs2dfa768_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g6cpr4sph2bs)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hi there – It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention. That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [] The backstory is this: GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through. Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [] Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[**Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjbg45bhl7i8ebtc7aoqc0iahdhq6o75nkifjf2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g66or7cdh2bs)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

[**Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, even more ...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts. **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6jo5pu31h79e49s7p1726t92qj5p3c91nnol9c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g66or7cdh2bs)

body:
Mary Miller is now VICE CHAIR of the House Committee on Education and the Workforce.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzJEcmWD0vRFwyhj7JGvyLj1oTDlMEMGz8hEn5wYguE=/XLAYc3l5pqC-TtPIQteX0w2u3TVZeZNmKhUskdMsrZs=?refcode=EM_FR_230221ViceMiller_MMU_90DO_5_NG_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Illinois' most extreme Congressional Representative, Mary Miller, has been appointed to serve as the Vice Chair of the House Committee on Education and the Workforce. Quite honestly, on a scale of 1 to 10, we are off the charts distressed on what this means to youths across the country.

**[Students in Illinois and across the country deserve better than what Mary Miller is planning on giving them. Our students deserve a _free_ , public education where every single student feels safe in their classroom. Donate $10 today to join our fight to protect the public education system from Mary Miller.](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzJEcmWD0vRFwyhj7JGvyLj1oTDlMEMGz8hEn5wYguE=/XLAYc3l5pqC-TtPIQteX0w2u3TVZeZNmKhUskdMsrZs=?refcode=EM_FR_230221ViceMiller_MMU_90DO_5_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzJEcmWD0vRFwyhj7JGvyLj1oTDlMEMGz8hEn5wYguE=/XLAYc3l5pqC-TtPIQteX0w2u3TVZeZNmKhUskdMsrZs=?refcode=EM_FR_230221ViceMiller_MMU_90DO_5_NG_B_B1&amount=10)
Here's a refresher on why Miller's appointment to a leadership role over our nation's education policy is so concerning:

1\. She wants to mandate the teaching of religion in public schools, claiming "We need to tell our kids, they were created by God, they have a gift, they have a purpose and bring that back into the public school as a foundation."

2\. Her family supports a far-right private religious school whose textbooks teach students "God regulated but did not forbid slavery" and instruct them to argue in favor of counting slaves as three-fifths of a person without giving them any rights.

3\. She was caught on camera approvingly quoting **Hitler** : "If we win a few elections, we're still going to be losing unless we win the hearts and minds of our children... Hitler was right on one thing. He said, 'Whoever has the youth has the future.'"

**[Fellow Democrats, Miller could not make her intentions any clearer. She is a danger to public education, our children, and our society. Will you donate $10 right now to help protect them by continuing our work to kick Miller out of Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/IzJEcmWD0vRFwyhj7JGvyLj1oTDlMEMGz8hEn5wYguE=/XLAYc3l5pqC-TtPIQteX0w2u3TVZeZNmKhUskdMsrZs=?refcode=EM_FR_230221ViceMiller_MMU_90DO_5_NG_B_L2&amount=10)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: I’m committed to giving 110%
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | Hey y'all, Tim Scott here. Whether I'm running on the treadmill at the gym or working in Washington for South Carolinians- I'm committed to giving 110% to get across the finish line.

Please join me in pushing to create opportunities for all Americans. _**[Any amount you can spare will be greatly appreciated!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347473:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r "Any amount you can spare, even if it’s just 5 bucks, will be greatly appreciated!")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347473:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r)
---

I am so blessed to have grown up with a praying mother, loving grandparents and mentors who poured into me. But not everyone who grew up in places like North Charleston, SC had those same blessings.

_**Our country is the land of opportunity, but those opportunities are not available to everyone everywhere.**_ Since my first day in Congress, I've been committed to doing everything I can to restore the American Dream for all Americans.

I have a humble request for you. Tonight is a critical deadline for Republicans. _**[I'm reaching out today to see if you can give a donation to help us stand up against the Left.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347473:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r "I’m reaching out today to see
if you can give just $5 to help us stand up against the Left.")**_

I don't take asking for money lightly, so trust me when I say I understand the sacrifice you make every time you're able to support me. I am so appreciative of any gift you can give.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347473:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r "Generic
Button")
---
God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347474:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _** ****
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347474:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r "Can I count on
you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**
** ******
---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347474:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---
1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407
[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347475:6tHo5WGON:m:1:3331421248:8B6E4E75CBD6A2A17F98B2B17790A445:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 9, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6tHo5WGON). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6tHo5WGON)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Feb. 21: Defend the First Amendment
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to defend the first amendment by blocking Biden’s FCC nominee, restore NewsMax on DirecTV, and support the House GOP in its investigations of the border crisis!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTItNWM2MDU4OTRjMWUwNGE1Yjk0MzYxNmY2Mjk5NGE2MzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL29wcG9zZS1naWdpLXNvaG4_bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/pYXxTQA2liXhkWc5mhkBvw)
---
The Left is targeting the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) in its latest attempt to silence conservative voices in the media. Biden has nominated Gigi Sohn, a far-left activist lawyer who has called Fox News “a threat to democracy”, and shared a tweet calling Donald Trump a “raggedy white supremacist.” Surely, such a partisan hack cannot be trusted to be the police chief of the airwaves... **[Urge your US Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTItNWM2MDU4OTRjMWUwNGE1Yjk0MzYxNmY2Mjk5NGE2MzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL29wcG9zZS1naWdpLXNvaG4_bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/QRyoRoeLKAvwCCqWio-4Zg) to REJECT Gigi Sohn for the FCC!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTItNWM2MDU4OTRjMWUwNGE1Yjk0MzYxNmY2Mjk5NGE2MzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL29wcG9zZS1naWdpLXNvaG4_bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ACW9JTwSr7CH5wKtaFLiUg)
---
|
---
| | Biden [seems to believe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-LbWtzmcCg) that grocery prices are finally coming down, but that is far from the truth. Just since December, the [price](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) of eggs has risen by 8.5%. Since this time last year, the price of cereal has risen 15.6% and the cost of margarine increased by 44.7%. Food is far from the only category suffering the effects of record-breaking inflation rates. In January alone, the cost of motor vehicle repair [jumped](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._W2t-Idg) 2.7% while American households, after months of skyrocketing energy prices, found no relief and paid 1.8% more on energy bills that month. Biden, however, has [done little](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Hiw) to ease the financial strain on families struggling to make ends meet by repeatedly canceling domestic oil and gas projects that could both increase U.S. energy independence and lower costs for everyone.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-zMGJLSlT39vvzvkGgZT3w)
---
One of America’s last options for conservative news has been canceled. While DirecTV found no issue renewing the contracts of MSNBC, CNN, NBC, and countless other left-wing networks, Newsmax has found itself without a home. Media freedom is crucial to exercising our First Amendment rights. **[Contact the executives](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) at DirecTV and demand that Newsmax be restored!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-hJPLD2nMI8sg)
---
|
---
| | Not only do lawmakers want to ban gas stoves in new buildings, they want to [eliminate](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/hroovYUgNJDgnZHLfFolWg) any possibility of natural gas usage in American homes. To achieve this goal, state legislators are embedding language into local energy codes to "mitigate the impact of climate change," something New York City lawmakers recently did to promote "clean energy" and "efficiency standards for appliances." In fact, New York relied on their new energy statute to effectively ban gas hookups in new buildings in December, a drastic action that could increase costs for consumers. It should come as no surprise, then, that in June 2021, U.S. Secretary of Energy Jennifer Granholm held a [meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-NffDGw) with the CEO of the Rocky Mountain Institute, an organization committed to banning gas stoves in new buildings, according to watchdog group Americans for Public Trust. To help stop bureaucratic energy overreach, consider signing the [Hands Off Our Stoves](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTItNWM2MDU4OTRjMWUwNGE1Yjk0MzYxNmY2Mjk5NGE2MzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50aGVwYXRyaW90Y2VudGVyLm9yZy9oYW5kcy1vZmYtb3VyLXN0b3Zlcy8_bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/uQQhb8O7tOOL0PaDYT02fQ) petition today.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/B1UKBciVFvueWcV7HZSQPw)
---
Is there any better indication that you don’t care about America’s safety than appointing Kamala Harris as your border czar? It’s clear Biden has never cared whether our border is secure. But House Republicans are holding historic hearings to hold him accountable. **[Sign your name to this petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/OlJtRnnDda7pdzOjQnOqrA) to URGE CONGRESS to keep up the pressure!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/N4lgylGjriqOmAC5Uh2ZFg)
---
|
---
| | Americans [have had enough](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/jawVpSs8x-VLzQjZZRFY4A) of Biden's lax border policies that are now costing them their health. [Sixty-three percent](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._mTbdPmOj2rAvZDMWvS5A) of Americans are dissatisfied with current immigration levels, according to a recent Gallup survey, the highest level of dissatisfaction since the Obama Era. A mere 4% of the Right, 7% of independents and 12% of the Left support Biden's open border policies. Approximately 6 million migrants, [including 1.2 million "gotaways,"](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._XE9G_JKTOw) have crossed the southern border since Biden took office, according to Customs and Border Protection. And now, many Americans are being forced to [delay their medical treatment](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-01YXDIXR0zw) at the Yuma Regional Medical Center, the only hospital within 60 miles of the southern border, because a migrant surge is overwhelming the facility. To make matters worse, the 406-bed hospital has racked up more than $20 million in unpaid medical expenses.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-y2l-S8pH4pCktQ)
---
Our efforts to SAVE the gas stove are working! Two U.S. Senators have floated a bill to stop the federal government from banning or fixing the cost of gas stoves. [**Please sign our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to secure safeguards against any bans!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Ww)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNTItNWM2MDU4OTRjMWUwNGE1Yjk0MzYxNmY2Mjk5NGE2MzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/plRBsffetQuZnXF-tGi3DA)
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbf7vjs9gb5cho0c5lllgd3b5rncraldm6m7laa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g61pb4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuh6gek4bj1q2akulr76gmtg3lrb7gqklnomn610_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g61pb4chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4bi64ioa9289je7qhru79d03ldgk3p57p64vi80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1g61pb4chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

| | Thank you for joining my list of supporters, friend! I proudly serve as a U.S. Representative for Minnesota's 1st District, and speaking to new followers and voters is extremely important to me. I count on your constant feedback to be the best representative I can be. I am here to represent Minnesotans, protect farmers, uphold constitutional rights, and lead using my faith in God, family, and freedom.
---
| | _**Connect with me:**_ Take a couple of minutes to check out my social channels and follow me to ensure you get the latest and greatest updates from my campaign. Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I look forward to doing whatever it takes to stand up for Minnesotans and Americans during this tumultuous time living under the reign of Joe Biden and his left-wing cohorts.

Last year, Democrats defended our Senate majority and flipped red seats all across America this year -- including one right here in Pennsylvania.

We're doing our part to help incumbents and challengers prepare to do it again next year, but with dark-money groups lining up to dump millions into Republican coffers, we need to know that YOU are with us.

As we prepare our plan for next year, Bob wants to hear what's on your mind.

[**Can you take one minute to answer a few questions about the 2024 election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59031738/392988883/-526268034?ms=em23_230221_survey_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em23_230221_survey_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em23_230221_survey_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230221_survey_esrv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xk9btXNuksKJ58pGezk+QuI0gfx4yqc1MGvq6t4dViJBQMbijrkl1egIngVMx1DJ4U0XcTW594pxp8jq2WKy+d9troMGhL+6AboE/zFC1xaWFJ/b3GzLyhVtp6KL7g6fNaLTTgrdzKM1AShxW47YED6eSTQtVW40esOHCrBCZogWQgjZdvUB0xf1DiR6ScbU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWY5YTg4NC1mOGIxLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VAX23r6sIWaK135lfUyA4gzvOHgsj0q2iu-2XuGos88=&emci=337e8104-07af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=05f9a884-f8b1-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=8943725)

body:
In life, and in a political campaign, it’s always good to know who you can count on most when times are tough.
#

Peter -
In life, and in a political campaign, it’s always good to know who you can count on most when times are tough.
Since Ruben launched his campaign, more than 50,000 people have contributed. They’ve given in donations of all sizes. And it means the world to Ruben.
You may not believe that, but for someone who grew up poor all of these donations of all sizes is quite humbling.
But now Ruben needs you. And we’ve created a special link for you to track the source of the donations we receive today. Here’s yours, Peter.
[**GALLEGOFORARIZONA.COM/dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230221-1-15&t=1&akid=409%2E734936%2EdYNMXX)
Thanks again, Peter. We’ll be checking the link all day.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

[PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT HERE >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORN7WJsCDfOiZ7xb_e8Y8zXTyJK0HTg0ZT5W9N3tliInSM3vssrkR411wUaRzJbqqgyqel_x0vdXj8SQEfapMhHMEwwi-LTS4VE-HxKN5j2YheH1qmMmOOK_6g4b2u8dUHmjj5VZuHCeoA9QWOWjDXLZuG-xIugNEwf_YP7kA-VZ54qM5anmWeIe5fKNEQcxpSEFdJGrU4Dl76-mO4wE6Q==&c=hfAlqYLNBWE1YjR3gnRIKqMqRcPx0MGgd_LdoTErgGQzFr5F97TP0A==&ch=mETp9uz5BMZyv0fA3c5PklN_Nht37WmhNIq1xILIGNyCbb1FM1ogWg==)
| I'll explain more in just a minute, Peter.
But first, I have a question for you:
Why exactly are we so focused on a country that just had to round up dozens of senior officials for "overt corruption??"
The answer just might be as simple as, shall we say, The Hunter Biden Life Motto:
"A Grifter's Gotta Grift!"
I hold a different view - that the interests of our countrymen are more important than the bottom line of defense contractors.
And if you agree Peter, then I hope you'll join me immediately. [Because the Managed Decline of America is only going to CONTINUE so long as we're sending endless blank checks to the same corrupt country where The Biden Crime Family made MILLION$! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ORN7WJsCDfOiZ7xb_e8Y8zXTyJK0HTg0ZT5W9N3tliInSM3vssrkR411wUaRzJbqqgyqel_x0vdXj8SQEfapMhHMEwwi-LTS4VE-HxKN5j2YheH1qmMmOOK_6g4b2u8dUHmjj5VZuHCeoA9QWOWjDXLZuG-xIugNEwf_YP7kA-VZ54qM5anmWeIe5fKNEQcxpSEFdJGrU4Dl76-mO4wE6Q==&c=hfAlqYLNBWE1YjR3gnRIKqMqRcPx0MGgd_LdoTErgGQzFr5F97TP0A==&ch=mETp9uz5BMZyv0fA3c5PklN_Nht37WmhNIq1xILIGNyCbb1FM1ogWg==)

* We will fail to respond to other threats like Communist China
* We will have to keep on recklessly printing money faster than Zimbabwe

clean_body: | | | | This weak Commander-In-Chief still hasn't taken the hint... Peter, when our Southern Border is in crisis, Joe Biden goes home to nap in Delaware. When Ohio burns with toxic chemicals, his administration says everything is fine. So on Presidents' Day yesterday, I'm not surprised that Biden chose to ditch the American people for Ukraine... He's been ditching America's interests since the start of his presidency! THEY CAN KEEP HIM! Help Me Stop this War. Put AMERICA FIRST! -> == That's right, Peter - the Big Guy is only CONTINUING the Ukraine grift, and with it, the Managed Decline of America. It's why we must build more support for my push to finally END this war... Let's cut off the gravy train and put THE AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST!! Will you join me and help me send that message to this addled President who has abandoned us for a corrupt country thousands of miles away? Click the secure link below: Join Me Here -> == | Thanks for your help on this, -Matt Gaetz Sent from my iPhone. \-----Begin forwarded message----- Subject: END THE FUNDING. END THE WAR. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com From: Gaetz, Matt (R-FL) <mailto:campaign@mattgaetz.com> Date: Monday, February 13 2023 at 7:11 PM | Peter, There comes a time when we must have the courage to say enough is enough... Peter, I introduced an official resolution in the House of Representatives calling for a peace agreement and AN END TO ALL U.S. MILITARY AND FINANCIAL AID FOR THE WAR IN UKRAINE! | | UKRAINE WAR ENTENTE - JOIN THIS EFFORT! END THE WAR! "Whereas the Biden Administration has cared more about Ukraine's border than our own; and whereas this conflict is only pushing us closer to World War III; I, Peter, will support the effort to END the War in Ukraine as a Citizen Co-Sponsor!" == | I'll explain more in just a minute, Peter. But first, I have a question for you: Why exactly are we so focused on a country that just had to round up dozens of senior officials for "overt corruption??" The answer just might be as simple as, shall we say, The Hunter Biden Life Motto: "A Grifter's Gotta Grift!" I hold a different view - that the interests of our countrymen are more important than the bottom line of defense contractors. And if you agree Peter, then I hope you'll join me immediately. == Take a look: | == | Someone had to speak out against this, Peter. And I'm proud to join President Trump in doing so. Because THIS is what will happen should we blindly keep propping up the Ukraine grift: We will deplete our own supplies and hurt our readiness We will fail to respond to other threats like Communist China We will have to keep on recklessly printing money faster than Zimbabwe And we will sleepwalk our way into a nuclear war with Russia - something that will END HUMANITY AS WE KNOW IT! | | == | | == | For all these reasons and more, I'm putting my foot down and officially calling for an end to this war. But [FIRST NAME], the Military Industrial Complex that holds sway in the Swamp, will make me Public Enemy #1 for doing this. They will spare no expense to come after me for exposing the Ukraine grift. And I need to know that you'll have my back now that I'm taking them head-on. Our country, our planet, and millions of lives are on the line... == Send in anything you can to support this effort for an immediate end to the war in Ukraine. | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thanks for standing with me on this, | == | Matt Gaetz (R-FL) | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. body:
Please, update your membership before midnight!
| | | **Thousands of Democrats activated their Memberships last year, driving us to victory. Now, we need you to activate yours and join the team that's fighting for our Senate majority!**

**SUGGESTED GIFT: $5**

**[ACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP](https://go.dscc.org/go/11833?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230221-ActivateYourMembership-JointheTeam-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230221-ActivateYourMembership-JointheTeam-Pros-sl1&akid=9879%2E9716520%2E20_7eM)**
---

**Friend -- Together this grassroots team _made history_ in the 2022 midterm elections and expanded our _razor-thin_ Senate majority!** And with Republicans openly threatening to overturn elections for Trump, winning last year was _essential_.

But now we need to do it again. By activating your Democratic Membership, you'll help President Biden and Senate Democrats lay the foundation for _another_ history-making victory in 2024.

**So please -- before our midnight deadline, join the team that's fighting for reproductive rights, voting rights, and working families across the country.**

**[Activate your Membership today so we can defend President Biden's Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11833?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230221-ActivateYourMembership-JointheTeam-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230221-ActivateYourMembership-JointheTeam-Pros-sl1&akid=9879%2E9716520%2E20_7eM)**

name: Club for Growth Action
subject: We spearheaded the defeat of Liz Cheney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We played an instrumental role in getting rid of Liz Cheney from Congress and replacing her with...

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrt3lptn8c22pttmtpkunqge4nq9ed9b8norapvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i68ob4cdh2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend,

Have you heard of Club for Growth Action? **We played an instrumental role in ousting Liz Cheney from Congress and replacing her with proven conservative Harriet Hageman. ** Thanks to our activists and donors, Club for Growth Action launched an aggressive campaign against Cheney. We ran TV and digital ads that exposed her for what she was - a fake conservative - to ensure voters knew about her record.
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm09tcdt8sfhrhgq0ffq7p7sp9694nhj4shs1v10_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i68ob4cdh2bs)

Club for Growth Action carefully vets our candidates and runs data-driven campaigns that help our endorsed candidates defeat the Woke Left. That's why Club for Growth Action candidates like Harriet Hageman are making a difference in Congress. And with your support, we know we can help transform Congress into a machine that works for America. Friend, we're humbly asking for your support to rid Congress of more Cheney-type RINO Republicans and replace them with conservatives you can trust. And we're _already_ gearing up for the 2024 primaries in battleground states like **_Arizona_** ,**_Indiana_** , **_Ohio_** , and **_West Virginia_**. **[_Will you trust us by rushing a grassroots donation of your choice?_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbh4m82nqjhj3sfppt14nkjuc4k29lo5g61po2qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i68ob4cdh2bs)**

Democrat-run states across the U.S. are drafting new "red flag" gun laws, which will give the federal government power to confiscate firearms from anyone they deem a "threat."

Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: BREAKING SUPREME COURT NEWS (via Team Scalise)
subject: Adam Schiff unveils plot to PACK THE SUPREME COURT with Liberals!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Drop whatever you’re doing:

| |
---
| | | DROP WHATEVER YOU’RE DOING!

**Adam Schiff just unveiled a plot to PACK THE COURT with Liberal activists!**

_**[Our Conservative Supreme Court Majority hangs in the balance so we'll cut to the chase: Majority Leader Steve Scalise is PLEADING with every Patriot in America to help save the Supreme Court at this critical moment in our history.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07265%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yNd0XjpJCg%2fA4a0OPpzjCQ&sysid=1 "Our Conservative Supreme Court Majority
hangs in the balance so we'll cut to the chase: Majority Leader Steve Scalise is
PLEADING with every Patriot in America to help save the Supreme Court at this
critical moment in our history.")**_

Everything Conservatives believe in is at stake in this fight: Election integrity, religious liberty, our Pro-Life movement, and our Second Amendment rights are all on the chopping block if we fail to save our Conservative Majority right here and right now.

_Will you hold the line, or will you let Adam Schiff and the Liberals PACK the Supreme Court?_

---
| | | [STOP ADAM SCHIFF: SAVE THE SUPREME COURT](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07266%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UbPuiUdvpBUTJefXM1i7UA&sysid=1 "button")
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07267%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=owmZV9iMZCHnf5Mdg3vaFw&sysid=1 "timer")
---

Liberals control the Senate AND White House... if they take control of the Supreme Court too, we’re DOOMED.

The future of America is at stake. That’s why we're asking for your help ONE LAST TIME before it's too late:

_**[PLEASE: Will you step up to save the Supreme Court and stop Adam Schiff? This is urgent!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07268%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2PqvHeA8hC6pd4EQzk3%2fZg&sysid=1 "Will you step up to save the Supreme Court
and stop Adam Schiff?")**_

For America,

SUPREME COURT ALERT
Sent via Team Scalise

---
* * *
---

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, today is the day. Our first chance to show the GOP that we’re ready to take back the House Majority. Our chance to elect the first Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress. Our first chance to make Kevin McCarthy’s majority even smaller. Our first chance to power a true progressive Black champion to victory in 2023. TODAY IS THE DAY WE DO IT ALL, PETER, AND WE CAN’T AFFORD TO WASTE A SINGLE SECOND. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The stakes have truly never been higher than they are right now, and we need every single one of you to step up to the plate. Winning this one seat could make a HUGE difference in passing critical legislation like protecting voting rights and codifying Roe. And we really can’t afford to let another House seat fall into the hands of Kevin McCarthy and the rest of the GOP... If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | –The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Fellow Conservative,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

name: Doug White
subject: We have more than hope, we have a plan!
body:
Spanish translation by Jake Kunkel, thank you | This will be the last newsletter sent from this address. Future newsletters will be sent my
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/11OPnqNuN/c?w=v2xFiKGVXQ9N9aO74IA-Akn6noLgRY4xfXjwGR8boP4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzExT1BucU51Tj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
