---
| | We have more than hope,we have a plan!
---
| | Spanish translation by Jake Kunkel, thank you
---
| | This will be the last newsletter sent from this address. Future newsletters will be sent my www.RuralAmericansUnited.com.
---
| |
---
| | We are in a crisis, but we have a plan, and that makes all the difference.
As I travel up and down my district I am hearing sounds of exasperation from democrats that never thought they would ever have to say the words; “I am going to endorse a republican”.
How has rural America gotten to the point where democrats must vote for a republican, the least worst republican in most of their views. Like most things it is not just one thing, but like most things once the motion starts it becomes a self fulfilling prophecy. Not any more! There are so many passionate hard working democrats fighting everyday to give democracy a safe haven in rural America, but there must be a plan and there must be help.
What we know:

* There are more registered democrats then there are republicans in WA CD4
* It is difficult to get event attendance even for Senator Patty Murray
* Some labor unions are not endorsing democrats because an increasing number of members want to endorse republicans
* Democratic organizations are stating that they will tacitly or explicitly endorse a republican candidate
* Indigenous Tribes are endorsing and financially supporting republican candidates
* Latino organizations stating that they will endorse a republican candidate if that moves their agenda forward
* During the last election local people were sending their money ($25) across the country to fund 100’s of million dollar battleground races
* Senator Murray lost by a larger margin in Eastern Washington than in the previous election
* The latino vote is shifting republican
* Core democrats are fewer, doing more work and aging
* Rural communities the republican message is all that is heard

We have reached a point where too many believe that rural American democrats are not salvageable and after a point it becomes a self fulfilling prophecy to which becomes self reinforcing to all but the steadfast. The republicans rejoice in this as they know that without a democratic voice they can fuel the flames of hate, division and misinformation. But no more.
To coin an old movie quote “there is nothing so permanent as a solution” and I believe that rural Americans will save this nation. There is nothing so terrifying to an opponent as a person with a plan. We have the foundation of a strategy and it is solid. I want to reiterate my gratitude to all that willingly shared their wisdom, experience and knowledge for it was from this the strategy was shaped. I look forward to sharing more with all of you in the very near future.
---
| Estamos en una crisis, pero tenemos un plan y eso marca la diferencia absoluta. Mientras viajo por todas partes de mi distrito, voy oyendo sonidos de exasperación de Demócratas que jamás pensaron que tendrían que decir las palabras; “Voy a respaldar a un Republicano”. ¿Cómo ha llegado la América rural al punto en que los Demócratas deben votar por un Republicano, el “menos peor” Republicano desde sus puntos de vista? Como la mayoría de las cosas, no es solo una cosa, pero como la mayoría de las cosas, una vez que comienza el movimiento, se convierte en una profecía que acarrea su propio cumplimiento. ¡Ya no, no más! Tenemos tantos Demócratas apasionados y trabajadores que luchan todos los días para brindarle a la democracia un refugio seguro en las zonas rurales de Estados Unidos, pero hay que tener un plan y tener ayuda.Lo que sabemos:

* Hay más Demócratas registrados que Republicanos en WA CD4
* Es difícil obtener asistencia al evento, incluso para la senadora Patty Murray.
* Algunos sindicatos no respaldan a los Demócratas porque un número cada vez mayor de miembros quieren respaldar a los Republicanos.
* Las organizaciones demócratas afirman que respaldarán tácita o explícitamente a un candidato Republicano
* Las tribus indígenas respaldan y apoyan financieramente a los candidatos Republicanos
* Organizaciones latinas que dicen que respaldarán a un candidato Republicano si eso hace avanzar su agenda
* Durante las últimas elecciones, la gente local estaba enviando su dinero ($25) a todo el país para financiar cientos de carreras millonarias en locales disputados.
* La Senadora Murray perdió por un margen mayor en el este de Washington que en las elecciones anteriores.
* El voto latino se está desplazando hacia los Republicanos
* Los Demócratas centrales son menos, y cada año se van envejeciendo, trabajando más con menos apoyo
* El mensaje Republicano es lo único que se escucha por comunidades rurales

Hemos llegado a un punto en el que muchos creen que los Demócratas estadounidenses rurales no son salvables y, después de un punto, se convierte en una profecía autocumplida que se refuerza a sí misma para todos menos los más resueltos. Los republicanos se regocijan en esto porque saben que sin una voz democrática pueden alimentar las llamas del odio, de la división y de la desinformación. Pero no más.
Para acuñar una cita de película antigua, "No hay nada tan permanente como una solución", y creo que los estadounidenses rurales salvarán a este país. No hay nada más aterrador para un oponente que una persona con un plan. Tenemos la base de una estrategia y es sólida. Quiero reiterar mi agradecimiento a todos quienes, de buena gana, compartieron su sabiduría, experiencia y conocimiento ya que de ahí se formó la estrategia. Espero poder compartir más con todos ustedes en un futuro muy cercano.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Republicanos y educación Asistí al Club de Mujeres Republicanas de Yakima el otro día. El tema fue la educación y la oradora fue Sharon Hanek [http://www.sharonhanek.com/ ](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/11OPnqNuN/c?w=0uR1iPDx_EJRdPpQCIrMQ3to9SVhVpjsC5QSGTl2plk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zaGFyb25oYW5lay5jb20vIiwiciI6IjE1N2ZkZTUxLTE0ZWYtNGZjMi03NmZkLWI4MDYxOWM0MDkwNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9). La gente a menudo me pregunta por qué asisto a tantos eventos republicanos y mi respuesta es doble. Si no fuera a los eventos republicanos, no iría a muchos lugares, y son mis vecinos. Debemos hablar con nuestros vecinos. Era importante para mí asistir a esta reunión y recomendarla a otros demócratas. Salí con una mejor comprensión del “por qué” de la agenda educativa republicana y eso me ayudó a entender el qué de la agenda y cómo se van a implementar. A un alto nivel parece razonable; volver a nada más aparte de la lectura, escritura, y aritmética. El mensaje era devolver la enseñanza a un blanco y negro; impartir conocimientos. Pero a partir de aquí, el mensaje oscureció. Tal como lo entendí yo, el motivo detrás de esto fue eliminar la diversidad, la inclusión y la equidad (DIE en el inglés – su acrónimo, no el mío) del aula. También querían volver a lo que Dios quería. La Sra. Hanek afirmó que enseñar las cosas en blanco y negro es el camino de Dios y cualquier variación conduce a personas como la Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez/AOC. La Sra. Hanek se refiere específicamente a la respuesta de una prueba de un alumno de cuarto grado como un ejemplo de desviarse de la manera de enseñar de Dios y dejar que cualquiera piense lo que quiera:
Pregunta: Tienes 10 limones y cada limón produce 1,5 onzas de jugo. Si se necesitan 16 onzas de jugo para hacer limonada, ¿tienes suficiente jugo?
Respuesta: 10 x 1,5 = 15 y eso es menos de 16 oz que necesito. Pero a veces los limones son más grandes o tienen más jugo. Así que puede ser posible hacer limonada.Personalmente, pensé que esta era una respuesta extraordinaria. La mayoría de nosotros no aprendemos que el mundo real no se parece en nada a un ejemplo de libro de texto hasta años después de la graduación y aquí este estudiante de cuarto grado sabía cómo hacer las matemáticas y pudo resolver problemas en un escenario del mundo real. Pero según la Sra. Hanek, este era claramente el camino a la perdición.
Si observa cómo la Sra. Hanek presentó su modelo y examinó por qué es malo, se vuelve más claro por qué están tan en contra de teoría critica de la raza (CRT), la comunidad LGBTQ+ o cualquier cosa que se aventure por los criterios estrictos. De su punto de vista, incluso hasta enseñar a un niño a pensar más allá de los resultados más estrictos en blanco y negro conduce ... al mal y a la destrucción de los valores estadounidenses.
---
| Republicans and education I attended the Yakima Republican Women’s Club the other day. The topic was education and the speaker was Sharon Hanek [http://www.sharonhanek.com/](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/11OPnqNuN/c?w=LLiRYJfMIkKk20qCtyD5jCB34QyqSwWsH26F4rCGGMw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zaGFyb25oYW5lay5jb20vIiwiciI6IjljYTY4YmY0LWQwYTMtNDE1Zi1jYWFmLWJmN2MzYjU3ODIyNyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9). People often ask me why I attend so many republican events and my answer is two fold. If I did not go to republican events I wouldn’t go many places and they are my neighbors. We must talk to our neighbors. This meeting was important for me to attend and recommended to other democrats. I walked away with a better understanding about the why of the republican education agenda and that helped me understand the what of the agenda and the how they are going to implement. At a high level it seems reasonable; return to the three Rs. The message was to return teaching to a black and white; impart knowledge. But from here it got dark. As I understood it the motive behind this was to remove diversity, inclusion and equity (DIE) from the classroom. Their acronym, not mine. They also wanted to return to what God intended. Ms. Hanek stated that teaching things as black and white is God's way and any variation leads to people like AOC. Ms. Hanek specifically reference a test answer from a 4th grader as an example of straying from God’s way of teaching and letting anyone just think whatever they want:
Question: You have 10 lemons and each lemon yields 1.5 oz of juice. If it takes 16 oz of juice to make lemonade, do you have enough juice?
Answer: 10 x 1.5 = 15 and that is less than 16 oz needed. But sometimes lemons are bigger or they have more juice. So it may be possible to make lemonade.
I personally thought this an extraordinary answer. Most of us don’t learn that the real world is nothing like a textbook example until years after graduation and here this 4th grader knew how to do the math and was able to problem solve a real world scenario. But according to Ms. Hanek this was clearly the road to perdition.
If you look at how Ms. Hanek presented her model and examined why it is bad. It becomes clearer why they are so against CRT, LGBTQ or anything that ventures from the most narrowest of paths. Even teaching a child how to think beyond the strictest black and white outcomes leads to . . . evil and destruction of American values.
---
| |
---
| | GRIT and WAY Gang Reduction and Intervention task force and Walk about Yakima. GRIT is a program in Yakima and Kittitas counties to keep kids from joining gangs and for kids in gangs and pathway out. WAY is the method they use; just walk around and talk. The talk with kids is a program that is in ongoing development with the University of Washington. They use a dialectic and cognitive approach to engage. It only takes 3 days for a kid on the street to be inextricably locked into gangs. This is made even more troubling because there are no juvenile overnight shelters. Insurance, risk and other factors have made it difficult to open juvenile shelters. Rod’s House in Yakima is about to break ground on the first. Go Rod’s House!

---
| GRIT y WAY
GRIT (en ingles, Gang Reduction and Intervention Task Force, el grupo de trabajo de intervención y reducción de pandillas y WAY (en ingles, Walk About Yakima, o Caminata por Yakima). GRIT es un programa en los condados de Yakima y Kittitas para evitar que los niños se unan a las pandillas y para que los niños de las pandillas se vayan. WAY es el método que utilizan; simplemente caminar y hablar. Este “Talk With Wids” (hablar con los niños) es un programa que está en desarrollo continuo con la Universidad de Washington. Utilizan un enfoque dialéctico y cognitivo para participar. Solo se necesitan 3 días para que un niño en la calle quede inextricablemente atrapado en pandillas. Esto se hace aún más preocupante porque no hay refugios nocturnos para menores. Los seguros, el riesgo y otros factores han dificultado la apertura de albergues juveniles. Rod's House (Casa De Rod) en Yakima está a punto de comenzar la primera construcción. ¡Vamos Rod’s House!
---
| | Our team is Galen Greenwalt, Skye White and Doug White. We are keeping busy, our ear to the ground, and exploring ways to increase the visibility and voice of rural America starting with Central Washington. We support each and every one of you with all our heart and passion.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I spoke with Dee Drewry, the state president of the Washington Federation of Republican Women, about guns during a recent lunch. Dee shared a compelling story about the 8-week long concealed carry permit training she took in Arizona, which required realistic simulations to prove the ability to handle specific situations. In Washington, however, there were virtually no restrictions on concealed carry permits. We discussed the importance of responsible gun ownership and the need for education, rather than just focusing on ownership and access. Education and our constitution should form the base of our strategy to make progress on gun control and prevent daily senseless killings.
---
| | |
---

Like most things it is not just one thing, but like most things once the motion starts it becomes a self fulfilling prophecy. Not any more! There are so many passionate hard working democrats fighting everyday to give democracy a safe haven in rural America, but there must be a plan and there must be help. What we know: There are more registered democrats then there are republicans in WA CD4 It is difficult to get event attendance even for Senator Patty Murray Some labor unions are not endorsing democrats because an increasing number of members want to endorse republicans Democratic organizations are stating that they will tacitly or explicitly endorse a republican candidate Indigenous Tribes are endorsing and financially supporting republican candidates Latino organizations stating that they will endorse a republican candidate if that moves their agenda forward During the last election local people were sending their money ($25) across the country to fund 100’s of million dollar battleground races Senator Murray lost by a larger margin in Eastern Washington than in the previous election The latino vote is shifting republican Core democrats are fewer, doing more work and aging Rural communities the republican message is all that is heard We have reached a point where too many believe that rural American democrats are not salvageable and after a point it becomes a self fulfilling prophecy to which becomes self reinforcing to all but the steadfast. The republicans rejoice in this as they know that without a democratic voice they can fuel the flames of hate, division and misinformation. But no more. To coin an old movie quote “there is nothing so permanent as a solution” and I believe that rural Americans will save this nation. There is nothing so terrifying to an opponent as a person with a plan. We have the foundation of a strategy and it is solid. I want to reiterate my gratitude to all that willingly shared their wisdom, experience and knowledge for it was from this the strategy was shaped. I look forward to sharing more with all of you in the very near future. | Estamos en una crisis, pero tenemos un plan y eso marca la diferencia absoluta. Mientras viajo por todas partes de mi distrito, voy oyendo sonidos de exasperación de Demócratas que jamás pensaron que tendrían que decir las palabras; “Voy a respaldar a un Republicano”. ¿Cómo ha llegado la América rural al punto en que los Demócratas deben votar por un Republicano, el “menos peor” Republicano desde sus puntos de vista? Como la mayoría de las cosas, no es solo una cosa, pero como la mayoría de las cosas, una vez que comienza el movimiento, se convierte en una profecía que acarrea su propio cumplimiento. ¡Ya no, no más! Tenemos tantos Demócratas apasionados y trabajadores que luchan todos los días para brindarle a la democracia un refugio seguro en las zonas rurales de Estados Unidos, pero hay que tener un plan y tener ayuda.Lo que sabemos: Hay más Demócratas registrados que Republicanos en WA CD4 Es difícil obtener asistencia al evento, incluso para la senadora Patty Murray. Algunos sindicatos no respaldan a los Demócratas porque un número cada vez mayor de miembros quieren respaldar a los Republicanos. Las organizaciones demócratas afirman que respaldarán tácita o explícitamente a un candidato Republicano Las tribus indígenas respaldan y apoyan financieramente a los candidatos Republicanos Organizaciones latinas que dicen que respaldarán a un candidato Republicano si eso hace avanzar su agenda Durante las últimas elecciones, la gente local estaba enviando su dinero ($25) a todo el país para financiar cientos de carreras millonarias en locales disputados. La Senadora Murray perdió por un margen mayor en el este de Washington que en las elecciones anteriores. El voto latino se está desplazando hacia los Republicanos Los Demócratas centrales son menos, y cada año se van envejeciendo, trabajando más con menos apoyo El mensaje Republicano es lo único que se escucha por comunidades rurales Hemos llegado a un punto en el que muchos creen que los Demócratas estadounidenses rurales no son salvables y, después de un punto, se convierte en una profecía autocumplida que se refuerza a sí misma para todos menos los más resueltos. Los republicanos se regocijan en esto porque saben que sin una voz democrática pueden alimentar las llamas del odio, de la división y de la desinformación. Pero no más. Para acuñar una cita de película antigua, "No hay nada tan permanente como una solución", y creo que los estadounidenses rurales salvarán a este país. No hay nada más aterrador para un oponente que una persona con un plan. Tenemos la base de una estrategia y es sólida. Quiero reiterar mi agradecimiento a todos quienes, de buena gana, compartieron su sabiduría, experiencia y conocimiento ya que de ahí se formó la estrategia. Espero poder compartir más con todos ustedes en un futuro muy cercano. | | | | | | | Republicanos y educación Asistí al Club de Mujeres Republicanas de Yakima el otro día. El tema fue la educación y la oradora fue Sharon Hanek . La gente a menudo me pregunta por qué asisto a tantos eventos republicanos y mi respuesta es doble. Si no fuera a los eventos republicanos, no iría a muchos lugares, y son mis vecinos. Debemos hablar con nuestros vecinos. Era importante para mí asistir a esta reunión y recomendarla a otros demócratas. Salí con una mejor comprensión del “por qué” de la agenda educativa republicana y eso me ayudó a entender el qué de la agenda y cómo se van a implementar. A un alto nivel parece razonable; volver a nada más aparte de la lectura, escritura, y aritmética. El mensaje era devolver la enseñanza a un blanco y negro; impartir conocimientos. Pero a partir de aquí, el mensaje oscureció. Tal como lo entendí yo, el motivo detrás de esto fue eliminar la diversidad, la inclusión y la equidad (DIE en el inglés – su acrónimo, no el mío) del aula. También querían volver a lo que Dios quería. La Sra. Hanek afirmó que enseñar las cosas en blanco y negro es el camino de Dios y cualquier variación conduce a personas como la Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez/AOC. La Sra. Hanek se refiere específicamente a la respuesta de una prueba de un alumno de cuarto grado como un ejemplo de desviarse de la manera de enseñar de Dios y dejar que cualquiera piense lo que quiera: Pregunta: Tienes 10 limones y cada limón produce 1,5 onzas de jugo. Si se necesitan 16 onzas de jugo para hacer limonada, ¿tienes suficiente jugo? Respuesta: 10 x 1,5 = 15 y eso es menos de 16 oz que necesito. Pero a veces los limones son más grandes o tienen más jugo. Así que puede ser posible hacer limonada.Personalmente, pensé que esta era una respuesta extraordinaria. La mayoría de nosotros no aprendemos que el mundo real no se parece en nada a un ejemplo de libro de texto hasta años después de la graduación y aquí este estudiante de cuarto grado sabía cómo hacer las matemáticas y pudo resolver problemas en un escenario del mundo real. Pero según la Sra. Hanek, este era claramente el camino a la perdición. Si observa cómo la Sra. Hanek presentó su modelo y examinó por qué es malo, se vuelve más claro por qué están tan en contra de teoría critica de la raza (CRT), la comunidad LGBTQ+ o cualquier cosa que se aventure por los criterios estrictos. De su punto de vista, incluso hasta enseñar a un niño a pensar más allá de los resultados más estrictos en blanco y negro conduce ... al mal y a la destrucción de los valores estadounidenses. | Republicans and education I attended the Yakima Republican Women’s Club the other day. The topic was education and the speaker was Sharon Hanek . People often ask me why I attend so many republican events and my answer is two fold. If I did not go to republican events I wouldn’t go many places and they are my neighbors. We must talk to our neighbors. This meeting was important for me to attend and recommended to other democrats. I walked away with a better understanding about the why of the republican education agenda and that helped me understand the what of the agenda and the how they are going to implement. At a high level it seems reasonable; return to the three Rs. The message was to return teaching to a black and white; impart knowledge. But from here it got dark. As I understood it the motive behind this was to remove diversity, inclusion and equity (DIE) from the classroom. Their acronym, not mine. They also wanted to return to what God intended. Ms. Hanek stated that teaching things as black and white is God's way and any variation leads to people like AOC. Ms. Hanek specifically reference a test answer from a 4th grader as an example of straying from God’s way of teaching and letting anyone just think whatever they want: Question: You have 10 lemons and each lemon yields 1.5 oz of juice. If it takes 16 oz of juice to make lemonade, do you have enough juice? Answer: 10 x 1.5 = 15 and that is less than 16 oz needed. But sometimes lemons are bigger or they have more juice. So it may be possible to make lemonade. I personally thought this an extraordinary answer. Most of us don’t learn that the real world is nothing like a textbook example until years after graduation and here this 4th grader knew how to do the math and was able to problem solve a real world scenario. But according to Ms. Hanek this was clearly the road to perdition. If you look at how Ms. Hanek presented her model and examined why it is bad. It becomes clearer why they are so against CRT, LGBTQ or anything that ventures from the most narrowest of paths. Even teaching a child how to think beyond the strictest black and white outcomes leads to . . . evil and destruction of American values. | | | | GRIT and WAY Gang Reduction and Intervention task force and Walk about Yakima. GRIT is a program in Yakima and Kittitas counties to keep kids from joining gangs and for kids in gangs and pathway out. WAY is the method they use; just walk around and talk. The talk with kids is a program that is in ongoing development with the University of Washington. They use a dialectic and cognitive approach to engage. It only takes 3 days for a kid on the street to be inextricably locked into gangs. This is made even more troubling because there are no juvenile overnight shelters. Insurance, risk and other factors have made it difficult to open juvenile shelters. Rod’s House in Yakima is about to break ground on the first. Go Rod’s House! | GRIT y WAY GRIT (en ingles, Gang Reduction and Intervention Task Force, el grupo de trabajo de intervención y reducción de pandillas y WAY (en ingles, Walk About Yakima, o Caminata por Yakima). GRIT es un programa en los condados de Yakima y Kittitas para evitar que los niños se unan a las pandillas y para que los niños de las pandillas se vayan. WAY es el método que utilizan; simplemente caminar y hablar. Este “Talk With Wids” (hablar con los niños) es un programa que está en desarrollo continuo con la Universidad de Washington. Utilizan un enfoque dialéctico y cognitivo para participar. Solo se necesitan 3 días para que un niño en la calle quede inextricablemente atrapado en pandillas. Esto se hace aún más preocupante porque no hay refugios nocturnos para menores. Los seguros, el riesgo y otros factores han dificultado la apertura de albergues juveniles. Rod's House (Casa De Rod) en Yakima está a punto de comenzar la primera construcción. ¡Vamos Rod’s House! | | Our team is Galen Greenwalt, Skye White and Doug White. We are keeping busy, our ear to the ground, and exploring ways to increase the visibility and voice of rural America starting with Central Washington. We support each and every one of you with all our heart and passion. | | | | | | | I spoke with Dee Drewry, the state president of the Washington Federation of Republican Women, about guns during a recent lunch. Dee shared a compelling story about the 8-week long concealed carry permit training she took in Arizona, which required realistic simulations to prove the ability to handle specific situations. In Washington, however, there were virtually no restrictions on concealed carry permits. We discussed the importance of responsible gun ownership and the need for education, rather than just focusing on ownership and access. Education and our constitution should form the base of our strategy to make progress on gun control and prevent daily senseless killings. | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

| | 🚨 ELECTION DAY COUNTDOWN 🚨: 7️⃣ days !!️
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59035854/393004647/-258323618?sourceid=1048653&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIzNGIxNS0wMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hrV8VwVPZj6tYzAS1WlOCCHv2QFCxiTN2pupnU-e1Cs=&emci=3505de0e-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=4e234b15-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934) **One week, Peter.**

Mayor**Lori Lightfoot**(Chicago) is in the final stretch of her reelection campaign, and this crowded race is as close as they come.

Having spent the entirety of her first term delivering on her promise to millions of Chicagoans during a global pandemic, Lori knows what it takes to get the job done for her constituents. Chicago deserves strong leadership and Lori is prepared to continue the work she's started, but polls have her _neck-and-neck_ with her opponents. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59035855/393004648/-258323618?sourceid=1048653&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIzNGIxNS0wMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hrV8VwVPZj6tYzAS1WlOCCHv2QFCxiTN2pupnU-e1Cs=&emci=3505de0e-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=4e234b15-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)
****[In a race this close, every show of support in these final days makes a huge difference, Peter. Donate now to elect& reelect Democratic pro-choice mayors like Lori as soon as Feb. 28.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59035862/393004655/-792107398?sourceid=1048653&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIzNGIxNS0wMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hrV8VwVPZj6tYzAS1WlOCCHv2QFCxiTN2pupnU-e1Cs=&emci=3505de0e-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=4e234b15-01b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)****
Lori hit the ground running when she took office in 2019, and made Chicago a safe haven for those seeking abortion. Lori's commitment to her city and millions of constituents has never wavered.

Needless to say, Lori's steady leadership has been _essential_ to the health of communities across Chicago these last four years — and the Windy City needs a tenacious Democratic pro-choice woman like her in office. ****So it's time we kick things into high gear. Donate now to support powerful Democratic pro-choice women like Lori who are committed to protecting families and choice at *every* level of office:****

clean_body: | | | 🚨 ELECTION DAY COUNTDOWN 🚨: 7️⃣ days !!️ One week, Peter. MayorLori Lightfoot(Chicago) is in the final stretch of her reelection campaign, and this crowded race is as close as they come. Having spent the entirety of her first term delivering on her promise to millions of Chicagoans during a global pandemic, Lori knows what it takes to get the job done for her constituents. Chicago deserves strong leadership and Lori is prepared to continue the work she's started, but polls have her neck-and-neck with her opponents. ** Lori hit the ground running when she took office in 2019, and made Chicago a safe haven for those seeking abortion. Lori's commitment to her city and millions of constituents has never wavered. Needless to say, Lori's steady leadership has been essential to the health of communities across Chicago these last four years — and the Windy City needs a tenacious Democratic pro-choice woman like her in office. So it's time we kick things into high gear. We all know that the Florida governor recently banned the teaching of AP African American Studies, but folks, desperate to not be outdone, Glenn Youngkin has hopped on the bandwagon. He’s told his Education Secretary to “investigate” the course and potentially** _ban_** it in Virginia public schools. name: Greg Landsman
subject: Why Social Security and Medicare are on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Social Security and Medicare are vital and we can’t let them be undermined. But that’s exactly what MAGA Republicans are trying to do.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59036314/393006511/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.21_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI2MjVlOS0wMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoizF2QIzE81bfjSZg7UxkdqK0q9wCzbJu8G7z8bYIE=)

Friend,

When I’m going around the district talking to folks about the issues that matter to them, one thing always comes up: Protecting Social Security and Medicare.

_Social Security and Medicare are vital and we can’t let them be undermined._

**But that’s exactly what MAGA Republicans are trying to do.** Far-right Republicans want to CUT Social Security and Medicare, and they’re willing to hold our economy hostage until they get what they want.

[**This chaos and extremism has to stop. Can I count on you to donate to help us stay in the fight to defend Social Security and Medicare?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59036315/393006512/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.21_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI2MjVlOS0wMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoizF2QIzE81bfjSZg7UxkdqK0q9wCzbJu8G7z8bYIE=)

---

I will always protect Social Security and Medicare and will _**never**_ allow Republicans to gut these vital programs. Because I made a commitment to our seniors, and I will never compromise that commitment.

We have a lot of work to do, but I’m up for the challenge. And I need your help.

[**Is there any amount you can donate to help us stay in this fight to defend critical programs like Social Security and Medicare?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59036317/393006514/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.21_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI2MjVlOS0wMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoizF2QIzE81bfjSZg7UxkdqK0q9wCzbJu8G7z8bYIE=)

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq414qj3g4hgbuaum8oke02454vius41btdmdi2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6cor0sth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhmv1vs2kj8rtp2mlov2t32k6saqkhrhdkil7e40_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6cor0sth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zspqe84np7heps21tnuqavvuujsetartaknr83fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6cor0sth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zft5k5pbppqkmd3jnq01qvrts4mffk7r5i6hn3j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6cor0sth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Add your name (Left Action)
subject: WTF? Kevin McCarthy secretly gave Tucker Carlson access to Capitol attack surveillance footage
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | **[Demand Kevin McCarthy Stop Giving Tucker Carlson Secret Exclusive Access to Capitol Attack Videos](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ac1e1e1-45de-42bb-8301-9ca5a5125312/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86a06698-895a-43ea-8f73-4b09410ca887/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [**Are you kidding me?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb1e704a-c140-43f7-ba8f-c67658f1f4b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_" In a bizarre development, Axios is now reporting that House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, who owes his speakership to deals struck with House Republican allies of the Jan. 6 coup attempt, has given "exclusive access" to "41,000 hours" of U.S. Capitol surveillance footage from that day to ... Fox News' Tucker Carlson and his producers." ([Source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50f5ac1f-697e-4a2f-8670-98d7cf80e15c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_

[**There is absolutely NO reason that conspiracy fluffer Tucker Carlson should be given exclusive access to these videos -- especially _in secret_. They should either be kept private, or released to everyone.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T043659ca-faee-4865-b453-3b61eb7475e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

But leaking them to Carlson alone gives him the opportunity to take bits and pieces and make up wild lies to go with them. Even Tucker himself [doesn't believe his own BS](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2211209d-faab-4be0-a5b9-c26bae007439/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), so how dare McCarthy give him the chance to dump even more crap on his already enormous pile.

[**Add your name: Demand Kevin McCarthy Stop Giving Tucker Carlson Secret Exclusive Access to Capitol Attack Videos.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27d008c3-e76a-4cb1-bae3-618b56751e32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74f2a5ff5b7f4a45bcddbe8a001ef172&_e=280wbsji7dh9MgtMM06c1qWGYsWiB9XOBn6MXK7rk6_ERW94P5NalSxcQaxgbpdVHx1fCcvSvRGGTiEPYVqfciOmEUbXKZywH5x3zKi6EawDj43kJrvVyKnPPczJPbUxfewPaDU2OLH2HRG9bVAlJZ88Z1giMuEm6bNP8IYxxOE7fdPio3PpWC3LQdocc3w3nVcs4gtg5MKxnbNatqblmpYk4pqW_nAXjOb2AO6noBWtL2zSB7wueXLgNljpb2FaSiTCGzysE0x96zE3uzZfD1gS4E2MvLkgFNR-qErWZZgYS8QQgG_Ms0LMvCQLGodRHANvD8V4vovhy0HimNzzuLP1viVN5-tMykslGN29gCG__H0XktYXZztosek_0aiN)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74f2a5ff5b7f4a45bcddbe8a001ef172&_e=280wbsji7dh9MgtMM06c1qWGYsWiB9XOBn6MXK7rk6_ERW94P5NalSxcQaxgbpdVHx1fCcvSvRGGTiEPYVqfciOmEUbXKZywH5x3zKi6EawDj43kJrvVyKnPPczJPbUxfewPaDU2OLH2HRG9bVAlJZ88Z1giMuEm6bNP8IYxxOE7fdPio3PpWC3LQdocc3w3nVcs4gtg5MKxnbNatqblmpYk4pqW_nAXjOb2AO6noBVy8Xvu4611mciE003mqlHYWVlr0yfAuceRTO001hDlwQUSj5FJDn-pFM-0exGb3Zo-GCXsGha6BXIjAJjGWGX5J-gRcSJhHInAGRaGkMPIGl_Ykr5Asrrvy4bWQb87gmfd3sCc9t1HTn_VBwMhcmVa)****["](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74f2a5ff5b7f4a45bcddbe8a001ef172&_e=280wbsji7dh9MgtMM06c1qWGYsWiB9XOBn6MXK7rk6_ERW94P5NalSxcQaxgbpdVHx1fCcvSvRGGTiEPYVqfciOmEUbXKZywH5x3zKi6EawDj43kJrvVyKnPPczJPbUxfewPaDU2OLH2HRG9bVAlJZ88Z1giMuEm6bNP8IYxxOE7fdPio3PpWC3LQdocc3w3nVcs4gtg5MKxnbNatqblmpYk4pqW_nAXjOb2AO6noBWtIUrWEg4KyeyiNcwO16NWzuT2hZGLWi3LQscfTSY1EqTZi5nhtmmSnH9zgFv0Uoi1x1KTsNYxbj3pNjit79fQX8lX6yNmUz-yUOOcz0bk5pUs8wFO5PtlQ4wquZVM0POOiBu2X7gkXBFHEq2TaRgE) --is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74f2a5ff5b7f4a45bcddbe8a001ef172&_e=280wbsji7dh9MgtMM06c1qWGYsWiB9XOBn6MXK7rk6_ERW94P5NalSxcQaxgbpdVHx1fCcvSvRGGTiEPYVqfciOmEUbXKZywH5x3zKi6EawDj43kJrvVyKnPPczJPbUxfewPaDU2OLH2HRG9bVAlJZ88Z1giMuEm6bNP8IYxxOE7fdPio3PpWC3LQdocc3w3nVcs4gtg5MKxnbNatqblmpYk4pqW_nAXjOb2AO6noBUMHNDyP-duUHrczuemQOhgyI7XoILLgH2EXwR-_NfeytxE565KBmsdjGFVQP-a8yJkkGfwMNrBBJ0dufYT7LYa8fqZWbdpa7tMAdpqSQN4f-3Qq1bnuyf2ktzGEUWy7jsrKmVQVBOHhLIiqlxA6FiF)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74f2a5ff5b7f4a45bcddbe8a001ef172&_e=280wbsji7dh9MgtMM06c1qWGYsWiB9XOBn6MXK7rk6_ERW94P5NalSxcQaxgbpdVHx1fCcvSvRGGTiEPYVqfciOmEUbXKZywH5x3zKi6EawDj43kJrvVyKnPPczJPbUxfewPaDU2OLH2HRG9bVAlJZ88Z1giMuEm6bNP8IYxxOE7fdPio3PpWC3LQdocc3w3nVcs4gtg5MKxnbNatqblmpYk4pqW_nAXjOb2AO6noBW6eXMrphBZxYSGp1zDSEmphW_mofZslpJP3B-t0rwE-yF4i-3R99WcVv3s0JGirJ_UMoiRme1Q3_tV8VlLlA3bcLph8DniV8m6NZSVKPCq_FcBY6qFu5eGcyhnFeUG4DQu2NFL6AHv7qkDH30roYPZ)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Among other things, the GOP bills Democrats blocked this session would:
* _Institute mandatory voter ID_
* _Repeal the permanent absentee voter list_
* _Limit voter registration_
* _Decrease early voting from 45 to 7 days_
* _Revoke drop-off absentee voting_

name: Freedom Watch
subject: BREAKING: Biden releases top 9-11 terrorist, while innocent Americans are tortured
body:
Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.

Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdis9ahr0husjn4vq4s3tgppbtp679uose5rj9mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6apj0s3h2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbgmb6a6dcdprnuev916m10tupsoou1ftiun3lk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6apj0s3h2bs)Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z02uq9huamn9nkc5s8e6ccstbk1ee5b2e8r9sksg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6apj0s3h2bs)

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 TERRORIST from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for al-Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! **

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either won't flush or repeatedly explode in cells
* Stuck in cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for over a year and a half...up to two years...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

As you know, I'm fighting to free the January 6 Peaceful Protesters through two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions.

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[**Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you 've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch. **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgeckiuui8lil50kg6t58s23vgke2rqepefg36eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6apj0s3h2bs)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden just let a top 9-11 terrorist out of prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ... while peaceful, innocent Americans are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. ** These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!

[**Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, even more ...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts. **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ru9sfoqst9i11cu3g6hq5e58q4g3732em8bm2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c1i6apj0s3h2bs)

body:

| Friend,
---
**Today is the day.**

The two candidates moving forward in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election will be decided by voters like YOU.

_And with just hours left until the polls close, we have one last chance to try to ensure a conservative win today._

_That’s why we are reaching out one final time to ask for your help in getting conservatives out to vote to help us win this critical election._

We are just ONE day away from this year’s most important election, the Wisconsin Supreme Court race.

**_We can’t let that happen._**

clean_body: Help ensure every last conservative casts their vote | Friend, Today is the day. The two candidates moving forward in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election will be decided by voters like YOU. And with just hours left until the polls close, we have one last chance to try to ensure a conservative win today. That’s why we are reaching out one final time to ask for your help in getting conservatives out to vote to help us win this critical election. Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wisconsin Republicans Date: Sat, Feb 18, 2023 Subject: Just a few days left... To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We are just ONE day away from this year’s most important election, the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. And with it being a nonpartisan primary, we run the risk of having two liberal candidates advancing, and ultimately taking over the 4-3 majority. We can’t let that happen. We have to ensure that conservative voter turnout exceeds the Left so we can hold onto our 4-3 majority on the Supreme Court to defend Wisconsin against the Democrats' radical agenda. The future of Wisconsin is at stake in this election. If a liberal wins, then they will attack decisions made by the conservative court over the years such as common sense voter ID laws and fair congressional maps. And a lot of those decisions could make or break a Republican Presidential win in 2024. With Wisconsin being the top battleground state that will decide who becomes President, it’s critical that we keep these decisions and safeguards in place to secure a Republican win. But we can’t do that if we fail to hold onto the 4-3 conservative majority on our Supreme Court. That’s why we have to reach as many conservative voters as possible to ensure they show up to vote and help us win. Thank you, Wisconsin Republicans Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. body:
The Hill has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.
#
Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Senator Durbin’s.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59038395/393014014/-690545788?refcode=dd_em_230221_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDMyZmUzMi0wOGIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0nQE4wD2Rv0muA6vy40-hV7qdaPItnCnHeIGx7d60Nk=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now.
Wisconsin’s last elections have been decided by the slimmest of margins.
As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.
So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.**
So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.
We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game _(we’ve done it before!)_ but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking:
**[Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Senator Durbin’s? I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Tammy Baldwin and Dick Durbin: = = = = = = = Thank you so much for your continued support. I know it’s early to be thinking about 2024, but in a race as competitive as this one will be, early investments will make all the difference. — Tammy ** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Jane PAC
subject: We are at a tipping point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We cannot sit back and watch as our planet spirals out of control.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59059417/393062988/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230221-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZDc3Y2VhLTMzYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kzuv3LivrYBVz0wZycvZcF6xZqIP4JC1gMmm6izAN2k=)
---
| | | **Current rates of warming will put the Earth at risk of crossing "dangerous" climate tipping points**

_\- BBC_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59059418/393062989/931979156?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230221-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyZDc3Y2VhLTMzYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kzuv3LivrYBVz0wZycvZcF6xZqIP4JC1gMmm6izAN2k=)

A new analysis shows that at the current rate of climate change, our planet is _**at risk of crossing six climate tipping points.**_ These dangerous tipping points include the collapse of ice sheets and dying coral reefs.

name: Team Sherrod
subject: Do you remember what happened in 2012?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Last year’s Senate race in Ohio was the most expensive yet, shattering spending records. (It was as expensive as the previous three Ohio Senate races combined!)
Guess what -- our race next year is expected to be even more expensive .
February is a short month, which means we have less time to raise the money needed to reach our next fundraising goal. Any amount you can contribute helps us prepare for the expensive race ahead of us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230221?refcode=sbe230221_b]
The biggest contributing factor to the record-breaking spending in Ohio last year was special-interest groups.
Of the nearly $200 million spent in Ohio’s Senate race, over half of it came from outside groups. A Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC spent $32 million alone.
Is it really any surprise though?
Back in 2012, Sherrod was called the “hunted Democrat” because special-interest groups spent $40 million in an attempt to buy Ohio’s Senate seat. That was over a decade ago and a lot by 2012 standards.
We know 2024 is going to be even more expensive, but with the support of people like you, we can make sure we enter 2024 in the strongest position possible.
We can do this again, but we’re counting on you to get involved. That’s how we’ve won in the past. Please chip in any amount you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230221?refcode=sbe230221_b]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

“Joe Biden and the ‘Defund the Police’ Democrats have turned our once great cities into cesspools of bloodshed and crime,” President Trump said.

_**President Trump’s Plan to Keep American Communities Safe**_

1\. President Trump will sign a record investment in hiring, retention, and training for police officers. The bill will increase vital liability protections for America’s law enforcement officers.

2\. President Trump will require local law enforcement agencies receiving DOJ grants to return to proven policing measures such as stop-and-frisk, strictly enforcing existing gun laws, cracking down on the open use of illegal drugs, and cooperating with ICE to arrest and deport criminal aliens.

3\. President Trump will take on the radical Marxist prosecutors who have abolished cash bail and refuse to charge criminals. President Trump will direct the DOJ to open civil rights investigations into radical leftist prosecutor’s officers, such as those in Chicago, Los Angeles, and San Francisco to determine whether they have illegally engaged in race-based law enforcement.

4\. President Trump will instruct the Department of Justice to dismantle every gang, street crew, and drug network in America. President Trump has also called for the death penalty for drug dealers and human traffickers.

5\. President Trump has committed to deploying federal assets, including the National Guard, to restore law and order when local law enforcement refuses to act.

6\. President Trump will order the Education and Justice Departments to overhaul federal standards on disciplining minors.

7\. Finally, President Trump will sign concealed carry reciprocity legislation, fully secure the border, dramatically increase interior enforcement, and wage war on the cartels.

_**Transcript:**_

Joe Biden and the ‘Defund the Police’ Democrats have turned our once great cities into cesspools of bloodshed and crime. There's never been anything like it. Here's my plan to restore law and order in our cities and throughout our country, frankly.

First, because police forces have been gutted by Democrats’ war on police, I will sign a record investment in hiring, retention and training for police officers nationwide. So important.

This bill will also increase vital liability protections for officers because the Democrats want to take those protections away from our police, because we want them to do their jobs, and we want them to do their jobs right. You can't take their protections away if you're going to have them do their jobs properly.

Second, to qualify for this new funding and all other Justice Department grants, I will insist that local jurisdictions return to proven common sense policing measures, such as stop and frisk— very simple—you stop them and you frisk them, strictly enforcing existing gun laws against convicted felons, cracking down on the open use of illegal drugs, and cooperating with ICE to get criminal aliens off our streets and get them out of our country.

Third, we will go after the radical Marxist prosecutors who are abolishing cash bail, refusing to charge crimes, and surrendering our cities to violent criminals. They have surrendered like never before. I will direct the DOJ to open civil rights investigations into radical left prosecutor’s offices, such as those in Chicago, L.A., and San Francisco to determine whether they have illegally engaged in race-based enforcement of the law.

I will also work with Congress to give the victims of their Marxist policies the right to sue local officials for harm and suffering, and it has been great that they have caused. If your small business is pillaged because shoplifting goes unpunished, if you're brutally attacked by a violent felon released without bail or bond, then you will be entitled to massive damages.

Fourth, I will order the Department of Justice or as some people call it the ‘Department of injustice’ right now and Homeland Security to dismantle every gang, street crew, and drug network in America. Every single one of them will be dismantled.

We already know where these turf wars and drug dens are. We know who the people are. And we're going to charge them and charge the culprits with every crime that we can find. We're going to be fair, but we're going to be tough. We also need the death penalty for drug dealers, so important. And I'd also add to that human traffickers. Drug dealers and human traffickers. They get the death penalty, watch it stop and stop quickly.

Fifth, in cities where there has been a complete breakdown of law and order, where the fundamental rights of our citizens are being intolerably violated, I will not hesitate to send in federal assets including the National Guard until safety is restored.

If Nancy Pelosi would have accepted our National Guard or our soldiers, you wouldn't have had January 6, but she and the mayor of D.C. didn't do that.

Sixth, we will end the leftist takeover of school discipline and juvenile justice. Many of these carjackers and criminals are 13, 14, and 15 years old. I will order the Education and Justice Departments to overhaul federal standards on disciplining minors. So, when troubled youth are out of control, they're out on the streets and they're going wild, we will stop it. The consequences are swift, certain and strong and they will know that.

Seventh, they will protect the right of self-defense everywhere it is under siege. And I will sign concealed carry reciprocity. Your Second Amendment does not end at the state line. In addition, I will of course fully secure the border, dramatically increase interior enforcement, and wage war on the cartels.

We have never had a border so secure as it was just two years ago. And now our border is the worst anywhere in the world, and possibly of all time. There’s never been a country that allowed to happen what's happening in the United States right now, where millions of people are pouring across our borders. They come from mental institutions. They come from the prisons. They’re all being led out so they can come into the United States. They’re poisoning our country.

We will also take back our streets from the homeless, the drug addicted, and the mentally ill. I will discuss those plans in much more detail very soon. That is how I will bring back public safety to America. I want to thank you. We're going to Make America Great Again and we're going to Make America Safe Again. Thank you.

Donald J. Trump February 20th, 2023
Today, President Donald J. Trump announced his senior campaign staff in Iowa, approximately one year before Republicans cast their vote in the First-in-the-Nation Caucuses.

President Trump has always looked out for the men and women of Iowa who have been consistently left behind by not only Democrats, but by the RINO establishment. President Trump protected Iowa Ethanol. He approved E15 for use all year round and authorized its use in gas pumps nationwide. He negotiated America First trade deals that opened new markets for Iowa farmers and ranchers in Japan, the European Union, and South Korea, and surged exports with the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement. To protect generations of Iowa farmers and business owners, President Trump virtually eliminated the unfair estate tax and enacted record tax cuts for the middle class.

Hard-working Iowans know that under Joe Biden’s failed leadership, it is more difficult to provide for their families and secure their future.

Since he announced his campaign to return to the White House, President Trump has laid out a bold agenda to rebuild the economy, deliver border security, restore safety to every American community, and end the cycle of corruption in Washington.

**Marshall Moreau** , State Director. Moreau will lead an unrivaled caucus organization throughout Iowa’s 99 counties. Most recently, Moreau successfully managed the campaign of Iowa Attorney General Brenna Bird, who defeated the longest-serving Attorney General in American history. Moreau has led national, state, and local political operations and has extensive experience in grassroots organizing.

**Iowa House Representative Bobby Kaufmann** , Senior Advisor. First elected to the Iowa House of Representatives in 2012, Kaufmann serves as the Chairman of the Ways and Means Committee. Kaufmann has been a part of Iowa Republican politics from an early age, clerking in the Legislature, working on local and statewide campaigns, and previously serving as the Chairman of the Iowa Federation of College Republicans. In addition to his service in the State House, Kaufmann is a small business owner and livestock farmer in Cedar County, Iowa.

**Eric Branstad** , Senior Advisor. Branstad successfully led President Trump’s 2016 and 2020 campaigns in Iowa and is the son of former Governor and U.S. Ambassador Terry Branstad. He served as Senior Advisor at the Department of Commerce during President Trump’s Administration, and has successfully managed political and issue advocacy campaigns across Iowa and the nation.

**Alex Latcham** , Early States Director. Latcham will oversee the campaign’s political operations in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada. A graduate of Drake University in Des Moines, Latcham previously worked at the Republican Party of Iowa, and planned the state’s 2016 caucuses. Latcham served in The White House Political Office, where he was Deputy White House Political Director for the final two years.

“As Democrats destroy decades of tradition, we must always protect Iowa’s First-in-the-Nation Caucuses,” President Trump said. “I’m the one who did it this time and you will always be first with me. It was my great honor to get $28 billion for our farmers, as China took advantage of them for years. And don’t forget the USMCA, replacement to the horrible NAFTA. With this incredible team of skilled professionals and their deep ties to Iowa, we will earn a dominant victory in the caucuses next year.”

---
|
Hello -

Today, voters will fill the last remaining vacancy in the U.S. House of Representatives.

That means Democrats will either chip away at our narrow House Majority, or Republicans will win a race no DC pundit thinks we can. The odds are stacked against us and the pressure is on!

name: Giffords PAC
subject: Five reasons. Five dollars.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today, we’d like to give you five reasons why your $5 contribution to Giffords PAC is so important
#

Friends -
Today, we’d like to give you five reasons why your $5 contribution to Giffords PAC is so important:
1. Unfortunately, the United States has higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world. We’re just two months into the year, and our nation has already experienced over 70 mass shootings. This is a devastating statistic, but it’s only the tip of the iceberg. We’re working towards a future where this is no longer the reality. But we need your help to fuel this work.

2. The gun lobby is losing influence. This month, it was reported that the NRA has lost over 1.2 million members since its 2019 corruption scandal. Membership now stands at 4.3 million people—the lowest it’s been since 2012. People are fed up with the NRA’s corruption. With your support, we can continue to build our Gun Owners for Safety program and provide an alternative for responsible gun owners.

3. Two important pieces of legislation to help us pass universal background checks—the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2023 and the Background Checks Expansion Act—have been introduced in the U.S. House and Senate. This is legislation we’ve been fighting for since our founding. But with a narrowly divided Senate and a Republican majority in the House, getting this legislation passed will take a lot of support. That support starts with you.

4. This year, we’re commemorating ten years of Giffords. Over the past decade, we’ve been able to help pass 525 gun safety laws nationwide. With your help, we can pass hundreds more in the years to come.

5. Quite frankly, we’re pacing behind our fundraising goals for the month of February. Every single deadline is an important opportunity for us to show our community’s strength in numbers, and we can’t miss important goals like these. With the month ending in just one week, we need a surge of support to help us get on track to meet our goals.

There are so many more reasons why your contribution is so crucial to our success. We hope that these five have convinced you that your donation today would mean a lot to us.
[**So please, will you chip in $5 or any amount you can to Giffords PAC today? Do it to help us work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230221-1-15&t=1&akid=4287%2E3935704%2EOTMZhC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-feb23.DP5oYT&refcode=em230221-1-15&t=3&akid=4287%2E3935704%2EOTMZhC)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
This is the moment our people-powered campaign has prepared for
| **I can’t believe today’s the big day... Election Day is here!**

I’ve got a jam-packed schedule today in the final moments of this special election — but I wanted to reach out one more time to personally tell you how grateful I am for your support.

This is the moment our people-powered campaign has prepared for, so we can’t slow down now. **We have 6 more hours to reach EVERY VA-04 voter before polls close, so I’m counting on top supporters like you to get us across the finish line.**

[**Friend, will you split $10 between our campaign and Voter Protection Project toward our _FINAL_ fundraising deadline? The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6436%2E878179%2EiqjRj5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6436%2E878179%2EiqjRj5).**

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Re: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347530:JjGr0WGaN:m:1:3331421248:7A97FE523C20D8B5FE61B3DB40968A5D:r)
---

Kevin's first month in office confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347530:JjGr0WGaN:m:1:3331421248:7A97FE523C20D8B5FE61B3DB40968A5D:r "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347530:JjGr0WGaN:m:1:3331421248:7A97FE523C20D8B5FE61B3DB40968A5D:r)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62347530:JjGr0WGaN:m:1:3331421248:7A97FE523C20D8B5FE61B3DB40968A5D:r)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

---

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people. | | Kevin's first month in office confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: he 's THE politician America desperately needs at this pivotal moment in history. He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists. Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval "here." Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him every step of the way. | | | | Thank you for your time, Newt Gingrich | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Re: Trump’s anti-trans policy proposals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends,
Recently, Donald Trump posted a video detailing a score of anti-trans policies he’s pledging to put into place if he wins in 2024. I’m not going to share it, because frankly, it’s traumatizing. But I do want to respond.
As the sister of a trans brother and a gender-nonconforming sibling, let me tell you: Gender-affirming care is NOT abuse.
Trump’s new proposals go further than ignorant and cruel policy ideas, too. Hateful rhetoric from political leaders MATTERS. Over 150 anti-trans bills were introduced in 2022. There was a 12x increase in anti-LGBTQ+ incidents. The threats to the trans community are real, increasing, and deadly.
Trump is leading a campaign of hate that intentionally makes life more dangerous for queer and trans kids every single day.
But my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting back.
To every LGBTQ+ individual: I have your back. President Biden has your back. You belong. You deserve to live a life free from fear and violence. And you are perfect, just the way you are.
If you’re reading this email and you’re fired up about this, please add your name to my petition for full freedom and equality for ALL. Let’s send a loud and clear message that we stand together against Trump’s hatred and threats. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4uPs3UhTVUSZo-G4JR2tTg2]
I will keep fighting, and I will keep loving.
I’m grateful to know that you’re by my side in this.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

Peter – did you sign our petition last week? Comcast and other big telecoms want to stop President Biden’s nomination of Gigi Sohn to the Federal Communications Commission – because Ms. Sohn will look out for consumers, not for telecoms’ bottom line. Kyrsten Sinema has not yet announced her vote on the nomination – but she reportedly helped block Sohn from being confirmed previously. Since 2017, Kyrsten Sinema has raked in over $150,000 from telecom companies like Comcast and Verizon. body:
Blatant political pandering.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59042487/393028539/823540626?refcode=ea.f9d2b598-10b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.f9d2b598-10b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQyYjU5OC0xMGIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V5XEA81m4mdjp2KLOkTb4-mig5b2ZX2-1tR6t7Ln198=&emci=cb5bad07-f7b1-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=f9d2b598-10b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=1049176)

Even with the threat of Roy’s veto, they’re already attempting to enact ultra-radical laws.** **[If the GOP gains just one seat, there’ll be no stopping them. Republicans could push through any radical, anti-democratic legislation they want. NC Democrats need YOUR support to fight back. They’re the experts. Instead, Republican legislators want to exercise complete control over our public schools because they know it plays well to their base. Peter, laws like these aren’t designed to protect kids. clean_body: Blatant political pandering. | Peter — LGBTQ+ students, families, and public school teachers are under attack. North Carolina’s GOP legislators just announced plans to pass their very own version of Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill — a law that has silenced teachers from having age-appropriate conversations with their students and ostracizes LGBTQ+ students and families. It’s blatant political pandering, and it’s just plain wrong. Right now, GOP legislators are just ONE SEAT away from veto-proof supermajorities in both state legislative chambers. Even with the threat of Roy’s veto, they’re already attempting to enact ultra-radical laws. = Look, public school teachers and administrators are the ones who should be determining what and how they teach. They’re the experts. Instead, Republican legislators want to exercise complete control over our public schools because they know it plays well to their base. Peter, laws like these aren’t designed to protect kids. They’re a capitulation to radical right-wingers who hold extreme views and want to silence anyone they disagree with. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = = = = Appreciate it, Team Cooper **=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. body:
We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. Our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. | |
---

clean_body: We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. Our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. | | Derek -- We wanted to check in because we noticed you haven’t renewed your DNC membership for 2023. The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, and that means our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. So, Derek, we need you in this fight. Here are a few things your Official 2023 DNC Membership could help support: 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states; 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure; 💪 Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day. You haven’t donated to renew your membership yet, Derek. Will you make a commitment to supporting Democrats in 2023 and beyond by renewing your DNC membership right now? When you do, we’ll send you your very own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. ** The team at the DNC is already looking ahead.
