body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59060437/393066877/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkyNWIxMi0zYmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m4kw7tp0xR3PExyVA0I4Lf7oTinflVhWci3DN15sIeg=&emci=cb3a5f95-3ab2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=65925b12-3bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=24635485)
---
Hey friends, We’ve had yet another great week of progress for our state of Maryland! **[You can watch the full week-in-review video here to catch up on what our administration accomplished last week →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59060438/393066878/1519974857?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkyNWIxMi0zYmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m4kw7tp0xR3PExyVA0I4Lf7oTinflVhWci3DN15sIeg=&emci=cb3a5f95-3ab2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=65925b12-3bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=24635485)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59060439/393066879/1519974857?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkyNWIxMi0zYmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m4kw7tp0xR3PExyVA0I4Lf7oTinflVhWci3DN15sIeg=&emci=cb3a5f95-3ab2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=65925b12-3bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=24635485)
---
Here are just a few of the many highlights:
* After a devastating earthquake rocked Turkey, I spoke with the Turkish Ambassador to let him know that Maryland stands in solidarity and will help how we can in their time of need.

* In Dorchester County, I helped announce the discovery of new, exciting artifacts found at the birthplace of Maryland trailblazer and iconic abolitionist, Harriet Tubman.

* I testified before the Maryland State House on the Keep Our Heroes Home Act, a bill my administration is prioritizing to further cut taxes for retired veterans.

I hope you’ll continue to tune in and follow our administration’s progress as we continue our work to move Maryland forward and leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes

Friend,

The Biden Administration continues to act with a lack of transparency regarding U.S. funding the war in Ukraine. When Congress made appropriations for additional assistance to Ukraine, Joe Biden promised to release a report detailing the level of financial commitment being placed on taxpayers' shoulders.

**To this day, he has not issued this report - even at the urging of concerned members like myself.**

I don't believe it's good practice to spend hard-earned taxpayer dollars without a clear plan of how they're being used, and how we will end **U.S. involvement** in Ukraine while protecting the interests of national security at home.

**If you agree, let me know below.** | [**STOP FUNDING THE WAR**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c26e5eb518ca44d480ef0d0b22ede817&_e=vsCK34DgPYpM1sjcyM9ikSerfo_dYY1hQSO64oZjuara5oOBXOoGF-E_aEgzEHLLBNK9h4_o59ODdn5OO5jyZS0fMqXnbJE8O3cnUn9n3rxfQ3qFuVH-nxzsc6SHlOUCEC54Er5uCYAbJpChbywfF4Lm9D2bdG93kv1tLrAUi8DFtKuJ3BsY_cGOXQKjL20ydUoTnxcTcX16LvkbovfRkxnhEg9Wu_8zW4njIQXqUrVYvUoWcGFknh2PGSR63gtR_k5amxx8jRLWffwTJ1VxvmfOScaXDud3Szc1l37J3lFuryd5p_6gKdKyJxHU3bUBsJUwVNKoTbD9OopXUG-Qfr7eLCxP51Qs7hy4z62SCqgXhlm7XMHRoqNvSsDqTBWnPX62vhzEEEQ7xhuQdIwhJThNBKa9Qh3EJI9eq8ejNdmgQPI5TTH5bteoy3_HUKu1bmshyixWAFzQZZ0WFiIBIqxq0ukpeTgXbZ6ZUc-etOlToKzbkKFRHhJv9cI0s_xxRhaCN6Jxg0Ps4YnZipaMKnhxGzMk4kE3iKCy2SERCFE%3D)

[**WE NEED TRANSPARENCY NOW**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c26e5eb518ca44d480ef0d0b22ede817&_e=vsCK34DgPYpM1sjcyM9ikSerfo_dYY1hQSO64oZjuara5oOBXOoGF-E_aEgzEHLLBNK9h4_o59ODdn5OO5jyZS0fMqXnbJE8O3cnUn9n3rxfQ3qFuVH-nxzsc6SHlOUCEC54Er5uCYAbJpChbywfF4Lm9D2bdG93kv1tLrAUi8DFtKuJ3BsY_cGOXQKjL20ydUoTnxcTcX16LvkbovfRkxnhEg9Wu_8zW4njIQXqUrVYvUoWcGFknh2PGSR63gtR_k5amxx8jRLWffwTJ1VxvmfOScaXDud3Szc1l37J3lFuryd5p_6gKdKyJxHU3bUBsJUwVNKoTbD9OopXUG-Qfr7eLCxP51Qs7hy4z62SCqgXhlm7XMHRoqNvSsDqTBWnPX62vhzEEEQ7xhuQdIwhJf59lqTb_5MnvGaVkT3fJdxLcMRFgg-CEGWWlnaPPg8U8zvdCCNhH959Gl3NBDImCPZnZ1MZTM8WMSb7POrzyrTfZWpifKH3tRGJPAGxVQ5PfhwQTYTflGBByOJhur2HdyH7lDJhAaAReCWSsOGFVTE%3D)

It's my job to represent you in Washington. That includes standing up to the Biden Administration when promises aren't being delivered.

**[I'll never stop fighting for you, and we will get to the bottom of this.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c26e5eb518ca44d480ef0d0b22ede817&_e=vsCK34DgPYpM1sjcyM9ikSerfo_dYY1hQSO64oZjuara5oOBXOoGF-E_aEgzEHLLBNK9h4_o59ODdn5OO5jyZS0fMqXnbJE8O3cnUn9n3rxfQ3qFuVH-nxzsc6SHlOUCEC54Er5uCYAbJpChbywfF4Lm9D2bdG93kv1tLrAUi8DFtKuJ3BsY_cGOXQKjL20ydUoTnxcTcX16LvkbovfRkxnhEg9Wu_8zW4njIQXqUrVYvUoWcGFknh2PGSR63gtR_k5amxx8jRLWffwTJ1VxvmfOScaXDud3Szc1l37J3lFuryd5p_6gKdKyJxHU3bUBsJUwVNKoTbD9OopXUG-Qfr7eLCxP51Qs7hy4z62SCqiRiaRHzcuJNl-vRxFx4P7bQfW6xe8suape70A1zsvmikgfIVKAAw5yuz5FlUhEADTB-MOcL1_oKKfRsjaFi3K7WQxDFocZ826uiKDB-RGatJmGmefPEvfA1KaYXMWrCgyBz1yfPlqqhCbolcJRz5ucXIsv_Ak80gM1hySL8PGHNQ%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

clean_body: | Friend, The Biden Administration continues to act with a lack of transparency regarding U.S. funding the war in Ukraine. When Congress made appropriations for additional assistance to Ukraine, Joe Biden promised to release a report detailing the level of financial commitment being placed on taxpayers' shoulders. To this day, he has not issued this report - even at the urging of concerned members like myself. I don't believe it's good practice to spend hard-earned taxpayer dollars without a clear plan of how they're being used, and how we will end U.S. involvement in Ukraine while protecting the interests of national security at home. If you agree, let me know below. | It's my job to represent you in Washington. That includes standing up to the Biden Administration when promises aren't being delivered. Thanks, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Aaron=20Rice?=
subject: Get tickets to the Women's Bill of Rights Luncheon
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132824?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
We're just a little under two weeks away from our Women's Bill of Rights luncheon.

Radical "woke" ideologues are damaging single-sex spaces, especially women's sports. All-American swimmer Riley Gaines and Mandy Gunasekara from the Forum for Independent Women will be joining us on March 2 to discuss how women's rights are currently at risk.

We would love for you to join us to see why we need a Women's Bill of Rights in Mississippi.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ff5963222b&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_
| **Riley Gaines, US swimming champion** Riley is a recent graduate from the University of Kentucky where she was a 12x All-American swimmer. This past year, Riley competed and tied with transgender swimmer Lia Thomas at their NCAA championships. Since directly experiencing the injustice of allowing men in women's sports, Riley has been outspoken on why this issue is blatantly unfair and harmful to females in so many ways. **Mandy Gunasekara, Independent Women’s Forum** Mandy served as Chief of Staff of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, helping set environmental policy priorities for the Trump-Pence Administration. In addition to IWF, she is a visiting fellow at the Heritage Foundation, she has also worked as a Senior Fellow for the Texas Public Policy Foundation, and regularly appears on Fox News. A sixth-generation Mississippian, she and her husband and two children call Oxford, Mississippi, home.

**Tickets are already selling fast! [CLICK HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2b7b56fd1c&e=5703353baa) to book now. **

I hope to see you there!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d959d95572&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
In Liberty,

Aaron Rice
Director, Mississippi Justice Institute

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=eabd45d3c9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=eabd45d3c9).

body:
Kim introduced legislation to increase primary care access for children by strengthening Medicare! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59042994/393030215/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZmZDk4Yy0xMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap1tHiPDIaxXlM_C9tltV-NHHDyeS3sBYN4jiZRF078=&emci=6a417fc9-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=28ffd98c-11b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: My bipartisan bill to increase health care access for children:
Date: Saturday, February 18, 2023 [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59042996/393030217/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZmZDk4Yy0xMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap1tHiPDIaxXlM_C9tltV-NHHDyeS3sBYN4jiZRF078=&emci=6a417fc9-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=28ffd98c-11b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)
Team,

As a pediatrician, I've seen firsthand how important access to a primary care doctor is for children's well-being. Yet right now, too many American children don't have access to the quality, affordable care they need.

**That's why last week, I was proud to introduce the _Kids' Access to Primary Care Act_ in the House.** This bipartisan legislation would strengthen Medicaid to provide increased access to primary care for children and their families.

If passed, this bill will ensure Medicaid pays at least the same rate as Medicare. This would mean access to more doctors, shorter waiting periods, and overall increased health care coverage for children and families.

With nearly half of the children in the United States being insured through Medicaid, this bill is critical to ensuring our children receive the care they deserve.

**[If you're with me in the fight to improve health care access for children, add your name now to become a citizen co-sponsor of my _Kids' Access to Primary Care Act_ >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59042997/393030218/-1227338212?ms=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=0tpUPgCCYpLY2g4N0AHQMgneImP25V92kuEINbNvYS/2hkXVLGSL1hlC4mnlM8WXuXMCSIF47CftozvwD+RhJ1aKeK/haCp22jZ7rMH6DM2STJLdnDeAMhKi7JXtIj2MV9Guon5nriHIaWiNcDSlp7uVIDidD4VvftvSZuGNZd8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZmZDk4Yy0xMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap1tHiPDIaxXlM_C9tltV-NHHDyeS3sBYN4jiZRF078=&emci=6a417fc9-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=28ffd98c-11b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)** | [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59042998/393030219/-1227338212?ms=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230221_medica2_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=0tpUPgCCYpLY2g4N0AHQMgneImP25V92kuEINbNvYS/2hkXVLGSL1hlC4mnlM8WXuXMCSIF47CftozvwD+RhJ1aKeK/haCp22jZ7rMH6DM2STJLdnDeAMhKi7JXtIj2MV9Guon5nriHIaWiNcDSlp7uVIDidD4VvftvSZuGNZd8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZmZDk4Yy0xMWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap1tHiPDIaxXlM_C9tltV-NHHDyeS3sBYN4jiZRF078=&emci=6a417fc9-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=28ffd98c-11b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Remembering Frederick Douglass
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
As we continue to organize and fight against racism and inequality in 2023, we should remember Frederick Douglass’ inspiring words. Equal opportunity is something we must pursue and defend, now and in the future.
#
Friend,
As Americans, we often pride ourselves on our diversity. We are not one people from one place, but a people bound by the common ideals of freedom and justice. But getting to this point has been a long uphill battle, one we’re still fighting to this day.
This Black History Month, I’m reminded of the life and legacy of Frederick Douglass. Born a slave, Douglass went on to become one of the nation’s leading figures in the fight for equality and civil rights. His firsthand accounts of being enslaved and braving the Underground Railroad to freedom gave the movement a face and a message to move our country forward:
**“Truth, justice, liberty, and humanity will ultimately prevail.”**
Our march toward justice continues today.
According to the Department of Labor, Black workers [earn](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11292?t=6&akid=2622%2E946728%2EcHZTtW) on average $.76 for every dollar earned by white workers.
Only 5.9% of all [CEOs](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11293?t=7&akid=2622%2E946728%2EcHZTtW) in America are Black, despite making up 13.6% of the population. And among Fortune 500 companies, Black CEOs barely make up 1% of executives. This isn’t because there is a lack of talented Black executives in this country. It’s due to systemic barriers that can impede access to equal opportunities.
As we continue to organize and fight against racism and inequality in 2023, we should remember Frederick Douglass’ inspiring words. Equal opportunity is something we must pursue and defend, now and in the future.
Onward,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230221-2622-footer&t=8&refcode2=2622_946728_cHZTtW&akid=2622%2E946728%2EcHZTtW)**
---
[](https://facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: WATCH: This is what we’ve been fighting for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I'm excited to share this with you.
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4431?t=2&akid=13291%2E53494%2ELx2jZF)
---
Friend,
Clean energy careers aren't some far-off promise. They're changing lives right now.
That's why we traveled to Milwaukee, Wisconsin to hear from Akinlana Abdalla—a union member and wind turbine repair specialist—about why he's so proud of his work and why he believes clean energy is the future of industry.
[_**Watch our new video now to see the clean energy revolution in action.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4431?t=3&akid=13291%2E53494%2ELx2jZF)
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4431?t=4&akid=13291%2E53494%2ELx2jZF)
[WATCH NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4431?t=5&akid=13291%2E53494%2ELx2jZF)
---
Clean energy jobs are going to power state economies for decades to come. And states that invest in building these economies stand to gain the most. **This is no longer a promise for the future—it's real jobs, like Akinlana's, in real communities, like Milwaukee.**
Thanks to historic policies like the Inflation Reduction Act and leadership from governors like Tony Evers, the demand for clean energy workers is surging. And, there is so much more that can be done to continue this economic transformation. These kinds of success stories can become the norm—delivering more jobs, healthier communities, and lower energy costs—so long as state and federal leaders continue to raise their climate ambitions.
[_**Our clean energy future is here. Watch the video to see a brighter future through climate action become reality.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4431?t=6&akid=13291%2E53494%2ELx2jZF)
[WATCH NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4431?t=7&akid=13291%2E53494%2ELx2jZF)
---
Onward,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action

name: Fair Fight
subject: Check out some of the Black leaders who inspire our work, our fight, and our mission →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Every month of the year, Fair Fight is committed to carrying on their legacies by protecting the freedom to vote and dismantling the deep, systemic racial injustice in our electoral system. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061318/393069718/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=&emci=9eb307bc-3eb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=a1b307bc-3eb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=1037277)

| | Happy Black History Month! We’re so grateful to stand on the shoulders of countless Black changemakers, past and present, who’ve paved the way for a stronger and more inclusive democracy. And every month of the year, Fair Fight is committed to carrying on their legacies by protecting the freedom to vote and dismantling the deep, systemic racial injustice in our electoral system. **Today, let’s celebrate some of the courageous voting rights leaders who inspire our work, our fight, and our mission:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061319/393069719/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=) Suffragist, Civil Rights Leader
_“Lifting as we climb.”_ Mary Church Terrell was one of the first Black women to earn a college degree in the United States, and she used her educational background as a leader in the Suffrage Movement. In the late 1800s, she banded together with other women’s suffrage and civil rights leaders like Ida B. Wells and Harriet Tubman to form the National Association of Colored Women. After the 19th Amendment was ratified, she continued to fight for Black women’s suffrage and challenged segregation until her death in 1954. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061320/393069720/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=) Civil Rights Leader, Community Organizer
_“Nobody’s free until everybody’s free.”_ Fannie Lou Hamer spent her career fighting back against systemic racism present in elections, healthcare, housing, and more. After facing violence, racism, and intimidation as barriers to voting, she helped form the Mississippi Freedom Democratic Party and pushed for greater racial equity in the political process. She was a key organizer of the 1964 Mississippi Freedom Summer and helped found the National Women’s Political Caucus, which remains active today. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061321/393069721/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=) Civil Rights Leader, U.S. Representative
_“Make good trouble.”_ John Lewis embodied the values of the Civil Rights Movement — he chaired the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and was a planner and speaker for the 1963 March on Washington. He helped lead the historic march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma where he risked his life peacefully demonstrating for voting rights. He served Georgians in Congress for 17 terms, leaving behind a legacy of advocacy and an unwavering commitment to our democracy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061322/393069722/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=) Executive Director, Georgia Coalition for the People's Agenda
_“Be engaged in this process. You can be that difference.”_ Helen Butler has dedicated her life to advocating for voting rights and other social justice issues. As executive director of the Coalition, she has helped bring together community organizers, policy experts, faith leaders, and more to improve the livelihoods of people of color in Georgia and across the country. She has received local, state, and national recognition for her commitment to defending democracy, empowering Black women, and fighting for social justice. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061323/393069723/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=) Founder of Fair Fight, Former Georgia House Minority Leader
_“Do not allow setbacks to set you back.”_ Stacey Abrams is a force in the modern-day voting rights movement, committed to ensuring all eligible voters have access to the ballot box and fighting for free and fair elections. After serving as House Minority Leader in the Georgia legislature, she ran for Governor of Georgia and brought attention to systemic voter suppression prevalent throughout the state. Her persistence in this movement, exemplified by the founding of Fair Fight, inspires us to keep up the fight. We are proud to share the stories of these democracy champions every day, not just during Black History Month. Together, we’ll uplift their voices, build a stronger community, and inspire our neighbors to make a difference themselves. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team [_**If you feel inspired by these brilliant Black activists and how Fair Fight is carrying on their legacies by protecting the freedom to vote, please consider chipping in today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061324/393069724/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061325/393069725/-1138845250?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230221_f_e_bhm2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIzMDdiYy0zZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWiKTQUtc01hDLZUUA2mbF3z8vAsg08SKWPUL-GV4wg=)

clean_body: Every month of the year, Fair Fight is committed to carrying on their legacies by protecting the freedom to vote and dismantling the deep, systemic racial injustice in our electoral system. | | | Happy Black History Month! We’re so grateful to stand on the shoulders of countless Black changemakers, past and present, who’ve paved the way for a stronger and more inclusive democracy. And every month of the year, Fair Fight is committed to carrying on their legacies by protecting the freedom to vote and dismantling the deep, systemic racial injustice in our electoral system. Today, let’s celebrate some of the courageous voting rights leaders who inspire our work, our fight, and our mission: = Suffragist, Civil Rights Leader “Lifting as we climb.” Mary Church Terrell was one of the first Black women to earn a college degree in the United States, and she used her educational background as a leader in the Suffrage Movement. In the late 1800s, she banded together with other women’s suffrage and civil rights leaders like Ida B. Wells and Harriet Tubman to form the National Association of Colored Women. After the 19th Amendment was ratified, she continued to fight for Black women’s suffrage and challenged segregation until her death in 1954. = Civil Rights Leader, Community Organizer “Nobody’s free until everybody’s free.” Fannie Lou Hamer spent her career fighting back against systemic racism present in elections, healthcare, housing, and more. After facing violence, racism, and intimidation as barriers to voting, she helped form the Mississippi Freedom Democratic Party and pushed for greater racial equity in the political process. She was a key organizer of the 1964 Mississippi Freedom Summer and helped found the National Women’s Political Caucus, which remains active today. = Civil Rights Leader, U.S. Representative “Make good trouble.” John Lewis embodied the values of the Civil Rights Movement — he chaired the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and was a planner and speaker for the 1963 March on Washington. He helped lead the historic march across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma where he risked his life peacefully demonstrating for voting rights. He served Georgians in Congress for 17 terms, leaving behind a legacy of advocacy and an unwavering commitment to our democracy. = Executive Director, Georgia Coalition for the People's Agenda “Be engaged in this process. You can be that difference.” Helen Butler has dedicated her life to advocating for voting rights and other social justice issues. As executive director of the Coalition, she has helped bring together community organizers, policy experts, faith leaders, and more to improve the livelihoods of people of color in Georgia and across the country. She has received local, state, and national recognition for her commitment to defending democracy, empowering Black women, and fighting for social justice. = Founder of Fair Fight, Former Georgia House Minority Leader “Do not allow setbacks to set you back.” Stacey Abrams is a force in the modern-day voting rights movement, committed to ensuring all eligible voters have access to the ballot box and fighting for free and fair elections. After serving as House Minority Leader in the Georgia legislature, she ran for Governor of Georgia and brought attention to systemic voter suppression prevalent throughout the state. Her persistence in this movement, exemplified by the founding of Fair Fight, inspires us to keep up the fight. We are proud to share the stories of these democracy champions every day, not just during Black History Month. Together, we’ll uplift their voices, build a stronger community, and inspire our neighbors to make a difference themselves. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team = | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lucas=20Kunce?=
subject: This was never part of my plan.
body:
#
Hey Peter, it's Lucas Kunce. I wanted to take some time today to tell you a little bit about where I come from and what got me into this race. **Will you please give me a moment to explain?**
As a kid from a working-class neighborhood in the heart of Central Missouri, running for U.S. Senate was never part of my plan.
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=6fc95acd3d&e=8095450ef8)
Like so many Americans, my parents lived paycheck-to-paycheck -- so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
**But we weren 't alone -- our community took care of us.**
When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn't afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That 's the Missouri I grew up in.**
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts -- the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here 's all that's left of it:**
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=83cf591704&e=8095450ef8)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts -- like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil -- and then told us they can't figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I 'm running for U.S. Senate because it's time everyday Missourians -- people who know how to take care of each other -- called the shots in our country. [And today, I'm asking for your support to make it happen.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7d5b10a8e6&e=8095450ef8)**
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=5022972094&e=8095450ef8)
**If you 're ready to take back power from the massive corporations and corrupt, career politicians who've torn up our country, I need you on this team. [Can you add a $10 donation right now so we'll have the resources we need to get this message in front of voters and stand up to Josh Hawley? I don't take any money from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big impact.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=ffab4687b5&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=f5f1b6c8bb&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=0f3f5c2cc9&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=78b5599a17&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=c4eb3b483b&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=88c16e92aa&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=cbee627795&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=c7162f68cf&e=8095450ef8)
---
Thank you for everything,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=4432bf99a9&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=a963b57cf4). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Semmel?=
subject: WaPo: Russ Vought “Intellectual Leader” of Conservative Flank
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10341915?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

You know you are doing something right when your work _draws the ire_ of major leftist media outlets.

In the last several months the Center for Renewing America (CRA) has released a major budget proposal, helped 20 patriots secure historic concessions in the Speakership fight, and led the call for a Church-style committee to investigate woke and weaponized federal agencies working against the American people.

**Whereas before they used to ignore us, the mainstream media has now been made to care.** Now,___The Washington Post_ released a [profile piece](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=81c86c8946&e=17913c7d6d) on CRA and our president Russ Vought, who has, according to the Post, emerged as an “intellectual leader of the GOP’s conservative flank.”

The article has all the usual bluster _you’d expect from _The Washington Post__ , but it demonstrates just how effective CRA has become under the leadership of my boss, Russ Vought.

**The Washington Post:**[The former Trump aide crafting the House GOP’s debt ceiling playbook](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cfaf0bc52e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| **A Leader in the America First Movement**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0033f1a2e5&e=17913c7d6d)
---

As the debt ceiling debate looms, WaPo [explains ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=072d2e4a6f&e=17913c7d6d)the impact _Russ and CRA have had on shaping the conservative agenda in Congress_ :

_"The president of a new pro-Trump think tank called the Center for Renewing America, Vought, 46, has emerged as one of the central voices shaping the looming showdown over federal spending and the national debt. As Republicans struggle to craft a strategy for confronting the Biden administration over the debt ceiling, which limits how much the government can borrow to pay for spending Congress has already approved, Vought has supplied them with a seemingly inexhaustible stream of advice: suggestions for negotiating with the White House, briefings about dealing with the media, a 104-page memo that proposes specific spending levels for every federal agency.

Several Republican lawmakers and staffers privately acknowledged talking to Vought at least once a week. Earlier this month, he briefed about four dozen GOP senators over lunch in the Capitol, according to Sen. Rick Scott (R-Fla.), who said it was at least the third time he had heard Vought’s pitch for dealing with the debt limit."_

**As the piece begrudgingly acknowledges** , what the liberal media and establishment Republicans are most afraid of is that our budget plan is very different from previous budget plans and hits right at the core of the DC cartel. It avoids going after popular entitlement programs like Social Security and Medicare and instead focuses on cutting woke and weaponized government programs and defunding the heart of a government that hates ‘we the people.’

Russ laid it out perfectly: “America cannot be saved unless the current grip of woke and weaponized government is broken. That is the central and immediate threat facing the country — the one that all our statesmen must rise tall to vanquish.”

Both the media and the DC cartel know our work is a threat to the way things are done in Washington. We take criticism from the cartel allies and others as validation of our work and the movement we are building.

**We consistently punch above our weight and lately we’ve landed a few blows against the DC cartel.**

P.S. Russ asked me not to make this “another fundraising email” but if you truly believe in the work we’re doing [I would encourage you to support the Center](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=12c72e4c68&e=17913c7d6d).
|
---
| Sincerely,

Rachel Semmel
Communications Director
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friends, You know you are doing something right when your work draws the ire of major leftist media outlets. In the last several months the Center for Renewing America (CRA) has released a major budget proposal, helped 20 patriots secure historic concessions in the Speakership fight, and led the call for a Church-style committee to investigate woke and weaponized federal agencies working against the American people. Whereas before they used to ignore us, the mainstream media has now been made to care. Now,_The Washington Post released a on CRA and our president Russ Vought, who has, according to the Post, emerged as an “intellectual leader of the GOP’s conservative flank.” The article has all the usual bluster you’d expect from The Washington Post , but it demonstrates just how effective CRA has become under the leadership of my boss, Russ Vought. The Washington Post: | | A Leader in the America First Movement | As the debt ceiling debate looms, WaPo impact Russ and CRA have had on shaping the conservative agenda in Congress : "The president of a new pro-Trump think tank called the Center for Renewing America, Vought, 46, has emerged as one of the central voices shaping the looming showdown over federal spending and the national debt. As Republicans struggle to craft a strategy for confronting the Biden administration over the debt ceiling, which limits how much the government can borrow to pay for spending Congress has already approved, Vought has supplied them with a seemingly inexhaustible stream of advice: suggestions for negotiating with the White House, briefings about dealing with the media, a 104-page memo that proposes specific spending levels for every federal agency. Several Republican lawmakers and staffers privately acknowledged talking to Vought at least once a week. Earlier this month, he briefed about four dozen GOP senators over lunch in the Capitol, according to Sen. Rick Scott (R-Fla.), who said it was at least the third time he had heard Vought’s pitch for dealing with the debt limit." As the piece begrudgingly acknowledges , what the liberal media and establishment Republicans are most afraid of is that our budget plan is very different from previous budget plans and hits right at the core of the DC cartel. It avoids going after popular entitlement programs like Social Security and Medicare and instead focuses on cutting woke and weaponized government programs and defunding the heart of a government that hates ‘we the people.’ Russ laid it out perfectly: “America cannot be saved unless the current grip of woke and weaponized government is broken. That is the central and immediate threat facing the country — the one that all our statesmen must rise tall to vanquish.” Both the media and the DC cartel know our work is a threat to the way things are done in Washington. We take criticism from the cartel allies and others as validation of our work and the movement we are building. We consistently punch above our weight and lately we’ve landed a few blows against the DC cartel. P.S. Russ asked me not to make this “another fundraising email” but if you truly believe in the work we’re doing . | | Sincerely, Rachel Semmel Communications Director Center for Renewing America | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved._ Our mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave. SE Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Team Slotkin
subject: What the GOP convention means
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/174?t=1&akid=20%2E135344%2E6nrN2s)
Team -
If you weren’t spending your Saturday following the twists and turns of the Michigan GOP convention, we can’t say we blame you. So today, we thought we’d give you a recap of the drama and results that you may have missed – and what it means for the next two years of elections in Michigan.
Last weekend the Michigan GOP had a convention to decide who would run the party for the next two years.
It wasn’t what you would call a smooth process. Party infighting caused the 2022 failed candidates for Attorney General (Matt DePerno) and Secretary of State (Kristina Karamo) to compete for party chair. Both candidates lost last year by wide margins after spending the election cycle peddling election denial, conspiracy, and division.
While DePerno received President Trump’s endorsement for party chair and Trump’s video was played to the full convention, it was not enough to combat the infighting we saw this weekend. After the third round of votes, Kristina Karamo was ultimately elected.
Immediately after, party insiders began expressing concern that she will not be able to run a statewide party and secure funding from the traditional conservatives that the Michigan GOP typically relies on for donations. While previous chairs of the Michigan GOP came from the donor class, Karamo and her supporters reject the GOP establishment.
Ultimately, both the Trump and establishment wings of the party lost this weekend – and extreme ideology won. We’ll let former Republican state representative Aaron Miller sum it up: “The Republican Party is now pretty well cemented as the party of election denying, conspiracy theorists, tin hats and supporting Capitol riots.”
If last year proved anything, it’s that Michiganders are looking for “Team Normal” – not whatever was displayed at Saturday’s convention. Chip in below to support “Team Normal,” and Elissa, and tell the Michigan GOP that voters just want some sanity.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb23.fIJRPL&refcode=em230221-1-32000&t=2&akid=20%2E135344%2E6nrN2s)**
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=20%2E135344%2E6nrN2s).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

clean_body: | | | | Abortion rights are under attack in all 50 states. That's not hyperbole. Here's what's going on: In the coming days, a right-wing Texas judge (hand-picked by Donald Trump) is set to rule on a case that could ban the abortion medication mifepristone nationwide. More than 50% of abortions in the United States are through medication. If this ban is put into place, women in every state, even states that protect the right to abortion, will lose access to critical reproductive care. Last week, Ron took to the Senate floor to do something he's never done: he called on the FDA and President Biden to ignore the ruling if this extremist judge decides to ban mifepristone. = Ron is exactly right. This is a battle with too much at stake. We must take decisive action to ensure that women across the nation do not lose access to this critical medication. Not for one week, one day, one hour. = This judge, Matthew Kacsmaryk, has already earned the title of the most lawless judge in the country. He's known as an anti-abortion zealot and right-wing activist. Kacsmaryk is preparing to use his power as a judge to create a legal loophole to circumvent the will of the people and criminalize abortion pills. Republicans have placed right-wing activist judges in seats across the country, all the way up to the Supreme Court. They have eroded public trust in our judicial system. They've stripped away the constitutional right to privacy. Now, they're looking to take away even more rights. We must take a stand against their lawlessness. = More soon, Team Wyden | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Peter,

A child’s education shouldn’t be defined by their zip code or their financial situation. Trust me when I say, **competition breeds success**. Unfortunately, red-tape bureaucrats have constructed unwelcomed barriers to educational success for the sake of woke-and-broke Washington agendas. These are not the values that made America great. name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster

| |
---
| | | Friend, it's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

**[Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c1a022515df4ab08b9329c0cc6127e2&_e=G9501-WhgeLjEQg7hmug4G_ZZ9O5_woJtGLekUMZq5hxbndotydHRoVbm871n-2HwPcmRNhZBc9kwf6ZT72jg-SblmqSwvQSMH6fcegIwj2siHgOpUbTwwzz6pSVZ9nDgC5VUxYuEM2zNHjUypRXTJ0YKzMJf6UQP3CNPLGZ7X4t2otcOJynQa7v5dBkNQjt3NsLAXeMz0GzPasucTv82baDdMcw9GXcVqLTqCQqFi5D99_UGbeWwwJz7LwbD0PzAVcBZn-zwmao_eqNIIO-4U4g0RiY5_OOKcGKCQtOkiMtpmBQYgIW2dkiXzLFDPJ23vg884FiebpxecegFBssfMHT-l3sWqdQIak9r_iSXW9DJERCEOFzolsBjITrajud43MtCPDJCMd_YnBhoODTEJUgBRtGLA-VlQCJyiQWGM3wYTjqkk1Zu05l9U91y9MW_jxhD42NNVFtmwGMd7hkgv3yNkfk5E2z7rJUfcdacxY%3D "Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?")**

subject: 20 Pastors and Faith Leaders Endorse Ryan Chamberlin for Standing Against Woke Assault on Judeo-christian Values
body:
https://emailer.ryanchamberlin.com/lt.php?s=508929fa82e67ab45e4731e44bde2bb3&i=14A18A2A68

My friends, the liberal media and establishment Republicans are
attacking the conservative Ryan Chamberlin because

**he is the only one that will stand with Governor Ron DeSantis** on
key issues that are important to us such as:

√ Protecting the unborn

√ Defending free speech in churches and Christian schools

√ Ensuring that Christians have the right to prayer in
schools

√ Guaranteeing Parental rights over curriculum studies

√ Keeping transgender and queer studies out of Marion County
classrooms

√ Stopping transgender policies from destroying girls'
sports

Ryan is a faithful husband, father to four grown sons, and has been
active in his church his entire life. He has been a principled
businessman and has worked hard for key conservatives at every level of
government including Gov. Ron DeSantis and President Donald Trump.

It is impossible for us to know which issues will come Ryan's way in
the Florida legislature, but we know that he will make every decision
based on his faith and the Constitution.

The woke left are waging war on Judeo-Christian values and the American
way of life.

**There is only one candidate in this race that will protect our values,
and that is Ryan Chamberlin.**

| | Every morning, my team and I exchange topics of interest we should address that align with our goal to advance Democratic principles in rural America. I couldn't believe I would be Tweeting at Marjorie Taylor Greene, telling her our District would not tolerate secession. Secession! She said, "We need a national divorce. We need to separate by red states and blue states." It wasn't a gaffe. She doubled down on it repeatedly. Usually, we're all better off ignoring Ms. Greene's outlandish comments, but I did some research. Far too many Americans support 'regional unions.' It's a minority, but look where it's growing - in rural America, where underrepresented citizens are susceptible to lies and misinformation from radicals like Majorie Taylor Greene. I had to quip back. [This needs to stop! Immediately. The people of MI01 will not tolerate secession advocates in our House. It's unconstitutional, unpatriotic, and un-American. We will respect each other, and we will work together. ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[ ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[Congresspeople are elected to problem-solve for all Americans, not just for those with whom we agree. Ms. Greene's comments are dangerous, divisive, and nearly treasonous.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[ ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[The only secession I support is Ms. Taylor Green's dangerous rhetoric seceding out of Congress.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) Legislatively, Greene and our current representative vote together 80% of the time. That's frightening. \- Please [join me](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) in recultivating a better approach to politics. I hope to spark an exemplary movement in rural Michigan, a philosophy based on cooperation, collaboration, and compromise that I know can take seed here; because of the nature of the constituency. That's where my faith is; in our people. It's why I've dedicated my entire life to public service and running for US Congress. I'm not naive about the challenges ahead of us. Our country is more divided than we've been since 1860s, but when I consider the state of our District, I think about the fiercely independent nature of the people we serve. In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we serve the most resilient and congenial people in America. Will you [stand with me today](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/94OPrDuAQ/c?w=SxDqpZh8dO1obOdfyvoasrvFpmfKZMk3eES9iq06IqM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhMmY2ZmY1LTQwMzItNDAzZi1iZTFiLWFkMDRkMjJhYmRmYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) with a contribution of $5 or more to help us accomplish great things together? Not separate. Together. Thank you for your consideration. -Dr. Bob LorinserCandidate for US Congress, (D, MI01)info@votedrbob.com

clean_body: The absurdity continues in the House. What is going on? Wake up, America. | Help us stand against extremism and treasonous rhetoric brewing | | Can't see this message? | | | | | I can't believe we have secession advocates in Congress | | The absurdity continues in the House. What is going on? Wake up, America. | | | | | | | stand against extremism and treasonous rhetoric brewing in rural America with a generous contribution to my rural fund. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | Every morning, my team and I exchange topics of interest we should address that align with our goal to advance Democratic principles in rural America. I couldn't believe I would be Tweeting at Marjorie Taylor Greene, telling her our District would not tolerate secession. Secession! She said, "We need a national divorce. We need to separate by red states and blue states." It wasn't a gaffe. She doubled down on it repeatedly. Usually, we're all better off ignoring Ms. Greene's outlandish comments, but I did some research. Far too many Americans support 'regional unions.' It's a minority, but look where it's growing - in rural America, where underrepresented citizens are susceptible to lies and misinformation from radicals like Majorie Taylor Greene. I had to quip back. Legislatively, Greene and our current representative vote together 80% of the time. That's frightening. \- Please in recultivating a better approach to politics. I hope to spark an exemplary movement in rural Michigan, a philosophy based on cooperation, collaboration, and compromise that I know can take seed here; because of the nature of the constituency. That's where my faith is; in our people. It's why I've dedicated my entire life to public service and running for US Congress. I'm not naive about the challenges ahead of us. Our country is more divided than we've been since 1860s, but when I consider the state of our District, I think about the fiercely independent nature of the people we serve. In Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, we serve the most resilient and congenial people in America. Will you with a contribution of $5 or more to help us accomplish great things together? Not separate. Together. Thank you for your consideration. -Dr. Bob LorinserCandidate for US Congress, (D, MI01)info@votedrbob.com | | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . subject: I'm officially announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Z8p16K8QNr5rhwiEy_nz-T38Atu8nri-MZBa3qS4eqAtGwuDXzUMIv1A0Y1KxeXujXcJpy1Ls8zkmQYRTLckZkw_nHUCoW2ZvxkvmXhjuGCXhtL539hypnyXpv-5QHS1DJyIVQ4GeiQ2HauuOPW7OubLAjH7NmHj6gLtAiX3e65khkTBMyqQhkcVgCQ7TEoZrpdtqhKor4TUOrWYVQzIkKTNQuqe3I_JV1L7cwiUe4rufAyHL91Hg-Hr7mwS_u0-TVmJe_ZvpdvroPWndfMW1PwknSq2w7YNyoWDm08_0JL/3tw/lAA3GIlhTba6ryNL-lPW_w/h0/JvZBnYqyw1OZZ3nETQCZx8IJDBMsEEqmjJ0s1WLwpT8) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJxxoyFmeJ7PpgLhEtS0ny9z39jdXT9vau2aSPV_t7V2hSkWSDKIKv3AJRxUjGgWwv3cZ9MB94yALJ7BKkMT0oRL-3sACXW-BO-ELcyenUqoh1MzKuk_23EPulSvRUZFVD4WUTEshWgA-ZqOGLoOFwvGTyD3A5_H4SaaaZiv38ZIdHOL5oZbjYLXxSQUvCQ3EBkiDy-T7fj5WBdLtcdewVRWkiX5jfB8kIGSsr_dS8SsXv4hKbIuk5yrKApbC-tppjQjKKVZFOKHEd8fKRhIptLYdUvp53G8MYQpZcbC_kt8xdvqzHF87pdgEtkRMWYF1Ew_A11Csi_LzCHSTgUAvPnn56kTsJ31HfBmWiRLoUDcy89HehM2M1ApjFP4SFLFi_Z9AJH6XoJ2VrEAo-1ZwwWw/3tw/lAA3GIlhTba6ryNL-lPW_w/h1/9Htxjh3rQ68bgVb1WmQkwDnRO4Ljdb0dPhu7LeXVBYk)

Peter,

**My name is Barbara Lee. I'm a proven progressive champion – and today, I'm officially announcing my candidacy for the U.S. Senate.**

Right now, there are no Black women serving in the Senate, and in our nearly 250-year history, only two Black women have held Senate seats. I'm running to change that, and I’m so grateful to have the support of The Collective PAC, but I need to know you're with me in this fight too.

[That's why I'm asking you to become one of the first donors to my campaign by splitting $10 or more between my campaign and The Collective PAC right now. Every dollar will help me build a broad coalition of supporters and secure a progressive future for all. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJxxoyFmeJ7PpgLhEtS0ny9z39jdXT9vau2aSPV_t7V2hSkWSDKIKv3AJRxUjGgWwv3cZ9MB94yALJ7BKkMT0oRL-3sACXW-BO-ELcyenUqoh1MzKuk_23EPulSvRUZFVD4WUTEshWgA-ZqOGLoOFwvGg6RU9aewJ_vjZhizQxkVCXlPlcSXAbxhXz-jMWvZ1YM-rnKOMqsXRRESKmWXUoYXDMNfCqjDQaJBEJL3aFeWjuSdWNZ0DitvIUT7C_NAa4pfFXvV3USwDPb-pDHtVQqJittuk2ZfXjVKp4c2_hrTASNErROBTGR3_Y0i-PCnP1CGXvIA18dHwesk3GPEii6odz8fAnkO-RG03uMtOZuycqwMZDCNfo9AW2Vm9YKfRxRN417MYqUi7cdvdKgM9nPQ/3tw/lAA3GIlhTba6ryNL-lPW_w/h2/SF_m1MnnXxskgiTTVvYHVSQjuXK5oRFu7hu_XmCVEMU)

I grew up in the segregated South – where my mother was denied admission to the hospital while in labor because of the color of her skin. When they finally did let her in, the situation was so dire that they had to perform an emergency forceps delivery. I wear those scars to this day. A world of racism and ignorance gave me that mark, but it’s driven me to leave my mark on our country.

That's why doing nothing has never been an option for me. When my high school said cheerleaders couldn’t be Black, I worked with the NAACP, and earned my spot as the school’s first Black cheerleader. When there weren’t protections for victims of domestic violence, I wrote California’s first Violence Against Women Act. And in the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, I stood alone as the sole member of Congress to vote against the Afghanistan War, because I knew endless wars were not the solution.

The fight for justice has never left me, even to this day. Now, I'm ready to take that fight to the Senate. **My lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice in the U.S. Senate to those who are currently voiceless.**

**But this isn't going to be an easy fight. Analysts at The Washington Post are already saying that I'm at a fundraising disadvantage in this race. I won't let that stop me, and I know you won't either.

That's why I'm personally asking: ** [Will you split $10 or more between me and The Collective PAC before midnight tonight to join this team, kickstart my campaign for Senate and help me build a progressive future for all? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJxxoyFmeJ7PpgLhEtS0ny9z39jdXT9vau2aSPV_t7V2hSkWSDKIKv3AJRxUjGgWwv3cZ9MB94yALJ7BKkMT0oRL-3sACXW-BO-ELcyenUqoh1MzKuk_23EPulSvRUZFVD4WUTEshWgA-ZqOGLoOFwvNRjykcrDOIABz1e-SNAjAtYQVuMxTBcRtW6q05JXcM2itEN57DjJBF4VwFPC-NQar-PxjUS0HsSBxjNLE2vHBmpyOFro91tXHe32DOPVvvYCU-YPG-lHICALUVlT-ETyvwawlwrLlaSvYRjHWBQjmpNtGVMa7ZWhM-KNA1nVPuYqP7lGp3mR0Ysvozpwzc7UmaMRJo5EEfXLDY0jTsBC8YeOFqCMkrcuTdU3lD7us0C6DxL3moLBD09uAHVvcSY5Q/3tw/lAA3GIlhTba6ryNL-lPW_w/h3/GOXyT9-qpNW7v2GFw6c3s3Sz0NfCvzH5Valt0MRqQ6E) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, My name is Barbara Lee. I'm a proven progressive champion – and today, I'm officially announcing my candidacy for the U.S. Senate. Right now, there are no Black women serving in the Senate, and in our nearly 250-year history, only two Black women have held Senate seats. I'm running to change that, and I’m so grateful to have the support of The Collective PAC, but I need to know you're with me in this fight too. I grew up in the segregated South – where my mother was denied admission to the hospital while in labor because of the color of her skin. When they finally did let her in, the situation was so dire that they had to perform an emergency forceps delivery. I wear those scars to this day. A world of racism and ignorance gave me that mark, but it’s driven me to leave my mark on our country. That's why doing nothing has never been an option for me. When my high school said cheerleaders couldn’t be Black, I worked with the NAACP, and earned my spot as the school’s first Black cheerleader. When there weren’t protections for victims of domestic violence, I wrote California’s first Violence Against Women Act. And in the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, I stood alone as the sole member of Congress to vote against the Afghanistan War, because I knew endless wars were not the solution. The fight for justice has never left me, even to this day. Now, I'm ready to take that fight to the Senate. My lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice in the U.S. Senate to those who are currently voiceless. But this isn't going to be an easy fight. Analysts at The Washington Post are already saying that I'm at a fundraising disadvantage in this race. I won't let that stop me, and I know you won't either. That's why I'm personally asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for being on my team, Peter. I can't win without you. – Barbara Lee Barbara Lee is a proven progressive champion who has spent the last 25 years fighting for our progressive values in the House. Now, she's ready to take this fight to the Senate, where there are currently no Black women serving. Please chip in now to help elect Barbara Lee! | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Four Hours Left to Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
Election day is here! | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=3c1612a2af&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")

|
####
# It's Election Day in the 4th!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
### Only Four Hours Left Before Polls Close!
First, I want to thank everyone who has already voted! We couldn't have done this without you.

Whether we win or lose, I am thankful to have patriots like you on my side.

This is the last reminder our campaign will be sending out about voting.

Today is election day on the 4th, and there are just 4 hours left before polls close. Make sure to head to the polls and get in line by 7 PM.

Stop by and see our volunteers if you have any questions.

Once again, thank you so much for your support.
---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=9c7d7c6691&e=3cd8121505)
---
| **Check your voting location by clicking the "Vote Now" button.**

All we need is for each of our supporters to bring five friends to the polls with them to vote, and we will win.

It is crunch time, and we can't do it without you!
---

This is the moment our people-powered campaign has prepared for, so we can’t slow down now. **We have 4 more hours to reach EVERY VA-04 voter before polls close, so I’m counting on top supporters like you to get us across the finish line.**

name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|

With each passing day, we are learning more about what really went on behind the scenes with top Republican officials in the biggest corruption scandal in Ohio history.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59055458/393047291/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWNkNTc0ZC0yMmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QvEFZjo98q09oxXQgAfxvpdfc7rVcrfnGQZeBpiLDTc=) | Team,

➡️ Then, bank accounts for a dark money group "Generation Now" and "Partners for Progress" were opened shortly after, accumulating MILLIONS of dollars after a string of shady emails between top Republicans and FirstEnergy executives.

➡️ Now, Ohio Democrats are working around the clock to ensure that the corrupt Republicans who were involved in these illegal schemes are held accountable – but we need your support to fight back.

And Matt Borges was enlisted to gather inside information to try and prevent Ohioans from getting the chance to vote on this measure!

subject: Remember when Obama messaged you this?
body:
Obama's words ring truer now than ever before. | | |
---
| | Remember when you got a message from _this familiar face?_ [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zPxM5q-4kK8uu6lZcSOahKj7sxjMS7xBDkwcMIRCFdjYdoiGaAPaLnyg-FML9OnoO7n2dzkvpL6OWCMSZFZke_FRER-RGqsums1ROF9DNid3upjFnHmebDrETaTbIOPxW4CR-eNs8HvZEGT33dYHgmAdaJPxPiswuA9iU9C0iFpUMEvpsmVWbnc09BQiUhXLUsYna_xdmziH4VSZFk4k-A7WqHEzugU9bLI8qCYDE6NZxPxt6Awn7hoHquVc6IHPmNONZGl3lnekiToT7HbpEop8QmHS-rc0HggmYqd5Pw7I97cKGSzCwDH3njvL1nP-MBYDCBGmZ9WCmqEVQI_ndYwTkVqpgGl5eUWXd0Gu2SMvDVxDReSPs-avhjgizvAEh55A6lE3PN6kN_Ub9P1rkr_dYqyVGl2USi4MbcsMkIZ32AneVpA2CPj95C-tHyvGIrLxby9pvSa7FaeLajDIVCOOPDPbJGgrRg3vCsK3dLBRCWBXECstKOJqRGXs4soxWDTKKbchuTPpmR6xYR-mivMpIRBWZR6LbMas2X-jaAYw/3tw/XgMXYNQiRDyY9Eyc2IDPTw/h0/8sQJuMPln-S6tZrCaITPR4Yfp68kDmGWM6QXM_HWA_E) It's Barack Obama! And he had an urgent message for you about electing state Democrats: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zPxM5q-4kK8uu6lZcSOahKj7sxjMS7xBDkwcMIRCFdjYdoiGaAPaLnyg-FML9OnoO7n2dzkvpL6OWCMSZFZke_FRER-RGqsums1ROF9DNid3upjFnHmebDrETaTbIOPxW4CR-eNs8HvZEGT33dYHgmAdaJPxPiswuA9iU9C0iFpf7Jd7iFpr4hbhKEiycAgrP2YXkQaSir4z42BFcdGK3lvj76enijlyHIUPoDl6r92ptve14xY63XZ-2Bab_FvDKnpjF9t58AAxt5NEdrkeXJBEliFbRmy6721xPRqQ7cHySN5JX1_dq57n0t9aicgv973KdKsYu5i57DveJ6Tdg0NYcCXXljEbGB-_klp7XdNUlFFJCx1XdJnPPorJSAzZrSL1ju6_ZSXI_wmA_Sn0wdEkGyGvpFtZivbtldPSUBYJ0rmdISegsXu7ZEc1a2LOeuH2uE7g8yLr82_aQCQNJTt9Kp6OWuIW9BIa9KeZFdF1oIoU3u8sjaXgYGmJqLCKParN582Qkp4JlcXSINf2lusb9ZT6E6Ifl8foMFbacMAw/3tw/XgMXYNQiRDyY9Eyc2IDPTw/h1/tK16dWcRKenRj5AJW2be5fXgLcttDu1Wmg_XghcLrQM) Obama's words were about the midterms – **but they ring truer now than ever before.** Here's why:
* Margins in battleground statehouses are _so slim_ that we have a real opportunity to _flip chambers_ this year through special elections – and we urgently have to defend Republicans from doing the same to our newly won chambers.
* The higher stakes in these special elections mean their cost has _skyrocketed,_ outpacing rising costs. That's bigger than our budget is built to sustain, so without you, we won't be able to compete with the strength these races deserve.
* Plus, we're strategizing and laying the groundwork for critical elections in Virginia this fall – the investments we can afford to make _now_ will have an outsized impact on our ability to win back the Virginia House and stop the Virginia Senate from falling to Republicans.

[Can you answer Obama's call and chip in $7 to support state Democrats? clean_body: Obama's words ring truer now than ever before. | | | | | Remember when you got a message from this familiar face? It's Barack Obama! And he had an urgent message for you about electing state Democrats: Obama's words were about the midterms – but they ring truer now than ever before. Here's why: Margins in battleground statehouses are so slim that we have a real opportunity to flip chambers this year through special elections – and we urgently have to defend Republicans from doing the same to our newly won chambers. The higher stakes in these special elections mean their cost has skyrocketed, outpacing rising costs. That's bigger than our budget is built to sustain, so without you, we won't be able to compete with the strength these races deserve. * Plus, we're strategizing and laying the groundwork for critical elections in Virginia this fall – the investments we can afford to make now will have an outsized impact on our ability to win back the Virginia House and stop the Virginia Senate from falling to Republicans. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz voted to reject Biden's victory for no reason but to demagogue, even after the deadly attack on our Capitol Jan. 6th, which he helped instigate with a lie-filled diatribe that morning. Can you help us work to convince a top-tier Democratic candidate to run against him in 2024?
body:
A dangerous Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20dda8cd-a72f-416e-bb66-c885857e10a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Ted Cruz is one of the most despicable, heartless people to ever serve in the Senate. Of this, I have no doubt.** _When his constituents' kids were murdered while in school at Uvalde, he ignored guns and, in a slap in the face to victims and survivors, said we must strengthen "doors." When his constituents were freezing to death because of corrupt Republican deals, he responded by going to a luxury resort in Cancun. _ >From the NY Times: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77bc3b00-405a-40ec-971d-bc0768905810/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33324165-4efe-4abe-bbac-5d211e07cc8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Worst of all, Cruz is a traitor who worked with Trump's coup plotters to overthrow our republic. He voted to reject Biden's victory for no reason but to demagogue, even after the deadly attack on our Capitol Jan. 6th, which he helped instigate with a lie-filled diatribe that morning._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1756c8a-0cae-474d-94be-14f1f59cd1d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_In 2018, Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, only holding off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, he inspires Democrats to vote against him, repels Independents & convinces Republicans to be Democrats for a day._** **_We absolutely can beat him in '24, and with so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, WE MUST._** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8105730-c612-46b9-8cf7-cdac95f94fd0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for taking on one of the most dangerous elected officials in America._ Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf027a459-413e-43c6-8283-a35570259dad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: let’s usher in a few more historic firsts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
This election is set to be one of the most important of 2023.
Why? Because the future of abortion rights, and a whole lot more, depends on our Democratic majority in the Virginia Senate — and this seat is critical to defending that majority.
But before we get there, we need to get through the toughest test of this race: the primary election in June. So friend, I need to ask right away: will you chip in whatever you can today to make sure we’re firing on all cylinders between now and the primary? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Friend, it’s no secret that Virginians are facing tough challenges. Inequality and division are on the rise. Families are working harder than ever, yet still struggling to make ends meet. Our environment, our healthcare, our schools, our safety — none of these are getting the investment they need.
But things don’t have to stay this way. I’m ready to get to work building a safer, stronger, fairer Virginia — and with my track record, I know I’ve got the experience and skills to get traction on our biggest issues.
In my six years in the House of Delegates, I helped usher in a series of major firsts for our state. I helped Virginia make history with Breonna’s Law, which banned no-knock search warrants. My legislation also led Virginia to become the first southern state to declare racism a public health crisis, to declare access to water a human right, and to ban the use of facial recognition technology. And to combat maternal and infant mortality, I helped secure landmark support for doulas, with our state’s first-ever doula certification and reimbursement policy.
Friend, I’ve used my voice my entire life to advocate for those who often go unheard — and I’m ready to push us towards more historic firsts in the Senate. But I need your help to get there. Can you chip in today to power our campaign through this critical push to the primary? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
It means a lot to have your support. Thank you for showing up for Virginia today!
- Lashrecse
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians.
Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
