But before we get there, we need to get through the toughest test of this race: the primary election in June. So friend, I need to ask right away: will you chip in whatever you can today to make sure we’re firing on all cylinders between now and the primary? [] Donate Now [] Friend, it’s no secret that Virginians are facing tough challenges. Inequality and division are on the rise. Families are working harder than ever, yet still struggling to make ends meet. Our environment, our healthcare, our schools, our safety — none of these are getting the investment they need. But things don’t have to stay this way. I’m ready to get to work building a safer, stronger, fairer Virginia — and with my track record, I know I’ve got the experience and skills to get traction on our biggest issues. In my six years in the House of Delegates, I helped usher in a series of major firsts for our state. I helped Virginia make history with Breonna’s Law, which banned no-knock search warrants. My legislation also led Virginia to become the first southern state to declare racism a public health crisis, to declare access to water a human right, and to ban the use of facial recognition technology. And to combat maternal and infant mortality, I helped secure landmark support for doulas, with our state’s first-ever doula certification and reimbursement policy. Friend, I’ve used my voice my entire life to advocate for those who often go unheard — and I’m ready to push us towards more historic firsts in the Senate. But I need your help to get there. Can you chip in today to power our campaign through this critical push to the primary? [] Donate Now [] It means a lot to have your support. Thank you for showing up for Virginia today! - Lashrecse [] Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians. Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Lashrecse campaign? >> [] Donate Now [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . www.LashrecseAird.com [] Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird P.O. Box 3943 Petersburg, VA 23805

body:

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6efd283705249c7a561c4acb171e483&_e=HmB7R7yu76-MvOlooSuvbHz7bwoWiBmoFvxd-feJD9sLs63zBy7fYVoESlDAPTXvOL06At4GWyEKQkd4mDszkaOEzD3V5GzmL9jhpMIZACjBNwXlwrPV-5ZMx-aknVq42GiLF_OChGWPs1lNuUNFKc-6P9OZ6spqpRPhNtUMMx0tFo7oIjN0DIkU0--ey_r4hwff4BTK70H4BtXOn6XwBd64GXCeNa9qm4FVP3sLp0Q2AfCfYo37SxUGsssUJULdPU3gW20oL6R12TheoREzvLwYHtv6Ziuhk4IdoyuokLyGYoPwbyateQ5QuUrHYox7)

Attorneys for FPC Action Foundation, the _leading_ 501(c)3 organization fighting to defend **_your_** __ Second Amendment rights, have already taken legal action to stop the ATF's tyrannical scheme. But to defeat the ATF, our attorneys need your support. **If we don 't stop this massive ATF abuse in its tracks, these tyrants will go around Congress and try to re-write federal law to target YOU and YOUR FAMILY**. Joe Biden and his anti-gun ATF will continue to attack YOUR Second Amendment rights until they're stopped. The gun-grabbing ATF are counting on freedom-loving Americans staying silent. **_Please don 't be quiet now. We need you in this fight!_** As our legal team presses forward with our urgent and necessary lawsuit against the ATF, we need to know if we have the support of the American people behind us. [**Are you in?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6efd283705249c7a561c4acb171e483&_e=HmB7R7yu76-MvOlooSuvbHz7bwoWiBmoFvxd-feJD9sLs63zBy7fYVoESlDAPTXvOL06At4GWyEKQkd4mDszkaOEzD3V5GzmL9jhpMIZACjBNwXlwrPV-5ZMx-aknVq42GiLF_OChGWPs1lNuUNFKfqf6Q2-e26RHU_WNgiYu9to5wVLd4S8yHniCvFXwh-v7fdecE6lxJcd6lFcHAaEfIFquJGK8QffsEZWtrTKTy5zxfOjU6BC7r6PN32TQ9EerO_NYCO2q_PoRChjOS53KPtYxVVdbpePCSJHxybE5UwsN6P6vTVJcuyQIpW9WCwt) [**If you support our lawsuit against the ATF 's unconstitutional rule, you have to add your name to FPC Action Foundation's open letter NOW!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6efd283705249c7a561c4acb171e483&_e=HmB7R7yu76-MvOlooSuvbHz7bwoWiBmoFvxd-feJD9sLs63zBy7fYVoESlDAPTXvOL06At4GWyEKQkd4mDszkaOEzD3V5GzmL9jhpMIZACjBNwXlwrPV-5ZMx-aknVq42GiLF_OChGWPs1lNuUNFKd-BhA3dSRw6jQyZyZEUivmdE6vTQ5zAvNFT8eI8UtnpZ4aciAMyJ0Tc4t_f-KjW7ci7SKd9eUgCCKnNec9x0uOAkWFHM2PQGfWgSeLWWfr3Zs7P_h0sG692LExgVEMAWyy-9tmEE9Ip3V1NVk7Vpiu80WOjrie15UNjKHMOx26W)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70d64009513f4ec5b2eb58435b08a404&_e=I9lZJlczqKwq-Ruz9igvdgtAqJY5OjSJqa0mCl_dZEHNSJ8DRBdG0iu_HN1PO-G5a4C39-HO2p3R-UUpDzEF5202AmcRuX_8gZlyp-XmeR-_qrnnugBJD2ISdgEB2nQO99r7YiYPcxhOgnRaLYjjwmUsOcN05wbmORC5ygYwZiz6j4wVsMY7Kit634tluGhJBxz8P7SuthUpejLM901-1wOKUJUgS5OBoXfb6HwAy54DNkrUmFd_DSzwu-dBBppRHTqzg_pNkLd6DrIjygDaO8M5q8zrzPCdzVdf33pjbrDB-Gw4Ow5NGLk6ZW2FOrq-AD_VbX-Bpc7iPFMdpFJiXS7Gu5E1SKYgpHIbTbBkW_BIx_VZIUGxissmX4QNgUleRiA9mCIAIU3XdqM0wisSLAxVWR2mbVgamBvZ__aj5BWCsifA-gkky1qplBldnc-W)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70d64009513f4ec5b2eb58435b08a404&_e=I9lZJlczqKwq-Ruz9igvdgtAqJY5OjSJqa0mCl_dZEHNSJ8DRBdG0iu_HN1PO-G5a4C39-HO2p3R-UUpDzEF5202AmcRuX_8gZlyp-XmeR-_qrnnugBJD2ISdgEB2nQO99r7YiYPcxhOgnRaLYjjwmUsOcN05wbmORC5ygYwZiz6j4wVsMY7Kit634tluGhJBxz8P7SuthUpejLM901-1wOKUJUgS5OBoXfb6HwAy54DNkrUmFd_DSzwu-dBBppRHTqzg_pNkLd6DrIjygDaOycELbztjLWoYDNAPY9HDRD6CKL76HXpR14xaFACGo2huajkyUScdwrviUj31g9WpSRCUlKFmgv2YywybXoAMNClUegoOTTTIjPC_dE8AkhS1yCdFwbRh6gGqGJe1UQf6WWqvTPOAYLPx-ro76M3nyXBHrzZD1HKtwnGSQp8HSIZ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70d64009513f4ec5b2eb58435b08a404&_e=I9lZJlczqKwq-Ruz9igvdgtAqJY5OjSJqa0mCl_dZEHNSJ8DRBdG0iu_HN1PO-G5a4C39-HO2p3R-UUpDzEF5202AmcRuX_8gZlyp-XmeR-_qrnnugBJD2ISdgEB2nQO99r7YiYPcxhOgnRaLYjjwmUsOcN05wbmORC5ygYwZiz6j4wVsMY7Kit634tluGhJBxz8P7SuthUpejLM901-1wOKUJUgS5OBoXfb6HwAy54DNkrUmFd_DSzwu-dBBppRHTqzg_pNkLd6DrIjygDaOz-lrMQEMKF-aANqSdOkhwPaA9nrur0h95qCe-pgvwwSRlVJsJChYi9gRy7p9so87iagabXiUbuYEJiSlmA2TsVEhCjkz2BlpJhQsssxsEth-zhhqQN1cLQ1v5P2UmNQv5Lwpu6NWWtX-5DWwu5Vu0EN7XOtBK3QENj8FRM447IZ)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70d64009513f4ec5b2eb58435b08a404&_e=I9lZJlczqKwq-Ruz9igvdgtAqJY5OjSJqa0mCl_dZEHNSJ8DRBdG0iu_HN1PO-G5a4C39-HO2p3R-UUpDzEF5202AmcRuX_8gZlyp-XmeR-_qrnnugBJD2ISdgEB2nQO99r7YiYPcxhOgnRaLYjjwmUsOcN05wbmORC5ygYwZiz6j4wVsMY7Kit634tluGhJBxz8P7SuthUpejLM901-1wOKUJUgS5OBoXfb6HwAy54DNkrUmFd_DSzwu-dBBppRHTqzg_pNkLd6DrIjygDaO5IhOtxWnk5WQ8vjFQYgjhq7bl69uUEtxc-cSvs91d1FrI8_0biJcRk4juJ0rfhzCHrLEWwcJdj56Vr2yS6nKn3NSWA21Vh82QvGufPZqaV9BAxHruij_dYeZilKqmAYY-5HvZRY5KTGORzn9IRBXBuA_OrcGn7soo2dBOHA4L-c).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, At the time I’m writing you, Team Kean has just ONE WEEK until a major deadline... This is Tom’s FIRST QUARTER as an incumbent so it’s crucial that we have a strong showing , and I hate to admit it—but right now we’re short of our donor goal for the month. This month's finance plan accounted for 250 donors, but we’re only at 187 donors with just 8 days left! Friend, ANY donation amount you can make whether it’s $5, $10, $25, or more will help us get in the position we need to be in to come out strong in Q1 and defend NJ-07! Thank you,Madi at Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. **admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f530f565b32f53e4f06e81&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63f437935593cf657d72abbd%26ss_email_id%3D63f530f565b32f53e4f06e81%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2BUntil%2B8pm%2BPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot.%2BWe%2Bare%2Bhere%2Blate%252C%2Bcome%2Bsign%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-21T21%253A01%253A09Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f437935593cf657d72abbd&l=en-US&s=bNGQ9L8qWDQGndcsTerpNjViwCc%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.

---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)

This election will determine the future of reproductive rights in Wisconsin.**[Donate to our emergency fund now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59058225/393058093/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2300-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MTAyOWNkLTJjYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KK7Lz9-xqSZOPAQOSHhyMPpQ-Yeqrwyta3mXMdMqrv0=)** to keep Republicans' hands off of our reproductive rights._

**The stakes couldn't be higher, friend: The primary for the Wisconsin Supreme Court election is today, and only the top two candidates will continue to the general election in April. **
Here's why this race is so important: **It could flip control of the state Supreme Court from conservative to liberal** – and with Wisconsin’s divided government, _this could be the difference between protecting abortion rights and losing them entirely._
**That's why American Bridge launched an emergency fund to fight back** , but we can't do it without your urgent support.

We must do everything we can to STOP Dorow from becoming one of the candidates so we can protect abortion access.
But this work will take significant resources, and we don't have what we need right now to help get the vote out. **Time is running out, and NOTHING could be more urgent.[Will you rush a donation of $15 or whatever you can give to help us hold Republicans accountable for their attempts to pack the courts with right-wing extremists to put an end to reproductive rights?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59058227/393058095/-498614040?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2300-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MTAyOWNkLTJjYjItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KK7Lz9-xqSZOPAQOSHhyMPpQ-Yeqrwyta3mXMdMqrv0=)**

| Headlines like this are getting only too common:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59058574/393059540/573442601?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230221_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2E5M2ZlNS0yZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m883mH_MOTp8KhOHHnBvj5xICvA5fWUHAAreoliO1X4=&emci=707d1b4e-1bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=37a93fe5-2eb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=22117458)
Climate change is contributing to extreme weather events across the world—which is why Sharice is doubling down on her commitment to fighting it. **_Are you with her?_**

**_[Click here to show your support for bold climate action now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59058575/393059541/573442601?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230221_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2E5M2ZlNS0yZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m883mH_MOTp8KhOHHnBvj5xICvA5fWUHAAreoliO1X4=&emci=707d1b4e-1bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=37a93fe5-2eb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=22117458)_**

Sharice knows that immediate climate action is critical to lessening the effects of dangerous climate change. That’s why she is proud to have helped pass the largest ever climate bill into law, creating millions of clean energy jobs. But time is running out, so we need to do more.

There are things we can get done right now, even with a split Congress: Actions including conservation programs, sustainable forestry, and research may be included in upcoming measures.

**_[That’s why we’re asking for 1,000 activists to sign on this week to help us make the case for more climate change action ASAP→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59058576/393059542/573442601?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230221_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2E5M2ZlNS0yZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m883mH_MOTp8KhOHHnBvj5xICvA5fWUHAAreoliO1X4=&emci=707d1b4e-1bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=37a93fe5-2eb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=22117458)_** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59058577/393059543/573442601?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230221_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_climateaction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2E5M2ZlNS0yZWIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m883mH_MOTp8KhOHHnBvj5xICvA5fWUHAAreoliO1X4=&emci=707d1b4e-1bb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=37a93fe5-2eb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=22117458)

| | | It’s time to flip the AZ legislature | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQpY1a341A1VHA4zshCKNsslRc9JABDNIhIQxjbCLSL6k5WfrwfVBKdKORwX_3tbGAOemN2PHGAewDex1QdhAnyuIQOvdps82y9N2y7-ohfUH3OcVI5tRKb_nLWXM-W14iU-vw50cygTEPgx0Br2599KDPuG9aJaCfRi5ImJ-xaQeVLgGpI6SNBg604SG6A19Ym-gsH4pOMgzLW25aaCKEjEtZyc38-xvihr8DwGCdDOjTRwRwMc7DhaVRO9_TghHMHGCRCddACV8zYIkNiobsI7r1yErTI2grGu6kg4-sGy91BiFi6FG7-prwMImu-3NlRCxLM9KGtN33-tZgyD484q72Xk5ye78TPYKYj5m88Eci51VfbmJlNL5yzkoqjd5jJ5--8uMHKnzAM_4kSLWCnP5ppHuHSe9J14JDrhdLJdFsaqYMzgVln1MX31GEIK0/3tw/r7RF5ijNTWuL0JpwpIDayA/h0/Nhm_TxWqngPn5R2LHUZ2zFZmVlgsIf6XAZcdj9nN2y0)

| Team,

Did you see this recent headline?

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQpY1a341A1VHA4zshCKNsslRc9JABDNIhIQxjbCLSL6k5WfrwfVBKdKORwX_3tbGAOemN2PHGAewDex1QdhAnFpPbEenxNmuYCaMNSCAbOFbmGNsodPIY8tdtmmTAXiz6rIjz_gTIYu7ImiHQVPgXw0S8oyuKUadPbAr1m_yaAzsC_3ti91i9-senN-jfTGRiIJ6aLz4PS73tg60YBi5sUqWQ0ELmOoiAkBsXjswfVw1w425-KTMN-SMZsht244UmE7EYbkYdfzOS9t9xK2weWdhlhw9q6QH5FwSWornraC04xdwSo-megz_jIQaVyX4ZSU5T-MsN77Lw39AEYcy-fzn2hXcvXrlkKtjJXGMxwKYjtiW4m-wL74ZoCcRzEMHjs3J7zTnxQJdrJQriDJRTht_h2096oFFe6eQTVb5WsjkLTJRDcKwlH27x-QAd01k/3tw/r7RF5ijNTWuL0JpwpIDayA/h1/J2N5HcK5oE_6L8OraVQtU17fxlyYShGZbf6l6qLXE8g) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-difference-winning-makes-6&email_referrer=email_1811136___subject_2324505&email_subject=we-deserve-transparency)
After electing the most far-right legislature in modern history, the AZ GOP is really showing its true colors this year.

They continue to try to attack our reproductive rights, our voting rights, and now they want to shield their activities from public records laws.

This comes at the same time it was revealed an AZ GOP legislator asked someone if they supported his campaign when they asked for a meeting about legislation.

**[Team, the AZ GOP is rotten to their core, and we deserve better. name: Adam Frisch
subject: humbly asking to help me defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59058972/393061158/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2ZmODVjYi0zMmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aqjEOqK__yPml42iEQ4iZNYQ2GjDyAgJrAKceo1mGH4=&emci=44a02a32-3ab1-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8cff85cb-32b2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.

Last week, I announced that I am once again running to defeat Boebert. In 2022, the race between us went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.

It was the closest race in the entire country.

I know we can win this time, but I am counting on your support from day one to be able to build a campaign strong enough to win.

[**_So please, click here and split a donation now between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign to become a Founding Donor as we work to defeat Lauren Boebert. When we kick Boebert out of Congress once and for all, you’ll be able to say you were a part of it from the start._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59058973/393061159/729998634?refcode=20230221.2_AF_2AM&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2ZmODVjYi0zMmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aqjEOqK__yPml42iEQ4iZNYQ2GjDyAgJrAKceo1mGH4=)

Despite our close race last time, it’s clear that Lauren Boebert hasn’t learned her lesson, and she’s only gotten more vocal with her extremism. The only way to stop her from continuing to fuel the anger-tainment machine is to defeat her at the ballot box.

Thank you for having my back from the start.

With gratitude -
Adam
---
|
---

| Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org
---

| Democratic Party of Georgia
P.O. BOX 89202
Atlanta, GA 30312
United States

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

| Communicating with our supporters is critical to the Democratic Party of Georgia’s continued success, and email is one of the best tools we have to do it. However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=3hlr5Rwb1cE%2F%2F2UAAuVGH5h1QzlPOV6LyN5Z8kIcm%2F3BaoNJvYz5%2BiHaPPzee6MoWBGNIPXzvNb2WiD%2FqwduZniFDjLh6Td08%2Fp9RLiRLgpmrktfWgE%2FNeOtCSLzh%2BIfzk0Zt%2BTU3B9xrfl%2BcisebAfGngwjsnrKGpDZw73bqxRIxmKN99NxwvV7jD8iewPHmkjVM8XRIdaU%2F4OCwMltfBSJ0XJah3B1chk%2BpBENhRXxUwZ1mGjA5pjmeDWdda576x6bzu%2Bp7d8ysz2q8fg3eBnKmsPvyoRGFaJEBUexGpIGpxNK6YVekOAD2LND8iSrbFs4Doia3VnDyBd9T0wqGD6zNxGpzlCXqTMDh3qyOichE9GJ8ZIqniGJcu9I6Ilwktm9YEpV2VISVpf61SAtKicH2%2FnAo2bvq7DzZMBkryikqKWjdJlEmEfuBI%2Ba51B4).

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Intercept: “GOP Megadonor Is Funding A Far-Right Israeli Think Tank — And Establishment Democrats”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
this headline in The Intercept:

“GOP Megadonor Is Funding A Far-Right Israeli Think Tank — And
Establishment Democrats: Pennsylvania billionaire Jeffrey Yass is
bankrolling groups dedicated to shutting down critiques of Israeli human
rights abuses.”

The same billionaire spending massive amounts of money against our
movement in the United States is funding a think tank dedicated to moving
Israel’s political system even further to the right.

Justice Democrats like Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib have been
outspoken about Palestinian human rights and calling our human rights
abuses when they occur. And they’ve been attacked for doing it, with
far-right groups like AIPAC spending millions to take them down.

Now, billionaire Yass is funding Moderate PAC, which plans to spend and
raise $20 million to target our candidates and disrupt our movement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127778?refcode=em20230221-27646&t=1001&akid=27646%2E1203867%2EIWaXOx ]We will continue to be outspoken about Palestinian human rights and the
work to elect progressive champions to Congress. Will you rush a
$3 contribution right now to help us fight back against this
GOP megadonor?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/127778?refcode=em20230221-27646&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27646%2E1203867%2EIWaXOx ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=27646%2E1203867%2EIWaXOx ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=27646%2E1203867%2EIWaXOx ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230221-27646-footer&t=1023&refcode2=27646_1203867_IWaXOx&akid=27646%2E1203867%2EIWaXOx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=27646%2E1203867%2EIWaXOx

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Fight for Progress
subject: Did you see what Marjorie Taylor Greene tweeted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: I don’t write often, but thought you’d be into this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
I called it world-leading at the time, and I meant it.

Friends —
Hi, Gavin Newsom here. Governor of California.
I don’t write often, but this is something I thought you’d be interested in... and maybe something you can push for federally.
Last year, I signed legislation requiring 100% of new car sales in California to be zero-emission vehicles by 2035.
We did this because transportation accounts for more than 50 percent of California’s greenhouse gas emissions.
We did this because in California, we know better than most the impact of climate change. It’s already part of our life.
We did this because our air shouldn’t give our kids asthma. Because we have seen historic wildfires, world-record temperatures, orange skies, drought, and more.
I called it world-leading at the time, and I meant it. Here’s why:
**Last week, the EUROPEAN UNION followed California’s lead — approving a ban on the sale of gas and diesel cars by 2035.**
As long as I have anything to say about it, California will continue blazing a trail for America and the rest of the world on the swift and meaningful actions necessary for cutting carbon pollution, protecting communities, and leading the clean energy future.
But I am curious:
[**Would you support legislation that requires 100 percent of new car sales in the United States to be zero-emission vehicles by 2035? Let me know.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/gcn-em-2035-survey-feb23/?source=em230221-1-T1&akid=1099%2E4767699%2E8U-nWi)
| | **[YES](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/gcn-em-2035-survey-feb23/?source=em230221-1-T1&akid=1099%2E4767699%2E8U-nWi)**
---
****
| **[NO](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/gcn-em-2035-survey-feb23/?source=em230221-1-T1&akid=1099%2E4767699%2E8U-nWi)**
---
****
Thanks for reading. I look forward to hearing the thoughts from people around the country on this issue.
Gavin

Here’s why: Last week, the EUROPEAN UNION followed California’s lead — approving a ban on the sale of gas and diesel cars by 2035. As long as I have anything to say about it, California will continue blazing a trail for America and the rest of the world on the swift and meaningful actions necessary for cutting carbon pollution, protecting communities, and leading the clean energy future. But I am curious: | | ** | ** Thanks for reading. I look forward to hearing the thoughts from people around the country on this issue. Gavin PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022

body:

Peter,
Since I first launched my campaign for Congress in 2016, I have seen what's possible when our movement builds new political consensus around the issues impacting our communities, and then organizes and advocates for the bold solutions needed to address these issues.
I am committed to building an inclusive, people-powered movement that is dedicated to improving the lives of working people across the country.
As a lifelong champion of the progressive values that unite our movement, **_I never have and never will accept a dime in corporate money._** We know a better way is possible and it starts with you Peter.
That's why I'm writing to you with a personal request and a link we made just for you. **With only a few days left this month, if you're in a position to, will you pitch in to our people-powered movement to expand our progressive political power?

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: The high cost of an omelet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Senator Warren and I sent a letter demanding answers.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18130%2E3422442%2EwWSmha)
While Californians are paying three times as much for eggs, our country’s largest egg producer saw profits jump by **600%** last year. Katie Porter and Elizabeth Warren sent a letter demanding answers by March 1st. **[Sign on to our petition to show your support.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_egg_prices/?source=em20230221-1&akid=18130%2E3422442%2EwWSmha)**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_egg_prices/?source=em20230221-1&akid=18130%2E3422442%2EwWSmha)
Big corporations have claimed that the spike in prices is because of reduced supply caused by an avian flu. But Katie wants to get to the bottom of this and make sure these companies aren’t taking advantage of the situation to price gouge consumers. **[Sign on to our petition to show your support:](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_egg_prices/?source=em20230221-1&akid=18130%2E3422442%2EwWSmha)**

We’ll let you know as Katie learns more,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. name: Mark Takano
subject: [NEW] Update on our work in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
With the new slim Republican majority in the House, Democrats are doing all we can to stop their hateful agenda.

| | Hi Peter, this is a different email than I usually send. Today, I want to update you on my critical work in Congress.

With the new slim Republican majority in the House, Democrats are doing all we can to stop their hateful agenda. **The GOP wants to undo all of our hard work over the past two years — but Peter, not on my watch!**

I’m working hard to keep MAGA extremism at bay and protect our Democratic accomplishments. _I hope you’re still with me in the fight._

— Mark | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59060033/393065270/299171790?amount=7&amounts=7,15,35,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230221_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWNiMzk0Ni0zN2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeDcB-i37Nd8GjKx1paknqdZ4-e71aGLzWlK_DiGd1E=)
---
* * *
**_STATE OF THE UNION_**

Earlier this month, President Biden visited the House chamber to deliver his second State of the Union address in front of Congress and our country.

Despite Republican jeering and booing, President Biden highlighted the dozens upon dozens of Democratic accomplishments over the past year — and I’m ready to build upon our crucial work.

**_VETERANS UPDATE_**

**Sadly, now that Republicans have the majority, I am no longer Chairman of the House Veterans committee.** Now, I am its Ranking Member — I am honored to continue my post as the top Democrat of this critical group.

And we’ve delivered. President Biden recently signed my legislation, the PACT Act, into law — _securing much-needed health care to our veterans affected by toxic burn pits._

**_PROTECTING LGBTQ+ RIGHTS GLOBALLY_**

As co-chair of the Equality Caucus in the House, it's vital to me that LBGTQ+ rights are recognized everywhere— especially with allies of the United States. Japan is the only G-7 country not to recognize these rights, but its parliament is on the verge of changing this. On a current trip to Japan, I was grateful to meet with our ambassador to discuss this and the legislation in front of the parliament to enshrine LGBTQ+ protections into Japanese law.

**_FIGHTING MAGA EXTREMISM_**

As I’ve mentioned, Peter, the House is now under Republican control. We’ve already seen the devastating effects of MAGA “leadership” — bills to ban abortion, crumble our democracy, and so much more.

I’m more committed than ever to hold the GOP accountable.

**_WHAT’S NEXT_**

So, I hope it’s clear: I’m not letting up for a second in this fight! **The new GOP majority brings new challenges, but I know Democrats stand united against their hate and destruction.**

**[That’s why I’m asking today: Will you chip in $7 to support my work in Congress? I’m counting on 250 donations today to stay on track of our February fundraising goal »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59060034/393065271/299171790?amount=7&amounts=7,15,35,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230221_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWNiMzk0Ni0zN2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BeDcB-i37Nd8GjKx1paknqdZ4-e71aGLzWlK_DiGd1E=)**

clean_body: With the new slim Republican majority in the House, Democrats are doing all we can to stop their hateful agenda. | | Hi Peter, this is a different email than I usually send. Today, I want to update you on my critical work in Congress. With the new slim Republican majority in the House, Democrats are doing all we can to stop their hateful agenda. The GOP wants to undo all of our hard work over the past two years — but Peter, not on my watch! I’m working hard to keep MAGA extremism at bay and protect our Democratic accomplishments. I hope you’re still with me in the fight. — Mark | = STATE OF THE UNION Earlier this month, President Biden visited the House chamber to deliver his second State of the Union address in front of Congress and our country. Despite Republican jeering and booing, President Biden highlighted the dozens upon dozens of Democratic accomplishments over the past year — and I’m ready to build upon our crucial work. VETERANS UPDATE Sadly, now that Republicans have the majority, I am no longer Chairman of the House Veterans committee. Now, I am its Ranking Member — I am honored to continue my post as the top Democrat of this critical group. And we’ve delivered. President Biden recently signed my legislation, the PACT Act, into law — securing much-needed health care to our veterans affected by toxic burn pits. PROTECTING LGBTQ+ RIGHTS GLOBALLY As co-chair of the Equality Caucus in the House, it's vital to me that LBGTQ+ rights are recognized everywhere— especially with allies of the United States. Japan is the only G-7 country not to recognize these rights, but its parliament is on the verge of changing this. On a current trip to Japan, I was grateful to meet with our ambassador to discuss this and the legislation in front of the parliament to enshrine LGBTQ+ protections into Japanese law. FIGHTING MAGA EXTREMISM As I’ve mentioned, Peter, the House is now under Republican control. We’ve already seen the devastating effects of MAGA “leadership” — bills to ban abortion, crumble our democracy, and so much more. I’m more committed than ever to hold the GOP accountable. WHAT’S NEXT So, I hope it’s clear: I’m not letting up for a second in this fight! The new GOP majority brings new challenges, but I know Democrats stand united against their hate and destruction. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. subject: Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your membership? When you do, you will receive your own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the mail.

body:
Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | |
---
This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. **[Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your membership? When you do, you’ll receive your own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the clean_body: Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | | This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. As the only party organization responsible for electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate, the DNC powers critical programs that help to protect our fundamental rights, hold the GOP accountable, and provide Democratic candidates nationwide with the resources necessary to win. Last November’s midterms were only the most recent step in our work to pass the Biden-Harris agenda and lower costs for working families. The DNC is already making critical investments in organizing and voter protection efforts that Democrats will rely on to win in the years to come, but they need your support. We appreciate all of your hard work. It means so much. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Fairness Project
subject: Medicaid expansion has helped shrink racial disparities in health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59061030/393068736/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDBkNjBkYi0zY2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mB26ckhuAEZ3AFTPo2GlGiYJUutfQMirxR8PVWEeQ=&emci=71f2096e-fbb1-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=740d60db-3cb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&ceid=561582) | Team, One of the most important provisions of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) was the expansion of Medicaid eligibility to cover more low-income Americans. Once the expansion took effect in 2014, 26 states and the District of Columbia immediately participated in the program – **meaning millions of uninsured people were now eligible for lifesaving health coverage overnight.** When the Supreme Court ruled that the federal government can’t force states to accept Medicaid expansion, 24 states led by extremist governors refused to follow suit. _Enter: the Fairness Project._ Since 2016, we’ve empowered voters to run Medicaid expansion campaigns to secure the coverage they needed. And through the power of ballot measures, in Idaho, Maine, Missouri, Nebraska, Oklahoma, South Dakota, and Utah — voters did just that. [HELP US CLOSE THE MEDICAID GAP →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59061031/393068737/-721718559?refcode=E20351-20230221-MedicaidBHM-SB-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDBkNjBkYi0zY2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mB26ckhuAEZ3AFTPo2GlGiYJUutfQMirxR8PVWEeQ=) **Since then, research comparing expansion states to non-expansion states has found _significant_ racial disparities in health coverage, access, and outcomes: **
* **The gap in uninsured rates between white and Black adults decreased by 51% in expansion states** versus just 33% in non-expansion states.
* Black women experienced 16 fewer deaths per 100,000 live births in expansion states than in non-expansion states.
* The gap between white and Black adults experiencing difficulty accessing care due to cost decreased from 8.1% in 2013 to 4.7% in 2018.[1]

As of today, 39 states and D.C. have expanded Medicaid, **7 of which were a direct result of our ballot campaigns. ** [POWER OUR WORK →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59061032/393068738/-721718559?refcode=E20351-20230221-MedicaidBHM-SB-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDBkNjBkYi0zY2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mB26ckhuAEZ3AFTPo2GlGiYJUutfQMirxR8PVWEeQ=) But in those 11 remaining states that continue to refuse, there are millions of people who are being denied coverage that would be eligible. The Department of Health and Human Services estimates that the number of people eligible for Medicaid among uninsured Black adults in the remaining non-expansion states would increase by nearly _fivefold_.[2] [**That’s why it’s critical that we continue to support Medicaid expansion ballot measures. The Fairness Project has already helped bring Medicaid coverage to over 1 million Americans through 7 successful campaigns – but we won’t stop fighting until every state where we can run a ballot measure adopts the expansion of Medicaid. Will you make a contribution today to help us continue our fight and close the Medicaid coverage gap for good?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59061033/393068739/-721718559?refcode=E20351-20230221-MedicaidBHM-SL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDBkNjBkYi0zY2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mB26ckhuAEZ3AFTPo2GlGiYJUutfQMirxR8PVWEeQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59061034/393068740/-721718559?express_lane=true&refcode=E20351-20230221-MedicaidBHM-EL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDBkNjBkYi0zY2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mB26ckhuAEZ3AFTPo2GlGiYJUutfQMirxR8PVWEeQ=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59061035/393068741/-721718559?express_lane=true&refcode=E20351-20230221-MedicaidBHM-EL-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDBkNjBkYi0zY2IyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mB26ckhuAEZ3AFTPo2GlGiYJUutfQMirxR8PVWEeQ=)**

clean_body: | | Team, One of the most important provisions of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) was the expansion of Medicaid eligibility to cover more low-income Americans. Once the expansion took effect in 2014, 26 states and the District of Columbia immediately participated in the program – meaning millions of uninsured people were now eligible for lifesaving health coverage overnight. When the Supreme Court ruled that the federal government can’t force states to accept Medicaid expansion, 24 states led by extremist governors refused to follow suit. Enter: the Fairness Project. Since 2016, we’ve empowered voters to run Medicaid expansion campaigns to secure the coverage they needed. And through the power of ballot measures, in Idaho, Maine, Missouri, Nebraska, Oklahoma, South Dakota, and Utah — voters did just that. = Since then, research comparing expansion states to non-expansion states has found significant racial disparities in health coverage, access, and outcomes: The gap in uninsured rates between white and Black adults decreased by 51% in expansion states versus just 33% in non-expansion states. Black women experienced 16 fewer deaths per 100,000 live births in expansion states than in non-expansion states. The gap between white and Black adults experiencing difficulty accessing care due to cost decreased from 8.1% in 2013 to 4.7% in 2018.[1] As of today, 39 states and D.C. have expanded Medicaid, 7 of which were a direct result of our ballot campaigns. = But in those 11 remaining states that continue to refuse, there are millions of people who are being denied coverage that would be eligible. The Department of Health and Human Services estimates that the number of people eligible for Medicaid among uninsured Black adults in the remaining non-expansion states would increase by nearly fivefold.[2] = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Fairness Project [1] [2] Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Peter, We’re still in an all out fight for abortion rights, and we need your help. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Not just another political email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🥰🥰🥰
#
Hey Derek, quick question — do you get emails from other candidates + causes?
If we had to guess, you probably get a *lot* of political emails in your inbox. And not all of them treat you with respect.
**“Donate $10 and we’ll QUADRUPLE match it!”
“Urgent: Final notice”
“We’re totally screwed”**
^Look familiar? These are just a few of the scammy, + straight up dishonest tactics used by campaigns to squeeze people for ActBlue donations. 🙄
**But NOT us.** We know you’re not an ATM. We know real people are the backbone of our work — teachers, nurses, veterans, single parents, retirees, and grassroots supporters like you, Derek. And we couldn’t be more grateful.
We still have to ask for money, but we’ll do it honestly and humbly: **[John’s work is funded by small online donations. Will you consider making one today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230221-1?refcode=em20230221-1-8252&refcode2=8252_434096_kk_r-k&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)**
**[Yes, I'll Chip In »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230221-1?refcode=em20230221-8252&refcode2=8252_434096_kk_r-k&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)**
Seriously, John has been crystal-clear from Day One of running for U.S. Senate that we will NOT allow our campaign to lie or use scare tactics in our online fundraising emails.
We’ll never trick you into a recurring donation or act like the sky is falling if you don’t give. In fact, every deadline we share is a real fundraising deadline that is either set by our finance team or by the Federal Election Commission.
**What we *will* do is explain how important your support is + give you the opportunity to chip in when you can.**(If you don’t today, that’s 💯 cool with us.)
After all, $3 might not always feel like much. But the fact is that John would never have defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and became a U.S. Senator if it weren’t for many thousands of $3 donations. _That’s how powerful just a few bucks can be._
We have so much work still to do, Derek. We need to take on extreme Republican attacks on basic freedoms, defend our Democratic majority + rally support for popular legislation that actually helps working people. And all of that is going to require serious grassroots resources.
**[So we’ll just ask you without any of that scammy BS: Will you continue the work of our winning campaign + ensure John can have the biggest impact possible in the Senate by making a donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230221-1?refcode=em20230221-1-8252&refcode2=8252_434096_kk_r-k&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230221-1?refcode=em20230221-8252&refcode2=8252_434096_kk_r-k&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)**
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you!
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230221-8252-footer&t=1&refcode2=8252_434096_kk_r-k&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8252%2E434096%2Ekk_r-k)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Susie Lee
subject: Nevada’s climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
We have no choice but to act

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061889/393071646/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyYzU5Ny00MmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55Kh2ZJcmavGqnyH0inGLf2sN--mOLJs81SBPsVyOMQ=)

| | Climate change is about people. It impacts everyone, everywhere – especially families here in Nevada. The effects of our climate crisis are clear: 1\. **The risk of drought across Las Vegas and the greater metro area is _extremely high._** From this point through 2050, the stress on our water supply will continue to worsen. 2\. **Heat waves are going to become more frequent.** Look, no one likes those incredibly hot days – they’re dangerous, damage our ecosystem, and add stress to our power grid. By 2050, the number of heat wave days could jump drastically to 55 days per year. 3\. **Days where there’s an extreme risk for fire will only increase, too.** Drought and heat waves exacerbate the risk for dangerous wildfires across Nevada. Regardless of what some Republican officials claim, climate change is a real and present danger to our country. Scientists have warned that if we don’t change course now – it will be too little, too late. **That is why I introduced a series of bills to solve the drought crisis and wildfire threats by funding scientific monitoring, establishing a national framework of water data to support research and innovation, investing in conservation technologies, and boosting infrastructure resources for water recycling.** [**Team — I’m working in Congress to stop climate change from accelerating even further. We can preserve our state for the next generation, so I’m asking you to join me in this fight by chipping in to my climate-forward campaign today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061890/393071647/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220221_FR_VEGASCLIMATE_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyYzU5Ny00MmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55Kh2ZJcmavGqnyH0inGLf2sN--mOLJs81SBPsVyOMQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59061891/393071648/-1907207781?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220221_FR_VEGASCLIMATE_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjcyYzU5Ny00MmIyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55Kh2ZJcmavGqnyH0inGLf2sN--mOLJs81SBPsVyOMQ=)

clean_body: We have no choice but to act | = | | Climate change is about people. It impacts everyone, everywhere – especially families here in Nevada. The effects of our climate crisis are clear: 1\. The risk of drought across Las Vegas and the greater metro area is extremely high. From this point through 2050, the stress on our water supply will continue to worsen. 2\. Heat waves are going to become more frequent. Look, no one likes those incredibly hot days – they’re dangerous, damage our ecosystem, and add stress to our power grid. By 2050, the number of heat wave days could jump drastically to 55 days per year. 3\. Days where there’s an extreme risk for fire will only increase, too. Drought and heat waves exacerbate the risk for dangerous wildfires across Nevada. Regardless of what some Republican officials claim, climate change is a real and present danger to our country. Scientists have warned that if we don’t change course now – it will be too little, too late. That is why I introduced a series of bills to solve the drought crisis and wildfire threats by funding scientific monitoring, establishing a national framework of water data to support research and innovation, investing in conservation technologies, and boosting infrastructure resources for water recycling. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Standing with you, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Greetings from Japan 🇯🇵
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
All of these things that we’re constantly told are impossible, are possible.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230221-3919-header&t=1&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)
Greetings from Tokyo!
I just recently arrived in Tokyo for a congressional delegation trip (also known as a CODEL), and I am going to try and bring you along with me as much as I can!
What I want to do is check-in and hopefully be able to provide some essential context and background information for what you’ll be seeing about the trip for the rest of the week.
[**If you want to hear more about the CODEL trip – from a behind the scenes look at Japan’s high-speed rail (aka Shinkansen) network, to meetings with scientists, experts, and LBGTQ activists – click here to sign up for more detailed updates.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/japan-sign-up/?source=em20230221-3919-P&t=2&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)
What I’m so hopeful about being here is that in the U.S. – especially as a progressive – so often I’m told that what we’re fighting for and what we want is impossible. That it’s unrealistic, naive, and silly; that it’s not viable, and that I’m a “child” for thinking these things are possible.
Japan is a country that not only has universal health care, not only has a bullet train public infrastructure system that is robust, not only has child care, not only cares about the environment, not only cares about cultural preservation – **but is also successful**. It is the third largest economy in the world.
It’s not to say that everything is perfect here. It’s not to say that it is without its challenges. It’s not even to say that the U.S. should be just like Japan.
**But it’s saying that all of these things that we’re constantly told are impossible, are possible.** They’re possible. A better world is possible.
I’m really excited about what we have to learn here in Japan, and I'm also particularly hopeful about the immediate possibilities for advancing LGBTQ and women's rights on the precipice of the G7 Summit.
Thanks again and bye from Tokyo,
Alexandria
**[Sign up for updates →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/japan-sign-up/?source=em20230221-3919-P&t=3&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20230221-3919-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=4&refcode2=3919_2526796_24q1D4&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230221-3919-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=5&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3919%2E2526796%2E24q1D4)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Surprise!
body:
What we need in a President. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-j/) **SURPRISE!** **[Biden arrived in Ukraine's capital city of Kyiv early Monday morning](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-t/)** in a surprise visit just ahead of the one-year anniversary of Russia's invasion of the country. Experts say this visit will have **[little impact on the war.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-i/)** **Paying for Ukraine's Economy** Last week, Biden signed a request to Congress for more financial **[assistance to Ukraine that will pay for pensions and social support](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-d/)** so Ukrainians have something in their pocket. **What we Need in a President** South Dakota Governor Noem says **[we need a President that loves the country, defends us and doesn't act like a dimwit](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-h/)** in front of the whole world. **Forced Out** James O'Keefe has been **[forced out of Project Veritas](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-k/)** after being removed from the board of directors. **They Must be Stopped!** The Biden administration is **[readying to sign a"legally binding" agreement with the World Health Organization](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-u/) **that would permit it the authority to dictate U.S. policies during a pandemic. **Sounding the Alarm** [**An alarming report has revealed that dozens of Chicago schools claim no students are proficient in either math or reading**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-o/) despite the state and federal government funneling billions of dollars into education in the Windy City.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* **[You'd have to be blind](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-m/) **to miss it.
* **[Where](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-c/)** is Greta?
* No **[Brainer](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-q/)**.

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-v/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qhkhrjt-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qhkhrjt-trhiujldw-g/)
